steps.detail: Monkey Madness I — unlocks the dragon scimitar and a major combat step up.
Pick a method: Air Bolt / elemental-weakness combat spells / Low Level Alchemy / Enchant Crossbow Bolts (Pearl bolts) / Killing Crabs.

methods.location: Ice Giants (White Wolf Mountain / Asgarnian Ice Dungeon) or Ghosts (Stronghold of Security, air-weak)
methods.notes: Row label 'Air Bolt' is read as the page's air-elemental spell line (e.g. Wind Bolt) cast on monsters with an elemental weakness for a damage/accuracy bonus over neutral targets; page gives no flat xp/h for this technique.

methods.location: Anywhere with bank access; can be run alongside questing or Agility
methods.notes: Unlocks at 21, not 1; page's 60,000 xp/h figure is stationary-only. Per project convention, source items to alch via drops/production, not Grand Exchange purchase.

methods.location: Bank with unenchanted pearl bolts + cosmic/water runes
methods.notes: Fastest early bolt-enchant tier reachable in this band; opal (level 4, 49,500 xp/h) and sapphire (level 7, 93,500 xp/h) are cheaper alternatives from the same table.

methods.location: Rock Crabs (Rellekka) or Sand Crabs (Hosidius) — no quest requirement
methods.notes: Low-attention combat training; page recommends at least 30 Defence to mitigate incoming damage. No flat xp/h figure stated for crabs specifically.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw combat-spell loadout
atoms.detail: Elemental staff equipped if owned (unlimited matching runes), else runes ??x for the highest affordable combat spell.

atoms.label: Go to Sand Crabs (Hosidius south coast)
atoms.detail: Same spot as the Ranged crab bands.

atoms.label: Cast combat spells on Sand Crabs until Magic 25
atoms.detail: Autocast the highest-level affordable combat spell (Air Bolt or better per the coarse row's own detail); reset aggro every ~10 min.

hints.note: Low Alchemy unwanted crab drops while banking -- same page's parallel Levels 21-55 section, synergy not fabrication.

atoms.label: Low Alchemy unwanted crab drops (bank-side, optional)
atoms.detail: Cast Low Level Alchemy on unwanted equipment drops picked up along the way; also grants Magic xp toward this band.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Normal logs, burning in a row / Coloured firelighter logs / Pyre logs, 1-tick creation.

methods.method: Normal logs, burning in a row
methods.location: Varrock west bank (chop your own logs -- never GE)
methods.notes: Baseline method matching the row's own label; the page's fastest-xp table for this range instead recommends coloured firelighter logs (listed below).

methods.location: Varrock west bank (chop your own logs; apply a firelighter -- never GE)
methods.notes: Page's own table lists coloured firelighter logs (white/red/purple/green/blue) as guaranteed-to-light and the fastest xp/hr for levels 1-30.

methods.location: Bank with sacred oil and logs in inventory
methods.notes: Tick-manipulated creation of pyre logs by using sacred oil on logs gives the fastest xp to level 30; gated behind Shades of Mort'ton completion.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw firemaking loadout
atoms.detail: Tinderbox equipped/inventoried, normal logs ??x.

atoms.label: Go to Varrock West Bank
atoms.detail: Burn logs in a row east-to-west near the bank; tile ??.

atoms.label: Light logs in a row until Firemaking 15
atoms.detail: Light one log per tile walking in a line, bank, repeat.

hints.note: Collecting ashes while burning feeds the Ash sanctifier/Prayer-offering synergy if picked up.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Oak logs (chop at Draynor) / Coloured firelighter logs / Pyre logs, 1-tick creation.

methods.location: Draynor Village oak trees
methods.notes: Continuity method matching the row's own label; oak logs are not a distinct entry in the current Firemaking training page's fastest-xp table (it groups 1-30 under coloured firelighter logs), so citing the row's pre-existing refs rather than inventing a fresh citation.

methods.location: Varrock west bank (chop your own logs; apply a firelighter -- never GE)
methods.notes: Page's own table lists coloured firelighter logs as guaranteed-to-light and the fastest xp/hr through level 30.

methods.location: Bank with sacred oil and logs in inventory
methods.notes: Tick-manipulated pyre-log creation gives the fastest xp up to level 30; gated behind Shades of Mort'ton completion.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw tinderbox + banked oak logs
atoms.detail: Withdraw a tinderbox and the oak logs banked in the immediately preceding band (train-woodcutting-30) -- own-chopped, never bought.

atoms.label: Burn oak logs until Firemaking 30
atoms.detail: Light logs one at a time (per-log burning stays inside this loop's detail, U4). Any open ground works.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Superheat Item / Curse-tier spell splashing / Enchant Crossbow Bolts (Emerald bolts) / Grand Library of Great Kourend (book delivery).

hints.note: Superheat Item gives passive Smithing xp on the bar produced.

methods.location: Any bank with ores nearby (e.g. Falador east, Edgeville)
methods.notes: Unlocks at 43, the top of this band; also grants passive Smithing xp on the bar produced, matching the row's own detail.

methods.location: Any safe weak monster with Auto Retaliate on

items: gear with -64 or lower Magic attack bonus

methods.notes: Matches the row's own 'Curse spells' label via the page's splashing technique: no damage dealt but base cast xp is still granted, needing input roughly once every 20 minutes. Page states a 6,600-75,750 xp/h range depending on spell, not a single figure.

methods.location: Bank with unenchanted emerald bolts + cosmic/air/nature runes
methods.notes: Continues the bolt-enchant ladder into this band; topaz bolts (level 29, 181,500 xp/h) are a cheaper alternative from the same table.

methods.method: Grand Library of Great Kourend (book delivery)
methods.location: Arceuus Library, Great Kourend
methods.notes: No rune cost; page states each delivered book grants 15x the player's current Magic level in xp, so per-hour totals scale with level rather than being one fixed number. No minimum level to start.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw Superheat Item loadout
atoms.detail: Withdraw nature runes (1/cast) and fire runes (4/cast) per Superheat Item's own cost table, plus banked iron ore + coal.

atoms.label: Mine iron ore and coal (non-GE)
atoms.detail: Steel bar needs 1 iron ore + 2 coal per bar (Steel bar's own Recipe). Mine both -- site not pinned by the route fixture (??); xref train-mining-45 later in this same segment trains Mining on iron ore at a triangle site, a plausible shared source once Mining is high enough.

atoms.label: Cast Superheat Item on iron ore until Magic 43
atoms.detail: 1 iron ore + 2 coal + 1 nature rune + 4 fire runes per cast -> 1 steel bar, per Steel bar's own Superheat recipe row. Also grants passive Smithing xp on the bar produced.

hints.note: Superheat Item gives passive Smithing xp on the bar produced -- xref: training:train-smithing-40 (same bars, shared recipe).

steps.detail: Pick a method: Maple logs / Willow logs / Teak logs / Arctic pine logs.

methods.location: Varrock west bank (chop your own maple logs -- never GE)
methods.notes: Matches the row's own label; covers only the final stretch of this 30-50 band per the page's own bracket table. Also the log type required for Desert Treasure per the row's existing detail (that quest req is unverified here, out of scope for this method mining).

methods.location: Varrock west bank (chop your own willow logs -- never GE)
methods.notes: Page's own bracket table entry for the start of this band.

methods.location: Varrock west bank (chop your own teak logs -- never GE)
methods.notes: Page's own bracket table entry for the middle of this band.

methods.location: Varrock west bank (chop your own arctic pine logs -- never GE)

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw tinderbox + banked maple logs
atoms.detail: Withdraw a tinderbox and maple logs sourced by your own Woodcutting (non-GE) -- the row's own methods[] location field lists 'Grand Exchange' as a burn-spot, not a log source; modelled gather-own regardless per the unconditional hard rule.

atoms.label: Burn maple logs until Firemaking 50
atoms.detail: Required for Desert Treasure per the route's own detail. Any open ground works.

steps.detail: Pick a method: High Level Alchemy / Superheat Item (smelt ores into bars) / Arceuus Library book-delivery minigame / Enchant Crossbow Bolt (highest affordable gem bolts, e.g. Ruby).

hints.note: 65xp/cast, up to 78,000xp/h stationary [ref: Pay-to-play Magic training s14].

methods.location: Anywhere, on noted items
methods.notes: Core money-maker from level 55; up to ~78,000 xp/h stationary per the page, matching this row's own hint. Per project convention, source items to alch via drops/production, not Grand Exchange purchase.

methods.location: Anywhere with ore stock (bank noted ore)
methods.notes: Viable option for the pre-55 portion of this band; also grants passive Smithing xp.

methods.location: Arceuus Library, Great Kourend
methods.notes: No hard minimum level per the page; rune-free xp via delivering requested books, best done with a book-location RuneLite plugin. Page's ~200,000 xp/h figure is quoted at level 75, not this band, so left unsourced here.

methods.method: Enchant Crossbow Bolt (highest affordable gem bolts, e.g. Ruby)
methods.location: Anywhere, on owned bolts
methods.notes: Highest-speed option for players prioritising xp/h over cost.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw High Level Alchemy loadout
atoms.detail: Withdraw nature runes (1/cast) and fire runes (5/cast) per High Level Alchemy's own cost table, plus own-produced smithed items as alch fodder (steel items from train-smithing-40 / bars from train-magic-43, both earlier in this segment) -- never GE-bought fodder.

atoms.label: Cast High Level Alchemy on own-produced items until Magic 55
atoms.detail: 1 nature rune + 5 fire runes per cast, per High Level Alchemy's own cost table. Fodder = the chain's own smithed/superheated output rather than a bought batch -- gold value of what's alched stays ?? (not fabricated).

hints.note: 65xp/cast, up to 78,000xp/h stationary, per the route's own hint.
Alch the chain's own steel items (train-smithing-40) or superheated bars (train-magic-43) rather than buying fodder -- non-GE loop per the wave3:consumable-loops queue note.

atoms.label: Alt: Enchant Crossbow Bolt (ruby bolts)
atoms.detail: 324,500 xp/hr per the row's own method -- highest of the 4 cited alternates, gated at Magic 49.

checkpoints.label: High Level Alchemy on own-produced fodder (to 55)

steps.detail: No requirements. Talk to Gertrude, feed a seasoned sardine and milk to her lost cat found up a ladder at the Lumber Yard NE of Varrock (chopping the dying tree there also ticks an easy Varrock diary task), then search crates below for Fluffs' kitten and reunite them before returning to Gertrude for a starter kitten. Feeds into Ratcatchers and other cat-line quests.

req_items.name: Seasoned sardine
req_items.note: or raw sardine + doogle leaves obtained in-quest

steps.detail: No skill/quest requirements, no combat. Goblins are debating a new armour colour. Collect 3 sets of goblin mail from crates around Goblin Village (or off goblin drops), make blue dye (woad leaves from Wyson the gardener + Aggie in Draynor) and orange dye (combine red+yellow dye from Aggie), dye one mail orange and one blue, leave the third plain. Show the generals orange (rejected), then blue (rejected) -- they settle on the original plain brown. This is the real gate on the RFD 'Freeing the Goblin generals' subquest.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Walk to Goblin Village
atoms.detail: Head to Goblin Village, north of Falador.

atoms.label: Gather 3 sets of goblin mail from crates
atoms.detail: Collect goblin mail from 3 crates: behind the Generals' hut to the north-east, in the hut south-west of the Generals, and north of the top of the southernmost ladder.

atoms.label: Buy woad leaves from Wyson
atoms.detail: Offer to buy 2 woad leaves for 20gp from Wyson the gardener in Falador Park.

atoms.label: Take onions from the farm north of Rimmington
atoms.detail: Take 2 onions from the farm north of Rimmington.

atoms.label: Buy redberries from Wydin's Food Store
atoms.detail: Buy 3 redberries from Wydin's Food Store in Port Sarim (hop worlds to restock if needed).

atoms.label: Make blue dye with Aggie
atoms.detail: Use the woad leaves on Aggie in Draynor Village to make blue dye.

atoms.label: Make red dye with Aggie
atoms.detail: Use the redberries on Aggie to make red dye.

atoms.label: Make yellow dye with Aggie
atoms.detail: Use the onions on Aggie to make yellow dye; don't eat the onions by accident with left-click.

atoms.label: Combine red and yellow dye into orange dye
atoms.detail: Use the red dye on the yellow dye to create orange dye. Never use both dyes separately on the goblin mail.

atoms.label: Dye one goblin mail set blue
atoms.detail: Use blue dye on one set of goblin mail.

atoms.label: Dye one goblin mail set orange
atoms.detail: Use orange dye on a second set of goblin mail; leave the third set its natural brown.

atoms.label: Present each colour until they settle on brown
atoms.detail: Offer to pick a colour for the generals: present the orange mail (rejected), then the blue mail (rejected), then the plain brown mail, which they finally accept to complete the quest. Dialogue differs slightly if Dragon Slayer I is in progress.

hints.value: 3 Do you want me to pick an armour colour for you?|1 Start the quest?|3 What about a different colour?
hints.note: alternate opener (2 So How is life for the goblins? | 3 Do you want me to pick an armour colour for you? | 3 What about a different colour?) if Dragon Slayer I is in progress

Produce blue and orange dye (gather/produce path only)
Dye two of the three goblin mail sets

steps.detail: Second Mahjarrat-series quest, novice, with a good/evil branch (same structure as Temple of Ikov). Ceril Carnillean says cultists stole his family armour; head to the cave south-east of the Ardougne clock tower and talk to Clivet to learn about the Mahjarrat Hazeel. Choose a side: siding with Ceril means refusing Clivet, turning 5 sewer valves in specific directions to reach the hideout raft, killing Alomone (level 13) for Carnillean armour, then reporting to Ceril for a fake ending -- search the upstairs cupboard for Hazeel's mark and poison and show Ceril to fire the butler for the real reward. Siding with Hazeel means accepting Clivet's offer, poisoning Ceril's cooking range (accidentally kills the dog Scruffy instead), getting Hazeel's mark from Clivet, turning the same 5 valves, then helping Butler Jones steal a restoration scroll from a locked chest in Ceril's house and giving it to Alomone to begin the resurrection. Choice also has a minor effect on Secrets of the North.

req_items.name: Weapon, armour, and food
req_items.note: only needed if siding with Ceril, to kill the level 13 Alomone

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: Short experienced-tier miniquest. The Strange Old Man asks you to retrieve a strange icon guarded by the six Barrows Brothers — defeat all six, then loot the icon from the Barrows reward chest (keep at least 6 free inventory slots or you must redo all six brothers to get it), and return it to him to finish. Wiki lists 'Required for completing: Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire' (Twisted Tale/lore cross-reference, not a normal prerequisite chain). Promoted into this batch from a stalled wave3:morytania-prayer-pvm queue entry per DEPTH_BACKLOG Band C guidance.

req_items.name: Combat equipment
req_items.note: needed to defeat the six Barrows Brothers

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.detail: He asks you to retrieve an icon that the six Barrows Brothers have guarded for an unknown entity.

atoms.label: Defeat all six Barrows Brothers
atoms.detail: Fight through all six brothers; the wiki's own Barrows/Strategies page has brother-specific tactics (not detailed on this page).

atoms.label: Open the Barrows reward chest for the strange icon
atoms.detail: Keep at least 6 free inventory slots before searching the chest, or you must defeat all six brothers again to retry -- the icon will not drop to the ground.

atoms.label: Return the strange icon to the Strange Old Man to finish
atoms.detail: Hand over the icon to complete the miniquest.

checkpoints.label: Retrieve the strange icon from the Barrows

steps.detail: Must own a cat and beat a level-91 Possessed Priest plus one randomly-assigned level 75-81 elemental guardian (Apmeken/Crondis/Scabaras magic, or Het melee - determined by which canopic jar you're given). Give the Wanderer a tinderbox+waterskin(4), enter the pyramid (no teleporting out once inside - aggressive lvl-84 mummies + poison scarabs, use minimap-click nav to dodge traps, jump the pit at 20%+ run energy). Solve a golden-bird door puzzle to trigger flashback 1. Drop your cat to answer the Sphinx's riddle (answer: 9) or lose the cat, then see the High Priest. Flashback 2: re-enter pyramid, take the correct canopic jar from the west room, kill the guardian that spawns, take the jar out (crossing the pit twice), then return and drop the jar back before leaving. Prep for the ceremony: give the Embalmer linen+salt+sap, give the Carpenter willow logs for a holy symbol. Flashback 3: use the holy symbol on a sarcophagus in the east room, kill the level-91 Possessed Priest, talk High Priest. Flashback 4: talk High Priest again in the temple to finish. Post-quest: equipping the catspeak amulet and asking your cat about "being confused" unlocks bonus lore cutscenes. High spine value: opens Sophanem/Menaphos region access.

req_items.name: Cat (or overgrown cat, hellcat, or kitten)
Bag of salt
req_items.note: or an empty bucket to make one in Sophanem

steps.detail: No requirements. Collect the 4 coloured beads (kill imps -- F2P spots near Falador's south entrance or Karamja volcano top; members near Ardougne Monastery/Chasm of Fire/Charcoal furnace), then hand them to Wizard Mizgog atop the Wizards' Tower for the amulet of accuracy.

Report all 3 findings back to Jorral, then relay them to King Lathas.

steps.detail: No requirements. A whodunit inside a manor reached by boat south of Lumbridge Swamp: empty a rainwater barrel for the manor key, then solve three room puzzles for coloured gem keys (slash a painting for the ruby key, play D-E-A-D on a piano for the emerald key, enter a gem sequence Sapphire-Diamond-Zenyte-Emerald-Onyx-Ruby in a fireplace for the sapphire key). Use all three keys on the final blue door, dodge the hidden killer's knife throws by aiming a mirror at their wardrobe, then fight and unmask Abigale as the killer.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.detail: No requirements (Kandarin-region quest, included in this bundle's spine). Old man Sinclair is dead; find flypaper and a dagger inside the mansion, use flour+flypaper on silver items from two thread-colour-matched suspects' bedrooms to dust prints and match one to the dagger. Ask Gossip outside and the Seers' Village pub poison salesman who bought poison, confront the matched suspect about their motive, then search the item they claim to have used the poison on to confirm before reporting to a guard.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to the guard outside Sinclair Mansion and agree to help.
atoms.detail: Approach the guard at the mansion's front gate and accept the investigation task to start the quest.

atoms.label: Take 4 flypapers from the sacks in the shed north-west of the mansion.
atoms.detail: Investigate the sacks in the shed to obtain the flypapers used later to lift fingerprints.

atoms.label: Take the pungent pot from inside the mansion.
atoms.detail: Search the mansion interior for the pot, later filled with flour for dusting prints.

atoms.label: Take the criminal's dagger from inside the mansion.
atoms.detail: Search the mansion interior for the murder weapon, whose print will be matched to a suspect.

atoms.label: Investigate the smashed east window for the criminal's thread.
atoms.detail: The thread snagged in the broken window is a colour clue that narrows which two suspects to search.

atoms.label: Search the thread-matched suspects' bedroom barrels for 2 silver items.
atoms.detail: Thread colour picks the suspect pair to search: red -> Bob and Carol, green -> Anna and David, blue -> Elizabeth and Frank. Only one pair is real for a given playthrough.

hints.value: red thread -> search Bob and Carol's barrels
green thread -> search Anna and David's barrels
blue thread -> search Elizabeth and Frank's barrels

atoms.label: Fill the pungent pot with flour from the kitchen barrel.
atoms.detail: The kitchen barrel supplies the flour needed alongside flypaper to dust fingerprints.

atoms.label: Dust the dagger and both silver items with flour and flypaper to reveal prints.
atoms.detail: Apply flour then flypaper to each of the three objects (the dagger and the two silver items) to lift a print from each.

atoms.label: Compare each silver item's print against the dagger's print until they match.
atoms.detail: Try each lifted print against the dagger's print in turn; the matching suspect is randomised per playthrough (one of Anna, Bob, Carol, David, Elizabeth, Frank).

until.state: a silver item's print matches the dagger's print, identifying the culprit

atoms.label: Talk to Gossip outside the mansion's front gate and ask who he suspects.
atoms.detail: Gossip offers a rumour on who he thinks is responsible for the murder.

atoms.label: Talk to the poison salesman in the Seers' Village pub and ask who bought poison.
atoms.detail: Select the Murder Mystery quest option (not Fremennik Trials) to learn who purchased poison at the house.

hints.value: salesman shares a dialogue option with the unrelated Fremennik Trials quest -- pick the Murder Mystery option

atoms.label: Talk to the print-matched suspect and ask why they bought poison.
atoms.detail: Confront the suspect identified by the fingerprint match from the earlier comparison.

atoms.label: Search the item the suspect claims they used the poison on.
atoms.detail: Which object to search depends on the matched suspect: Anna's compost heap, Bob's beehive in the cow pen, Frank's family crest east of the front door, David's spiders' nest upstairs, Carol's kitchen drain west of the front door, or Elizabeth's fountain. Only one applies for a given playthrough.

hints.value: Bob -> search the beehive in the cow pen
Frank -> search the family crest east of the front door
David -> search the spiders' nest upstairs
Carol -> search the kitchen drain west of the front door
no dedicated search/investigate verb in the enum; mapped to gather (object-interaction primitive), no tangible item produced -- confirms guilt as a quest-state change

atoms.label: Talk to a guard and report who is responsible to complete the quest.
atoms.detail: Deliver your conclusion to a guard, ending the investigation.

steps.detail: Talk to Orlando Smith to start, then click the plaque in front of each of 14 creature displays (North room: Lizard/Battle tortoise/Dragon/Wyvern; East room: Snail/Snake/Sea slug/Monkey; South room: Kalphite Queen/Terrorbird; West room: Penguin/Mole/Camel/Leech) and answer 3 multiple-choice questions correctly per display -- answers come from that display's own Natural historian's lecture or the wiki page text itself, and a good approach is simply guessing since only 3-of-several need to be right. Once all 3 for a display are answered correctly its questions are replaced by the creature's common+scientific name. Return to Orlando after all 14 displays are done for the xp reward.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Orlando Smith to start the quiz
atoms.detail: He's in the centre of the Varrock Museum basement; clicking a display's plaque before talking to him first just prompts that you need to speak to him.

atoms.label: Answer 3 questions correctly at each North room display
atoms.detail: Click the plaque in front of each of the 4 North room displays (Lizard, Battle tortoise, Dragon, Wyvern) and answer 3 questions correctly on each; only 3 right answers are needed regardless of how many questions are shown, and the answers are also given by that room's Natural historian and this wiki page's own creature sections.

hints.value: Wrong answers can be retried; once a display's 3 questions are answered its quiz is replaced by the creature's common and scientific name.

atoms.label: Answer 3 questions correctly at each East room display
atoms.detail: Click the plaque in front of each of the 4 East room displays (Snail, Snake, Sea slug, Monkey) and answer 3 questions correctly on each.

atoms.label: Answer 3 questions correctly at each South room display
atoms.detail: Click the plaque in front of each of the 2 South room displays (Kalphite Queen, Terrorbird) and answer 3 questions correctly on each.

atoms.label: Answer 3 questions correctly at each West room display
atoms.detail: Click the plaque in front of each of the 4 West room displays (Penguin, Mole, Camel, Leech) and answer 3 questions correctly on each.

atoms.label: Talk to Orlando Smith again for the XP reward
atoms.detail: Once all 14 displays across all 4 rooms are complete, speak to Orlando again to receive the quiz's Hunter and Slayer XP.

hints.value: If this is your first-ever Slayer XP, your first Slayer-master assignment won't include a free enchanted gem -- you'll need to pay 1 coin for it instead.

checkpoints.label: Start the quiz with Orlando Smith

steps.detail: Edmond's daughter Elena vanished into plague-locked West Ardougne. His wife Alrena makes a gas mask from dwellberries; soften the mud behind the house with 4 buckets of water then dig under the wall with the spade, use rope on the blocked pipe grill to get through. Inside, show Jethick Elena's picture, learn from the Rehnison family she was taken to the barred plague house. Cure Bravek's hangover (mix chocolate dust + bucket of milk + snape grass) to get a warrant past the Mourners guarding that house, find and free Elena, then return to Edmond via the manhole. One of the Ardougne-diary prereq quests alongside Sheep Shearer and Clock Tower.

req_items.name: Hangover cure
req_items.note: or chocolate dust + bucket of milk + snape grass to make one

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Make the hangover cure before starting: chocolate dust into a bucket of milk, then add snape grass
atoms.detail: Do this early and avoid drinking/eating anything else, per the guide's warning.

atoms.label: Talk to Edmond about his missing daughter Elena
Talk to Alrena inside or near the house
Take Elena's picture off the table in the house
Speak to Edmond again
Pour 4 buckets of water on the mud patch behind the house
atoms.detail: Patch sits between the cabbages and potatoes.

atoms.label: Dig the softened ground with a spade
Walk to the farthest pipe south and use a rope on the blocked grill
atoms.detail: Opens a way under the wall into West Ardougne.

atoms.label: Talk to Edmond, then put on the gas mask and climb up the pipe
atoms.detail: Crossing here is the actual entry into the plague district.

atoms.label: Talk to Jethick to the east and take the book he offers

hints.value: Yes, I'll return it for you.

atoms.label: Enter the house north of the entry point, next to the rotten apple spawn, and talk to Martha or Ted Rehnison
Go upstairs and talk to Milli Rehnison
Try the barred building south of the town square, marked with an X
atoms.detail: Confirms this building is where Elena is being held.

hints.value: I fear not a mere plague.

atoms.label: Head to the main Mourner building north of the town square, north of the manhole
Talk to the Clerk in the main room

hints.value: Who is through that door? -> This is urgent though! Someone's been kidnapped!

atoms.label: Talk to Bravek about his hangover
atoms.detail: He hands over a scruffy note describing the cure.

hints.value: This is really important though! -> Do you know what's in the cure?

atoms.label: Give Bravek the hangover cure to get a warrant
Back at the barred building, search the barrel west of the staircase for a small key
Go downstairs, unlock the cell with the small key, and talk to Elena
Return to the town square, down the manhole, through the sewer, up the mud pile, and talk to Edmond at his house
atoms.detail: Completes the quest.

checkpoints.label: Prep the gas mask cure and dig under the wall
Track Elena down inside West Ardougne
Get a warrant from the Mourners
Free Elena and report back to Edmond

steps.detail: Sneak a gas mask (via pigeon + bird feed distraction) past the mourner watchtower into West Ardougne to retrieve Elena's distillator, fetch touch paper from the Rimmington chemist, hand plague-sample vials to 3 of the chemist's henchmen around a campfire and collect the processed samples back, then smuggle the sample and paper through the guarded Varrock fence disguised in a priest gown to deliver them to Guidor, and finally report to King Lathas in Ardougne Castle.

req_items.name: gas mask
req_items.note: free from a cupboard in Edmond and Alrena's house, East Ardougne

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Speak to Elena to begin the quest
atoms.detail: Talk to Elena in her East Ardougne house, directly west of the shortcut log, to start the quest and agree to retrieve her distillator.

hints.value: 1I'll try to retrieve it for you.

atoms.label: Speak to Jerico
atoms.detail: Speak to Jerico in the house just south of the northern Ardougne bank (the house with pigeon cages in the backyard).

atoms.label: Search Jerico's cupboard for bird feed
atoms.detail: Search the cupboard to obtain bird feed; click continue or it won't be added to your inventory.

atoms.label: Take a pigeon cage from the backyard
atoms.detail: Grab a pigeon cage from Jerico's backyard.

atoms.label: Walk to the West Ardougne watchtower
atoms.detail: Go south-west of Ardougne Castle to speak with Omart, then north to the small watchtower in front of the West Ardougne gates and stand in the corner where the two spiked fences meet.

atoms.label: Distract the watchtower guard with bird feed
atoms.detail: Use bird feed on the watchtower fence to lure the guard's attention.

atoms.label: Open the pigeon cage
atoms.detail: Click open on the pigeon cage in your inventory while the guard is distracted.

atoms.label: Equip the gas mask
atoms.detail: Equip your gas mask before crossing into West Ardougne.

atoms.label: Cross into West Ardougne with Omart
atoms.detail: Run south from the watchtower and speak to Omart; after a short delay you arrive in West Ardougne.

atoms.label: Squeeze into the Mourner HQ backyard
atoms.detail: Head around the Mourner Headquarters to the north-eastern area with the vat and mangle, then squeeze through the fence into the backyard.

atoms.label: Pick up the rotten apple
atoms.detail: Pick up the rotten apple in the backyard.

atoms.label: Use the rotten apple on the cauldron
atoms.detail: Use the rotten apple on the cauldron, then squeeze back through the fence.

atoms.label: Walk to Nurse Sarah's house
atoms.detail: Go to Nurse Sarah's house, south-west of the West Ardougne church.

atoms.label: Search the cupboard for a medical gown
atoms.detail: Search the cupboard in the northern part of the house for a medical gown.

atoms.label: Equip the medical gown
atoms.detail: Equip the medical gown, go back to the Mourner Headquarters and open the door.

atoms.label: Kill a mourner upstairs
atoms.detail: Go upstairs inside the headquarters and kill a mourner; a key is placed in your inventory automatically.

atoms.label: Unlock the caged room
atoms.detail: Use the key on the gate to get into the caged room.

atoms.label: Search the crate for the distillator
atoms.detail: Search the crate third from the left on the northern wall to find Elena's distillator.

atoms.label: Return the distillator to Elena
atoms.detail: With 3 empty inventory spaces, return to Elena and give her the distillator (via Ardougne Teleport, Skills necklace to the Fishing Guild, over the wall by Kilron, or via the Plague City sewers).

atoms.label: Walk to the Rimmington chemist
atoms.detail: Go to the chemist in south-western Rimmington (ship from Captain Barnaby at the Ardougne Dock for 30gp, or teleport).

atoms.label: Get the touch paper from the chemist
atoms.detail: Speak to the Chemist about your quest; he gives you the touch paper.

atoms.label: Give Chancy the liquid honey
atoms.detail: Find Chancy, Da Vinci and Hops around a fire outside the Chemist's house and give Chancy the vial of liquid honey.

hints.value: 2You give him the vial of liquid honey...

atoms.label: Give Da Vinci the ethenea
atoms.detail: Give Da Vinci the vial of ethenea. Giving any henchman the wrong vial forces you to redo the round with all three in Varrock before retrying.

hints.value: 1You give him the vial of ethenea...

atoms.label: Give Hops the sulphuric broline
atoms.detail: Give Hops the vial of sulphuric broline.

hints.value: 3You give him the vial of sulphuric broline...

atoms.label: Walk to the fenced area south-east of Varrock bank
atoms.detail: Teleport or travel to Varrock and head to the fenced area south-east of the bank; the guard searches you but lets the plague sample and touch paper through.

atoms.label: Get a free priest gown from Asyff (optional)
atoms.detail: (Optional) Speak to Asyff, the Fancy Dress Shop owner, in the building south-east for a free priest gown top and bottom, or buy one from him.

atoms.label: Walk to the Dancing Donkey Inn
atoms.detail: Head to the Dancing Donkey Inn to reclaim the vials.

atoms.detail: Talk to Hops to get the processed vial back; make sure you have free inventory space. Do not pass back through the Varrock gate or the vials are confiscated and you must get new samples from Elena.

atoms.label: Reclaim the vial from Chancy
atoms.detail: Talk to Chancy to get the processed vial back.

atoms.detail: Return to Ardougne and speak to Elena.

atoms.label: Walk to King Lathas' floor in Ardougne Castle
atoms.detail: Go to the first floor of Ardougne Castle.

atoms.label: Report to King Lathas to finish
atoms.detail: Speak to King Lathas to complete the quest.

checkpoints.label: Sneak the gas mask past the watchtower

steps.instruction: Complete Rag and Bone Man I
steps.detail: No requirements. Kill 8 low-level creatures for their bones (giant rat, unicorn, bear, ram, goblin, big frog, monkey, giant bat -- all reachable on a walk from Varrock through Lumbridge Swamp to Karamja), buy vinegar from Fortunato in Draynor to soak them, then boil each in a pot over a fire at the Odd Old Man's hut. Buying 27 extra vinegar jugs now (35 total) saves a trip if planning Rag and Bone Man II next; direct prerequisite for that sequel quest.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to the Odd Old Man in Silvarea to start
atoms.detail: Talk to the Odd Old Man in Silvarea, north-east of Varrock and north of the Digsite; during the conversation he mentions boiling the bones in vinegar.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.detail: Kill a ram (the forest south-east of Varrock, or Fred the Farmer's sheep pen north of Lumbridge) for a ram skull; the route walks south from the Odd Old Man through Lumbridge Swamp and finishes on Karamja.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Kill a goblin for its goblin skull
atoms.detail: Kill a goblin (east or west of Lumbridge (NOTE: the goblins at the farm south of Varrock do NOT drop this bone)) for a goblin skull; the route walks south from the Odd Old Man through Lumbridge Swamp and finishes on Karamja.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Kill a big frog for its big frog leg
atoms.detail: Kill a big frog (Lumbridge Swamp (either the level-10 or level-24 big frog)) for a big frog leg; the route walks south from the Odd Old Man through Lumbridge Swamp and finishes on Karamja.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Kill a monkey for its monkey paw
atoms.detail: Kill a monkey (west of the Karamja Volcano at the entrance to Brimhaven) for a monkey paw; the route walks south from the Odd Old Man through Lumbridge Swamp and finishes on Karamja.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Kill a giant bat for its giant bat wing
atoms.detail: Kill a giant bat (Crandor and Karamja Dungeon, reached via the Karamja Volcano) for a giant bat wing; the route walks south from the Odd Old Man through Lumbridge Swamp and finishes on Karamja.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Buy jugs of vinegar from Fortunato in Draynor
atoms.detail: Talk to Fortunato in the Draynor Village marketplace and buy 8 jugs of vinegar (buy 27 more, 35 total, now if planning to do the direct-prerequisite sequel Rag and Bone Man II, to save a trip).

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Make pots of vinegar from the jugs
atoms.detail: Use all of the jugs of vinegar with pots to make 8 pots of vinegar.

hints.value: the pots themselves have no acquisition bullet anywhere on the page; modelled as pre-existing/'??'-sourced per the Dwarf Cannon/Biohazard precedent

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Soak all 8 bones in the pots of vinegar
atoms.detail: Use each of the 8 collected bones with a pot of vinegar to make 8 bones in vinegar.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Withdraw a tinderbox and logs (or an axe) for the pot-boiler
atoms.detail: Withdraw a tinderbox and either 8 logs or an axe to chop your own, needed to fuel the pot-boiler fires back at the Odd Old Man's hut.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Return to the Odd Old Man with the logs
atoms.detail: Walk back to the Odd Old Man in Silvarea with the tinderbox and logs in your inventory.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Boil each bone in vinegar over the pot-boiler
atoms.detail: For each of the 8 bones in vinegar: place a set of logs on the pot-boiler, use the bone in vinegar with the pot-boiler, light the logs with the tinderbox, then wait 12 seconds (or hop worlds after lighting to skip the wait) and remove the finished pot from the pot-boiler.

hints.value: the page never names a distinct finished-bone item; the produced item after boiling is left '??' rather than assumed

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

atoms.label: Hand the boiled bones to the Odd Old Man to finish
atoms.detail: Talk to the Odd Old Man to hand in the boiled bones and complete the quest.

refs.title: Rag and Bone Man I/Quick guide

steps.detail: Requires beating level-69 Draugen and an unarmed/unarmoured fight vs Koschei the deathless (first 3 forms; 4th form is safe to "die" to, even on HCIM). Order: lose a drinking contest to Manni, get Hunters' Talisman from Sigli, talk Olaf, obtain a lyre (craft from swaying-tree branch via Lalli's stew quest-within-quest, or farm Lanzig's 1/17 drop). Spin golden wool in Seers' Village if crafting the lyre, buy low-alcohol keg from Poison Salesman. Back in Rellekka: use beer on council workman for strange object, enchant lyre with raw fish at a strange altar near the bridge, hunt the Draugen via talisman, light strange object and use on longhall pipe, play enchanted lyre on stage, then win the rematch drinking contest vs Manni with the low-alcohol keg swap. Sigmund/Swensen trial is a long NPC-chase-and-recall-order chain culminating in paying Askeladden 5,000 coins then repeating the NPC list in reverse order. Thorvald trial: bank everything (no weapons/armour/runes allowed), craft a dramen/celastrus staff underground, fight Koschei's first 3 forms unarmed. Peer the Seer trial: bank all bankable items, solve a riddle (each line gives one letter of a 4-letter word) then a multi-step item-transformation puzzle (bucket/jug/vase/disks/red herring) to unlock a trapdoor exit. Finish by reporting to Brundt. High spine value: gates Fremennik Isles (Neitiznot/Jatizso/Miscellania/Etceteria) sea access.

req_items.name: Raw shark, raw manta ray, or raw sea turtle
Lyre
req_items.note: drop from Lanzig/Borrokar/Lensa/Freidir, or craft with Fletching 25 + Woodcutting 40 + Crafting 40

hints.value: agility +2812, attack +2812, crafting +2812, defence +2812, fishing +2812, fletching +2812, hitpoints +2812, strength +2812, thieving +2812, woodcutting +2812
hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Brundt to start the quest
atoms.detail: Speak to Brundt in the longhall; if Mountain Daughter is started/finished the chat route differs. Fairy ring DKS then run south-west also reaches Rellekka.

atoms.detail: Only needed if you did not already bring your own beer; used later to fetch a replacement beer.

atoms.label: Talk to Sigli the Huntsman for the Hunters' Talisman

atoms.label: Chop a branch and fletch an unstrung lyre

atoms.detail: Add the three vegetables to the cauldron. NOTE: the source text also lists the already-offered pet rock as a stew ingredient in this same bullet — a wiki-side double-mention, not re-consumed here since it was already handed over in the prior step.

atoms.label: Bank everything before Thorvald's trial
atoms.detail: No weapons, armour, or runes are allowed for this fight; Seers' Village bank is close.

atoms.label: Bring a dramen/celastrus weapon, stat amulet, combat bracelet, food and potions
atoms.detail: A dramen branch (Crafting 31, Lost City started) or celastrus bark (Fletching 40) or a goblin paint cannon are the unarmed-fight weapon options; a knife is only needed for the dramen branch.

atoms.label: Talk to Thorvald north of the longhall to start
atoms.detail: Begins the Warrior's trial.

atoms.label: Cut the dramen branch into a staff (or fletch a celastrus battlestaff)
atoms.detail: Done after climbing down the ladder, only if not using a goblin paint cannon.

atoms.label: Fight Koschei the Deathless's first 3 forms unarmed
atoms.detail: No weapons/armour/runes; prayer-flicking is viable. The 4th form is optional and safe to "die" to (does not actually kill, even on Hardcore Ironman) rather than fighting it out.

atoms.label: Talk to Thorvald again to finish the trial
atoms.detail: Concludes the Warrior's trial.

atoms.label: Talk to Peer the Seer south-west of the market
atoms.detail: He automatically deposits all bankable items — anything unbankable in your inventory blocks progress.

atoms.label: Enter Peer's house and read the riddle
atoms.detail: Green-bedded house south-west of the market; the riddle's six lines each yield one letter of a 4-letter word (own-words: don't need the exact wiki phrasing, just solve line-by-line).

atoms.label: Search 4 objects for puzzle pieces
atoms.detail: South-western cupboard (bucket), unicorn head (red disk), bull head (wooden disk), southern chest (jug); a northern bookcase separately yields a red herring.

atoms.label: Use the red herring on the cooking range
atoms.detail: Produces a sticky red substance used on the wooden disk next.

atoms.label: Use the sticky red goop on the wooden disk
atoms.detail: Prepares the wooden disk before it can be used with the red disks.

atoms.label: Use both red disks on the abstract mural
atoms.detail: Open the trapdoor on the east side and climb down first.

atoms.label: Solve the bucket/jug water-measuring puzzle for the scale
atoms.detail: Composite fixed sequence: fill the bucket at the tap, pour it into the jug, empty the jug down the drain, refill the bucket, pour the full bucket into the jug a second time, then use the resulting 4/5ths-full bucket on the northern chest's scale.

atoms.label: Fill the vase with water and seal it with the lid
atoms.detail: Prepares the vase to be used on the frozen table.

atoms.label: Use the sealed vase on the frozen table
atoms.detail: Yields the frozen key needed to finish the puzzle.

atoms.label: Use the frozen key on the cooking range
atoms.detail: Final puzzle step before the exit trapdoor unlocks.

atoms.label: Climb down the eastern trapdoor and leave
atoms.detail: Puzzle solved; the house's exit door can now be opened.

atoms.label: Talk to Brundt the Chieftain to finish
atoms.detail: Reports the completed trials.

checkpoints.label: Meet the trial-givers and obtain a lyre
Prepare wool, keg, and beer in Seers' Village
Complete the Draugen, altar, and lyre trials back in Rellekka
Warrior's trial: fight Koschei the Deathless
Seer's trial: riddle and item-transformation puzzle

steps.detail: Intermediate quest requiring defeat of a level 112 Khazard warlord (safespottable). Talk to King Bolren (teleports you to the north-west corner of the maze), give Commander Montai 6 logs on the battlefield's south-west edge, then agree to help further. Talk to all 3 tracker gnomes around the Khazard Stronghold to get 4-digit ballista coordinates from riddles, then fire the south-west ballista with that code. Climb into the stronghold over the crumbled wall, ignore or kill the level 48 Khazard commanders, take an orb of protection from the upstairs chest, exit, and report to Elkoy to be sent to the village centre. Track down and kill the level 112 Khazard warlord north-west of the battlefield (safespottable near the West Ardougne wall) for the other two orbs, then return all 3 orbs to King Bolren to finish. Required for: Monkey Madness I, The Path of Glouphrie, Medium Western Provinces Diary, Medium Varrock Diary.

req_items.name: Normal logs
req_items.note: alternatively cut from goblin drops in the maze with an axe, or take from a stored canoe

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to King Bolren to start the quest
atoms.detail: Teleports you out of the maze to its north-west corner.

atoms.label: Talk to Commander Montai on the battlefield
atoms.detail: Red hat, south-west edge of the battlefield, south of the river.

atoms.label: Give Commander Montai 6 logs
atoms.detail: Hands over the requested logs for the battlefield.

atoms.label: Talk to Commander Montai a third time to agree to help further
atoms.detail: Commits to continuing the quest beyond the initial errand.

atoms.label: Talk to the second tracker gnome
atoms.detail: Building towards the east side of the Khazard Stronghold.

atoms.label: Talk to the first tracker gnome
atoms.detail: North-west of the Khazard Stronghold.

atoms.label: Talk to the third tracker gnome for the ballista code
atoms.detail: South-west corner of the Khazard Stronghold; his riddle dialogue gives the 4-digit ballista code one digit per line (exact riddle wording left "??" per the own-words rule, the code itself is player-specific).

atoms.label: Fire the south-west ballista with the given code
atoms.detail: Located in the south-west corner of the battlefield, past the bridge; enter the 4-digit code exactly as given by the third tracker gnome.

until.state: code entered per own riddle answers, value not fixed across playthroughs

atoms.label: Climb over the crumbled wall into the stronghold
atoms.detail: The building where Tracker gnome 1 was; level 48 Khazard commanders may attack and can be ignored or killed.

atoms.label: Climb the ladder, search the chest, and take the orb of protection
atoms.detail: First of the three orbs.

atoms.label: Exit through the front door and talk to Elkoy
atoms.detail: Elkoy is back in Tree Gnome Village and sends you to the centre.

atoms.label: King Bolren asks you to get the other two orbs
atoms.detail: Sends the player after the Khazard warlord.

atoms.label: Kill the level 112 Khazard warlord for the other two orbs
atoms.detail: North-west of the battlefield, outside the wall below West Ardougne, underneath the Underground Pass. Safespot by de-aggroing him west near a large dead tree, then attacking from range/magic while he's boxed between the wall and the tree; melee players can step in and out of his walking range instead.

atoms.label: Return all 3 orbs to King Bolren to finish
atoms.detail: Concludes the quest.

checkpoints.label: Start the quest and deliver logs to Commander Montai
Get the ballista code from the three tracker gnomes
Get the orbs of protection and defeat the Khazard warlord

steps.detail: Very short early quest, beats level-34 Count Draynor (safespottable, high healing - garlic weakens him and is strongly recommended). Talk Morgan, grab garlic from his upstairs cupboard. Travel to the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock, buy a beer, talk Dr Harlow twice for a stake, buy a hammer from the general store just north of the inn. Head to Draynor Manor basement (east stairs, not the west room), open the coffin and kill Count Draynor with combat gear (hammer/stake just need to be in inventory, not actively used). Free F2P quest, low reqs, no known deeper dependency chain.

req_items.name: Hammer
req_items.note: costs 1 coin at the general store north of the Blue Moon Inn

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Morgan in Draynor Village
atoms.detail: Accept the quest from Morgan to start.

atoms.label: Take garlic from the cupboard upstairs
atoms.detail: Go upstairs in Morgan's house and take garlic from the cupboard.

atoms.label: Talk to Dr Harlow at the Blue Moon Inn
atoms.detail: Speak to Dr Harlow at the Blue Moon Inn in Varrock, south of Varrock Centre, about the vampyre threat.

hints.value: 1I need your help dealing with a vampyre.

atoms.label: Buy a beer at the Blue Moon Inn
atoms.detail: Buy a beer at the bar if you do not already have one.

atoms.label: Talk to Dr Harlow again for a stake
atoms.detail: Speak to Dr Harlow a second time to receive a stake.

atoms.label: Buy a hammer from the general store
atoms.detail: Buy a hammer from the general store just north of the Blue Moon Inn.

atoms.label: Travel to Draynor Manor
atoms.detail: Bring combat gear (food recommended), garlic, hammer, and stake to Draynor Manor.

atoms.label: Go to the basement via the east stairs
atoms.detail: Descend to the basement using the east stairs, not the west room.

atoms.label: Open the coffin in the basement
atoms.detail: Open the coffin to confront Count Draynor.

atoms.label: Kill Count Draynor
atoms.detail: Defeat Count Draynor with your combat gear; the hammer and stake only need to be carried in your inventory, not actively used.

checkpoints.label: Get supplies from Dr Harlow and the general store
Defeat Count Draynor at Draynor Manor

steps.detail: Intermediate quest requiring the ability to withstand/evade level 86 Fire Giants and a level 84 Moss Guardian with no equipment (Glarial's Tomb bans gear). Talk to Almera, raft to the island, talk to Hudon then Hadley, find a Book on Baxtorian in an upstairs bookcase and read it. Enter the Tree Gnome Village maze/dungeon (worth starting Tree Gnome Village here too), find a key in a crate, unlock the west gate, and get Glarial's pebble from Golrie (keep it banked for Roving Elves later). Bank everything except the pebble, food, and a teleport method, use the pebble on Glarial's Tombstone east of the Waterfall to enter, and retrieve Glarial's amulet and urn from the tomb. Return with rope + 6 air/water/earth runes + amulet + urn: cross the raft/rope route into the waterfall dungeon, unlock the door past the Fire Giants, place one of each rune on 3 pillars, wear the amulet at Glarial's statue to raise the ground, then pour the urn into the chalice to finish. Required for: Desert Treasure I, Legends' Quest, Medium Kandarin Diary, Roving Elves, The Path of Glouphrie.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Almera north-east of Baxtorian Falls
atoms.detail: Games-necklace teleport to Barbarian Outpost then head south up the hill to reach her.

atoms.label: Board the raft west of the house
Talk to Hudon
atoms.detail: Go through the full dialogue or the book you need next won't spawn.

hints.value: Must exhaust all dialogue options or the Book on Baxtorian never appears.

atoms.label: Walk to the southern end of the island and swim across the water
Enter the large building to the north where Hadley is
Search the southernmost bookcase upstairs on the eastern wall
Read the Book on Baxtorian, then close it again
atoms.detail: Closing it is required or the key needed for the next part won't appear.

atoms.label: Enter the Tree Gnome Village maze

hints.value: If Tree Gnome Village isn't started yet, start it here too to avoid redoing the maze later.

atoms.label: Enter the dungeon at the end of the maze
Search the off-coloured crate east of the dungeon entrance for a key
Go west and unlock the gate with the key
Talk to Golrie
atoms.detail: He gives you Glarial's pebble.

hints.value: Worth keeping the pebble banked afterward — Roving Elves needs it too.

atoms.label: Bank everything except Glarial's pebble, food, and a teleport method
atoms.detail: Anything not "peaceful" (runes) blocks tomb entry; jewellery including combat-bonus jewellery is fine. Keep at least 2 free inventory slots.

hints.value: Ultimate Ironmen: a table in Hadley's building can hold items temporarily instead.

atoms.label: Head to Glarial's Tombstone east of the Waterfall
Use the pebble on the tombstone to enter the tomb
atoms.detail: The pebble isn't consumed by this.

atoms.label: Search the chest to the west for Glarial's amulet

hints.value: You can pick up an extra amulet or two by dropping and re-picking it up.

atoms.label: Go the other way and search the tomb for Glarial's urn
Withdraw 6 air runes, 6 water runes, 6 earth runes, a rope, food, Glarial's amulet, and Glarial's urn
atoms.detail: Weapons and armour can come back too if you left them.

atoms.label: Head back to Baxtorian Falls and board the raft again
Use the rope on the rock south across the water
atoms.detail: Do not get in the barrel here.

atoms.label: Use the rope on the dead tree
atoms.detail: Completes the rope route into the waterfall dungeon.

atoms.label: Carry or equip Glarial's amulet and enter the doorway
Take the right path and search the northernmost crates for a key
Go back and take the left side, avoiding the fire giants

hints.value: Killing a fire giant here is a medium Kandarin Diary task, if you want it.

atoms.label: Unlock the door with the key
Place one air, one water, and one earth rune on each of the 3 pillars
atoms.detail: 6 of each rune are recommended as a buffer since checking whether a rune type is already placed uses one up too.

atoms.label: Put Glarial's amulet on her statue
atoms.detail: The ground rises up to the chalice.

hints.value: Do not click "Take treasure" here or you'll be washed out of the cave.

atoms.label: Pour Glarial's urn into the chalice
atoms.detail: Make sure you have 5 free inventory slots; completes the quest.

checkpoints.label: Retrieve Glarial's pebble from the gnome dungeon
Raid Glarial's tomb for the amulet and urn
Solve the waterfall dungeon and finish at the chalice

steps.detail: Hetty the witch wants help brewing a potion. Gather four ingredients: kill a rat in the archery shop west of Hetty for a rat's tail, buy an eye of newt from Betty (3gp), kill a giant rat at the chapel south of Port Sarim for raw rat meat and burn it on Hetty's fireplace, and pick an onion from the field north of Rimmington. Bring all four to Hetty and drink from her cauldron to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Hetty in her house in Rimmington
atoms.detail: Ask Hetty about a quest and agree to help her become one with her darker side.

hints.value: 1 I am in search of a quest.
1 Yes, help me become one with my darker side.

atoms.label: Kill a rat in the archery store west of Hetty's house
atoms.detail: Kill a rat inside the archery shop directly west of Hetty's house for a rat's tail.

atoms.label: Buy an eye of newt from Betty (3gp)
atoms.detail: Purchase one eye of newt from Betty's shop for 3 coins.

atoms.label: Travel to the chapel south of Port Sarim
atoms.detail: Head to the small chapel south of Port Sarim to find a giant rat.

atoms.label: Kill the giant rat at the chapel for raw rat meat
atoms.detail: Defeat the giant rat inside the chapel and take the raw rat meat it drops.

atoms.label: Run back to Hetty's house in Rimmington
atoms.detail: Return to Hetty's house carrying the raw rat meat.

atoms.label: Burn the raw rat meat on Hetty's fireplace
atoms.detail: Use the raw rat meat on Hetty's fireplace to burn it; if it cooks instead of burning, use it on the fireplace again to burn it properly.

hints.value: Wiki does not name the burnt meat product item; left as "??" rather than guessed.

atoms.label: Pick an onion from the field north of Rimmington
atoms.detail: Harvest one onion from the field patch north of Rimmington.

atoms.label: Talk to Hetty carrying all four items
atoms.detail: Bring the rat's tail, eye of newt, burnt rat meat, and onion to Hetty; she starts brewing once all four are delivered.

hints.value: Wiki does not state whether the items are handed over on this talk or when drinking the cauldron; modeled here as that is the described exchange point.

atoms.label: Drink from Hetty's cauldron
atoms.detail: Drink the finished potion from the cauldron to complete Witch's Potion.
