hints.note: Crabs stay viable to level 70 per the wiki; cannon/chinning are faster but not required.

methods.method: Cannon tasks for fast Ranged XP
methods.location: Wherever the current Slayer task sends the player
methods.notes: Matches the page's 'Cannoning with Slayer' pick: passive Ranged xp from the cannon while training Slayer, totalling roughly 2-4 million by level 99 Slayer; no per-band rate is given.

methods.method: Crabs (sand, rock, swamp, ammonite or gemstone)
methods.location: Various crab spots (Hosidius, Rellekka, Port Phasmatys, Fossil Island, Varlamore)
methods.notes: Page explicitly extends this afk crab method's viability up to level 70; no hourly xp figure is given.

methods.location: Kruk's Dungeon, Ape Atoll
methods.notes: Page's fastest method here: 360,000 xp/hr with plain chinchompas at level 55 (430,000 with red chinchompas), using top gear and Rigour.

methods.method: Dwarf multicannon on ogres or ice trolls
methods.location: Ogres east of Castle Wars, or ice trolls north of Jatizso
methods.notes: Page's active-cannoning pick, about 40,000 xp/hr from the cannon on ogres; the ice troll variant needs The Fremennik Trials and only pays for its cannonballs via drops.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw ranged-training loadout
atoms.detail: Best available darts/bow+arrows, food ??x.

atoms.label: Go to Sand Crabs (Hosidius south coast)
atoms.detail: Crabs stay viable to level 70 per the wiki; cannon/chinning are faster but not required (matches existing hint on the coarse row).

atoms.label: Kill Sand Crabs until Ranged 70
atoms.detail: Rosewood Blowpipe available from Ranged 65 if owned; not required.

hints.note: Crabs stay viable to level 70 per the wiki; cannon/chinning are faster but not required.

steps.detail: Synthetic step — no matching step found in bank.

methods.location: Kruk's Dungeon, Ape Atoll
methods.notes: Page's fastest Ranged method overall, matching the route's existing pick. Level 70 isn't a table row; the bracketing figures are 470,000-690,000 xp/hr at level 65 and 570,000-830,000 xp/hr at level 75 depending on chinchompa type, rising to 740,000-1,030,000 xp/hr at level 99.

methods.location: Pest Control minigame (Void Knight Outpost)
methods.notes: Alternate method spending Void Knight commendation points on Ranged xp; page gives 76,600 xp/hr at level 70-73 with no Combat Achievement point bonus, scaling up to 157,100 xp/hr at level 98-99 with the hard-tier bonus. A combat level of 100 is recommended (not required) for the veteran boat.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Tropical Wagtails (bird snares, two traps at level 20) / Bird house trapping / Feldip weasels / Red crabs.

methods.method: Tropical Wagtails (bird snares, two traps at level 20)
methods.location: Feldip Hills
methods.notes: Row's continuity method; not named anywhere on the current page's 9-29 method list.

methods.location: Fossil Island
methods.notes: Page states this passive method is a lot better than active training at lower levels and offers the fastest real-time Hunter xp for the majority of the early game.

methods.location: Feldip Hunter area
methods.notes: Track with a noose wand and rings of pursuit; ~13,000 xp/hr per the page.

methods.location: The Pandemonium
methods.notes: Overlaps the tail of this band (21-29); page states 31,000 xp/hr with two traps, needs partial Pandemonium plus Construction 10 to build traps.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw Hunter loadout
atoms.detail: Noose wand + rings of pursuit equipped/inventoried for tracking; box-trap materials (hammer, saw, 2 planks, 4 nails, 2 buckets, fish offcuts) held for the later Pandemonium phase.

atoms.label: Go to the Feldip Hunter area
atoms.detail: Feldip Hills teleport scroll, then run south near the dungeon icon; tile ??.

atoms.label: Catch Feldip weasels until Hunter 15
atoms.detail: Inspect a burrow to start tracking, follow the trail, attack the revealed bush to catch the kebbit, repeat.

hints.note: Kebbit can escape mid-track.

atoms.label: Go to the Piscatoris Hunter area
atoms.detail: Bird-snaring ground for copper longtails; tile ??.

atoms.label: Trap copper longtails (ruby harvests) until Hunter 21
atoms.detail: Combine with butterfly netting on the same ground for a higher xp/hr per the wiki's own note.

atoms.label: Go to The Pandemonium
atoms.detail: Requires partial completion of the Pandemonium quest and 10 Construction to build the crab traps -- verify both are met at this route position before relying on this leg (fallback ?? if not).

atoms.label: Trap Red crabs until Hunter 29
atoms.detail: Build 2 traps next to each other, bait with fish offcuts, bank crabs at a nearby bank.

atoms.label: Bank: deposit Hunter catch
atoms.detail: Deposit trapped crabs/kebbit byproducts.

steps.detail: Speak to the Lumbridge Cook to begin Recipe for Disaster. Unlock the 10-person banquet table.

mapMarkers.label: The Cook, Lumbridge Castle kitchen (start, same room as Cook's Assistant)

hints.note: start: ask what he needs for the centennial feast
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

media.caption: Lumbridge Castle kitchen: the Cook (Recipe for Disaster start / RFD sub-quest assignment)
Player beside the Cook; talk to him to start RFD or pick up the next sub-quest

atoms.label: Talk to the Cook in Lumbridge Castle's kitchen to start
atoms.detail: The Cook explains he needs four items for the centennial feast and hands over 100 coins (keep the change) to gather them.

hints.note: opening exchange asking what he needs for the feast; exact option text not stated on this chapter's own page

atoms.label: Buy an eye of newt
atoms.detail: Buy an eye of newt from any Herblore shop or from Betty's Magic Emporium in Port Sarim.

atoms.label: Buy a glass of greenman's ale at the Dragon Inn
atoms.detail: The Dragon Inn bar in Yanille sells greenman's ale for 10 coins.

atoms.label: Buy a rotten tomato
atoms.detail: Buy a rotten tomato for 1 coin from a Pelters' Veg Stall near the pillory cages in Varrock, Seers' Village, Yanille or Hosidius, or from the Shop of Distaste at the Emir's Arena.

atoms.label: Travel to Grand Tree Groceries
atoms.detail: Head to the north-west corner of the Grand Tree's first floor to reach Hudo's grocery stall, the fastest gather/produce route to a fruit blast.

atoms.label: Buy fruit-blast ingredients from Hudo
atoms.detail: Buy two lemons, one pineapple and one orange from Hudo at Grand Tree Groceries.

atoms.label: Mix a fruit blast in the cocktail shaker
atoms.detail: Pick up the cocktail shaker spawn on the table, mix in the fruit and select Fruit Blast, then slice the remaining lemon with a knife and pour the shaker into a cocktail glass (spawn found near Heckel Funch) to finish the fruit blast.

atoms.label: Burn logs for ashes
atoms.detail: Light a set of logs with a tinderbox (or loot ashes from an elemental wizard) to obtain the ashes needed for the dirty blast.

atoms.label: Make the dirty blast
atoms.detail: Use the ashes on the fruit blast to turn it into a dirty blast. A premade fr' blast will not work as a substitute.

atoms.label: Hand the Cook all four ingredients
atoms.detail: Give the eye of newt, greenman's ale, rotten tomato and dirty blast to the Cook to finish gathering.

atoms.label: Enter the dining room to open the feast
atoms.detail: Walk into the Lumbridge Castle dining room; this both completes Another Cook's Quest and unlocks the rest of Recipe for Disaster's council-member chapters.

checkpoints.label: Deliver the items and open the feast

steps.detail: Novice quest gating a shortcut through White Wolf Mountain. Talk to either dwarf guarding the mountain's tunnel entrances (starting on the west side is faster on foot). Grab garlic from a house south-west of the Seers' Village bank if needed, take a spade to McGrubor's Wood and dig up 3 red vine worms from the vine just west of fairy ring ALS. Head to Hemenster, buy a fishing rod from Grandpa Jack if you don't have one, enter with the fishing pass, put garlic in the north pipes (finish the dialogue), pay Bonzo 5 coins and start fishing once the Sinister Stranger clears the pipes. After winning the contest, bring the trophy back to the dwarf to finish. Required for: Recipe for Disaster (Freeing the Mountain Dwarf), Forgettable Tale..., Between a Rock..., Land of the Goblins.

req_items.name: Coins
req_items.note: 10 if buying a rod from Jack

req_items.name: Fishing rod or pearl fishing rod
req_items.note: oily fishing rod does not work

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to a dwarf guarding either White Wolf Mountain tunnel entrance
atoms.detail: Either dwarf works; starting on the west side is a shorter walk afterward.

hints.value: I was wondering what was down those stairs? -> Why not? -> If you were my friend I wouldn't mind it. -> Well, let's be friends! -> And how am I meant to do that?

atoms.label: Grab garlic from the Seers' Village house table if you don't already have any
atoms.detail: Spawns on a table in a house south-west of the Seers' Village bank.

atoms.label: Head to McGrubor's Wood with a spade
atoms.detail: Enter through the back, or fairy-ring to ALS if at least half of Fairytale II - Cure a Queen is complete.

atoms.label: Collect red vine worms from the vine west of fairy ring ALS
atoms.detail: Check the vine repeatedly until 3 worms are collected.

atoms.label: Travel to Hemenster
atoms.detail: Walk south from McGrubor's Wood, or teleport via combat bracelet to the Ranging Guild and go north-west.

atoms.label: Buy a fishing rod from Grandpa Jack if you don't have one
atoms.detail: Grandpa Jack sells rods just outside the Hemenster entrance.

atoms.label: Enter Hemenster and put garlic in the north pipes
atoms.detail: Must finish the resulting dialogue for it to register.

atoms.label: Pay Bonzo 5 coins to enter the contest
atoms.detail: Wait for the Sinister Stranger to move away from the pipes before he'll let you fish.

atoms.label: Fish until the contest ends and you win the trophy
atoms.detail: Exact catch/time condition to trigger the win is not specified by the guide.

atoms.label: Return to the dwarf and show him the trophy
atoms.detail: Completes the quest.

checkpoints.label: Talk to the dwarf and gather worms/rod supplies
Reach Hemenster and get past the Sinister Stranger
Win the contest and turn in the trophy

steps.detail: Talk to the Squire in the White Knights' Castle courtyard about his lost ceremonial sword. Talk to Reldo in the Varrock Palace library about the Imcando dwarves (skip if Thurgo was already met via The Giant Dwarf). Find Thurgo south of Port Sarim near the anvil (north of fairy ring AIQ) and give him a redberry pie, talk to him again, then return to the Squire. Climb to the White Knights' Castle 1st floor, go west and up the east staircase, and search the cupboard in Sir Vyvin's bedroom for a portrait while he isn't looking. Bring the portrait (and iron bars) to Thurgo. Enter the Asgarnian Ice Dungeon via the trapdoor east of Thurgo, follow the path west/north/east, and mine blurite ore along the southern wall of the icy area (mine a second if doing the Falador easy diary). Give Thurgo the iron bars and blurite ore to forge the replacement sword, then deliver the sword to the Squire to finish.

req_items.name: Redberry pie
req_items.note: must be a whole pie, not half

req_items.name: Iron bars
req_items.note: base amount to forge the Squire's replacement sword

req_items.name: Iron bars (extra)
req_items.note: only needed if you want your own personal blurite sword (4 total)

req_items.name: Blurite ore
req_items.note: mined in-quest at the Asgarnian Ice Dungeon

req_items.name: Blurite ore (extra)
req_items.note: only needed for a spare sword and/or the Falador easy diary task

req_items.name: Pickaxe
req_items.note: a free pickaxe spawns in Rimmington

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to the Squire about the lost ceremonial sword
atoms.detail: The Squire, in the White Knights' Castle courtyard, explains the sword needs replacing.

hints.value: 1And how is life as a squire?
2I can make a new sword if you like...
1So would these dwarves make another one?

atoms.label: Ask Reldo about the Imcando dwarves
atoms.detail: Reldo, in the Varrock Palace library, points toward Thurgo; skip this if Thurgo was already met during The Giant Dwarf.

hints.value: 2. What do you know about the Imcando dwarfs?
Option shifts to number 4 if Shield of Arrav has not been started.

atoms.label: Give Thurgo a redberry pie
atoms.detail: Thurgo works south of Port Sarim by the anvil, north of fairy ring AIQ.

hints.value: Option shifts to number 3 if The Giant Dwarf is in progress.

atoms.label: Talk to Thurgo again
atoms.detail: Continue the conversation with Thurgo.

atoms.label: Report back to the Squire
atoms.detail: Return and update the Squire on progress.

atoms.label: Climb to Sir Vyvin's bedroom in the castle
atoms.detail: Climb the eastern ladder to the 1st floor, go west, then up the eastern staircase to reach the bedroom.

atoms.label: Search the cupboard for Sir Vyvin's portrait
atoms.detail: He must not be looking at you when the cupboard is searched.

atoms.label: Give Thurgo the portrait
atoms.detail: Also bring iron bars along for the forging step that follows.

atoms.label: Enter the Asgarnian Ice Dungeon
atoms.detail: Use the trapdoor east of Thurgo, then follow the path west, north, then east to the icy area.

atoms.label: Mine blurite ore along the icy area's southern wall
atoms.detail: Mine a second blurite ore too if planning to also complete the Falador Easy Diary.

atoms.label: Give Thurgo the iron bars and blurite ore to forge the sword
atoms.detail: Thurgo forges the replacement sword once both materials are handed over.

hints.value: 1Can you make that replacement sword now?

atoms.label: Deliver the finished sword to the Squire
atoms.detail: Hand over the replacement sword to complete the quest.

steps.detail: Short intro quest that unlocks the Giants' Foundry minigame; only real requirement is 15 Smithing. Repair 3 broken machines inside the giant-sized workshop (polishing wheel, grindstone, trip hammer) using found parts, then forge one sword start to finish: pick the 3 correctly-shaped mould pieces (forte/blade/tip), pour molten metal from the crucible, cool/heat the preform on the waterfall and lava pool, and alternate trip-hammer -> grindstone -> polishing-wheel passes while watching the heat gauge (working outside the right heat band lowers sword quality).

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Minigame-teleport to the Giants' Foundry
atoms.detail: Use the Minigame Teleport option to travel directly to Giants' Foundry.

atoms.label: Talk to Kovac at the Giants' Plateau
atoms.detail: Speak to Kovac, who is striking a Hill Giant on the Giants' Plateau, to begin.

atoms.label: Enter the Giants' Foundry
atoms.detail: Walk inside the Giants' Foundry building.

atoms.label: Repair the polishing wheel
atoms.detail: Use the required repair items on the broken polishing wheel; the exact item-to-machine split isn't spelt out — bring the full needed list (oak logs, wool, nails, hammer, chisel, bucket of water or ice gloves).

hints.value: per-machine item split not stated by the fetched text

atoms.label: Repair the grindstone
atoms.detail: Use the required repair items on the broken grindstone.

atoms.label: Repair the trip hammer
atoms.detail: Use the required repair items on the broken trip hammer.

atoms.label: Talk to Kovac twice
atoms.detail: Speak to Kovac twice in a row to proceed.

atoms.label: Search the crate for items
atoms.detail: Search the nearby crate to find items to deposit into the crucible; the crate's exact contents aren't named on the fetched page.

atoms.label: Deposit the found items into the crucible
atoms.detail: Deposit everything found into the crucible (large bucket) hanging east near the bank; different item types are deposited separately.

atoms.label: Talk to Kovac to learn mould selection
atoms.detail: Speak to Kovac, who explains how to pick the correct moulds shown in red text.

atoms.label: Select the forte, blade and tip moulds at the mould jig
atoms.detail: Pick the three correctly-shaped mould pieces (forte, blade, tip) that Kovac described at the mould jig.

atoms.label: Talk to Kovac again to learn pouring
atoms.detail: Speak to Kovac again; he explains how to pour the metal.

atoms.label: Pour molten metal from the crucible into the mould
atoms.detail: Pour the metal from the crucible into the assembled mould.

atoms.label: Cool the poured sword with water
atoms.detail: Fill a bucket from the pile and use it on the waterfall, then pour it on the sword (or use ice gloves instead) — hands must be free to then pick up the preform.

atoms.label: Heat the preform to maximum on the lava pool
atoms.detail: Use the preform on the lava pool; Heat-preform raises heat in small increments while Dunk-preform heats it faster. Aim for maximum (red) heat.

atoms.label: Hammer the preform on the trip hammer
atoms.detail: Hit the preform with the repaired trip hammer, repeating until the progress bar reaches the yellow section; keep the temperature in the red band, since the hammer cools the preform and working outside the right heat band lowers sword quality.

atoms.label: Cool the preform in the waterfall
atoms.detail: Cool the preform at the waterfall until its temperature is almost green; Cool-preform is slow, Quench-preform is faster.

atoms.label: Grind the preform on the grindstone
atoms.detail: Use the preform on the repaired grindstone, repeating until progress reaches the green section; watch the temperature, since the grindstone reheats the preform.

atoms.label: Cool the preform in the waterfall again
atoms.detail: Cool the preform at the waterfall until its temperature is high green.

atoms.label: Polish the preform on the polishing wheel
atoms.detail: Use the preform on the polishing wheel, repeating until the sword is complete; watch the temperature, since the wheel cools the preform.

atoms.label: Talk to Kovac to finish the quest
atoms.detail: Speak to Kovac to hand in the finished sword and complete Sleeping Giants.

checkpoints.label: Forge the sword start to finish

steps.detail: Pick a method: Oak trees / Quest experience.

media.caption: Willow tree (Chop down) at Draynor Village — train-woodcutting-30

methods.location: Draynor Village, Seers' Village, Varrock, Falador, or Hosidius, near a bank
methods.notes: The page keeps recommending oak past level 30 too, saying oak edges out willow on xp rate all the way to level 35.

methods.location: Monk's Friend, Enlightened Journey, Icthlarin's Little Helper, Recipe for Disaster (Skrach Uglogwee)
methods.notes: The same quest batch that carries level 1-15 continues to cover this band up to level 26 before oak chopping is needed to close the gap to 30.

atoms.label: Equip best available hatchet
atoms.detail: Equip (or withdraw+equip) the best hatchet your Attack/Woodcutting level allows.

atoms.label: Go to the Draynor Village oak trees
atoms.detail: Draynor Village, tile (3088,3255) per the route's own map pin; bank is adjacent.

atoms.label: Chop oak logs until Woodcutting 30
atoms.detail: Bank oak logs -- this run's stock is the non-GE source for the very next band (train-firemaking-30 burns these).

hints.note: Bank extra oak logs beyond what's needed here -- xref: pays off at train-firemaking-30, next in route order.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Iron ore drop-mining (triangle spots) / Tick-manipulated iron (3-tick) / Skip via quest xp rewards.

media.caption: Iron rocks (Mine) at the Al Kharid mine — train-mining-30

methods.location: Any of the 16 three-rock iron triangle sites, e.g. Al Kharid Mine or Legends' Guild Mine
methods.notes: Page states ~45,000-55,000 xp/hr for iron below level 60 as one combined figure, not broken out per band; Varrock armour 2+ adds a 10% chance of a double ore.

methods.location: Legends' Guild Mine or Isle of Souls mine (4-rock clusters)
methods.notes: Faster than plain drop-mining but click-intensive; page recommends it mainly as practice for later granite tick manipulation.

methods.location: Doric's Quest, The Dig Site, Plague City, The Giant Dwarf, The Lost Tribe, Another Slice of H.A.M.
methods.notes: Same six-quest package as the prior band; its 27,525 xp lump carries a player through level 30 on the way to level 37.

atoms.label: Equip: best available pickaxe
atoms.detail: No food needed for this AFK-adjacent method; no-bank checkpoint (ore is dropped, not carried).

atoms.label: Go to Al Kharid Mine
atoms.detail: One of 16 wiki-listed iron-triangle spots (three iron rocks in reach without moving); tile ??.

atoms.label: Mine iron ore until Mining 30
atoms.detail: Mine the triangle, drop each ore, repeat -- banking iron ore is not worth the time per the wiki's own advice at this level range.

hints.note: Dropping ore beats banking for xp/hr below level 60 per the wiki's own guidance.

steps.instruction: Mine volcanic ash at Fossil Island
steps.detail: Mine volcanic ash from the ash piles on Fossil Island. Used to make ultracompost. Loop during farm-run downtime.

mapMarkers.label: Fossil Island Volcano (ash-pile mining site, per infobox map marker)

hints.value: 1 ash/pile at lvl22, +1 per 15 levels to 6 at lvl97
hints.note: Volcanic_ash s3: yield scales with Mining level, 1 ash at 22, +1 every 15 levels (37=2,52=3,67=4,82=5,97=6). Mining enhancers (Varrock armour, mining cape, mining gloves) do NOT affect yield (Mod Ash, cited on-page). 'At high Mining levels, possible to obtain over 6,500 ash per hour.'
Step's own detail says 'Loop during farm-run downtime' -- consistent with U7 semi-atomic farm-run pattern.

media.caption: Ash pile (Mine) on the Fossil Island volcano rim — gather-volcanic-ash

steps.detail: Help Dr Fenkenstrain build a monster: read two books for a memorial-opening amulet, dig up a head in the vampyre-infested Haunted Woods, kill an Experiment in the Experiment Cave for body parts, sew the parts together, get a shed key from the Gardener Ghost, extend a garden brush for a conductor mould, smelt a silver bar into a conductor at a furnace, repair the castle's lightning conductor to power the monster, then pickpocket Fenkenstrain for the ring of charos once the monster is animated.

req_items.name: 50 coins
req_items.note: or 1 law rune + 1 air rune, for Telekinetic Grab

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Start the quest via the Canifis signpost or Dr Fenkenstrain
atoms.detail: The signpost is in the centre of Canifis.

atoms.label: Get a pickled brain from the Canifis tavern table
atoms.detail: Costs 50gp, or lift it with Telekinetic Grab.

atoms.label: Talk to Dr Fenkenstrain inside Fenkenstrain's Castle
Read "The Joy Of Grave Digging" in the west bookcase upstairs
Read "Handy Maggot Avoidance Techniques" in the east bookcase upstairs
Combine the marble amulet and obsidian amulet into the star amulet
Dig the cross-shaped grave marker in the Haunted Woods for a decapitated head
atoms.detail: South-east of Fenkenstrain's castle, immediately east of the alq fairy ring; the woods are infested with vampyres, so bring a holy symbol and food at low levels.

atoms.label: Combine the decapitated head and the pickled brain
Head north out of the Haunted Woods and use the star amulet on the easternmost memorial
atoms.detail: South-east of Fenkenstrain's castle.

atoms.label: Push the memorial to enter the Experiment Cave
Kill a level-51 Experiment for the cavern key
atoms.detail: If Rag and Bone Man II is started, also kill the level-25 Experiments for an Experiment bone.

atoms.label: Follow the north-western path to the end of the cave
Search the chest and climb the ladder
Dig the three graves for a torso, arms, and legs
Return to Dr Fenkenstrain and give him the body parts
atoms.detail: Fenkenstrain's Castle teleport works here.

hints.value: 1I have some body parts for you.

atoms.label: Talk to Dr Fenkenstrain again to give him the needle and thread
Talk to the Gardener Ghost for the shed key
atoms.detail: Requires an equipped ghostspeak amulet.

hints.value: 2Do you know where the key to the shed is?

atoms.label: Search the cupboard inside the shed for a garden brush
Take 3 canes from the pile next to the shed
Use all 3 canes on the garden brush to extend it
atoms.detail: Uses a total of 3 bronze wires.

atoms.label: Use the extended brush on the western fireplace upstairs for a conductor mould
Smelt a silver bar into a conductor (lightning rod)
atoms.detail: Nearest furnace is Port Phasmatys; alternatives are Falador, fairy ring to Zanaris, amulet of glory to Al Kharid, or Home Teleport to Lumbridge.

atoms.label: Climb to the lightning conductor and repair it
atoms.detail: Go upstairs then climb the southern ladder.

atoms.label: Return to Dr Fenkenstrain and talk to him
Go upstairs through the metal door and climb the northern ladder to talk to Fenkenstrain's monster
Go downstairs and pickpocket the doctor for the ring of charos

steps.detail: Find the chieftain's missing daughter for the isolated Mountain Camp tribe: pole-vault and mud-climb a wilderness route to a talking magic pool, broker peace between the camp and Rellekka (mine a sample of ancient rock, get safe passage), find a hardy food plant on White Wolf Mountain, then kill The Kendal (level 70, melee-only, safespottable) in a cave to recover the daughter's remains and give her a proper burial.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Travel to the Mountain Camp entrance east of Rellekka
atoms.detail: Head to the entrance of the mountain camp, east of Rellekka or north of the ajr fairy ring.

atoms.label: Push past the guard using your rope on the boulder
atoms.detail: Take the path north past the guard, then use a rope on the boulder blocking the way to push it aside and continue.

atoms.label: Talk to Hamal the Chieftain and offer to search for his daughter
atoms.detail: Enter the camp and speak with Hamal the Chieftain, who explains the crisis; agree to search for his missing daughter.

hints.value: Why is everyone so hostile? -> So what are you doing up here? -> I will search for her! (option numbering shifts if The Fremennik Trials is completed)

atoms.label: Dig mud from the pond south of Hamal's house
atoms.detail: Dig some mud from the mud pond just south of Hamal's house; it is used to climb the tall tree ahead.

atoms.label: Take a pole north of Hamal's house if you lack a staff
atoms.detail: If you don't already have a staff, pick up a pole just north of Hamal's house; keep it for the rest of the quest to pole-vault obstacles.

hints.value: optional -- only needed if you don't already have a staff

atoms.label: Follow the path along the lake westward
atoms.detail: Head north from Hamal's house and follow the path along the lake to the west, toward the climbing tree.

atoms.label: Use mud on the tall tree and climb it
atoms.detail: Use the mud on the tall tree to make it climbable, then climb it; you never need to re-mud it for later climbs.

atoms.label: Pole-vault the clump of rocks with your pole or staff
atoms.detail: Use your pole or staff on the clump of rocks ahead to pole-vault across the gap.

atoms.label: Cross the flat stones using your plank
atoms.detail: Use your plank on the flat stones to bridge the gap; keep the plank for the rest of the quest.

atoms.label: Listen to the shining pool and agree to help
atoms.detail: Listen to the shining pool, which explains the situation further, and agree to help it.

hints.value: Hello! Who are you? -> So what exactly do you want from me? -> That sounds like something I can do. -> I'll get right on it.

atoms.label: Return to shore across the flat stone with your plank
atoms.detail: Use your plank on the flat stone again to cross back to the mainland shore.

atoms.label: Ask Hamal about the people of Rellekka
atoms.detail: Talk to Hamal the Chieftain about the people of Rellekka to learn why the camp distrusts them.

hints.value: About the people of Rellekka... -> Why do you hate them so much?
Both of Asleif's tasks (Rellekka peace and a new food source) can be started together to save trips back to the camp -- talk to Jokul before leaving for Svidi.

atoms.label: Talk to Jokul north of the Chieftain's tent before leaving
atoms.detail: Speak to Jokul, just north of the Chieftain's tent, before heading out to look for Svidi.

atoms.label: Search for Svidi between Rellekka and the Keldagrim entrance
atoms.detail: Find and talk to Svidi, who is searching somewhere between Rellekka and the entrance to Keldagrim.

hints.value: Can't I persuade you to go in there somehow?

atoms.label: Ask Brundt the Chieftain about the mountain camp
atoms.detail: Go to Rellekka and talk to Brundt the Chieftain in the longhall about the mountain camp.

hints.value: Ask about the mountain camp. -> Did it contain vast magical powers? (option numbering shifts if Lunar Diplomacy is started or completed)

atoms.label: Return to the Mountain Camp's southern tent
atoms.detail: Go back to the Mountain Camp and enter the large tent south-west of Hamal the Chieftain.

atoms.label: Mine the Ancient Rock in the southern tent for a rock sample
atoms.detail: Use your pickaxe on the Ancient Rock in the southern tent to obtain half a rock sample.

atoms.label: Optionally mine Rellekka coal for a diary task
atoms.detail: While still holding the pickaxe, optionally mine some coal in the Rellekka mine to progress a Fremennik diary task (requires The Fremennik Trials completed).

hints.value: optional -- Fremennik diary task, requires The Fremennik Trials

atoms.label: Show Brundt the rock sample for safe passage
atoms.detail: Take the rock sample back to Rellekka and talk to Brundt the Chieftain, who grants a guarantee of safe passage.

hints.value: Ask about the mountain camp. (option numbering shifts if Lunar Diplomacy is started or completed)

atoms.label: Give the guarantee of safe passage to Svidi
atoms.detail: Deliver the guarantee of safe passage to Svidi; no need to check back on her afterward.

atoms.label: Report back to Hamal about the Rellekka peace deal
atoms.detail: Return to Hamal the Chieftain and tell him the peace arrangement with Rellekka is complete.

atoms.label: Ask Hamal about the camp's food supplies
atoms.detail: Talk to Hamal the Chieftain again, this time about the camp's food supplies.

hints.value: About your food supplies... -> Never mind.

atoms.label: Ask Jokul about the White Pearl plant
atoms.detail: Talk to Jokul, just north of Hamal, who tells you of a very hardy White Pearl plant (skip if already spoken to earlier).

atoms.label: Travel to White Wolf Mountain
atoms.detail: Travel to White Wolf Mountain via the Keldagrim minecart system (if The Giant Dwarf is complete) or the Gnome glider (if The Grand Tree is complete).

atoms.label: Equip gloves before picking the thorny bushes
atoms.detail: Equip gloves near the gnome glider so the thorny bushes can be picked without harm.

atoms.label: Pick a White Pearl from the thorny bushes
atoms.detail: Pick from the thorny bushes near the gnome glider to obtain a white pearl.

atoms.label: Eat the white pearl to get its seed
atoms.detail: Eat the white pearl you picked to obtain a white pearl seed.

atoms.label: Give Hamal the white pearl seed
atoms.detail: Speak to Hamal the Chieftain and hand over the white pearl seed to solve the food shortage.

atoms.label: Speak to the shining pool again to cross to the island
atoms.detail: Speak to the shining pool once more, using the pole/staff and plank as before to reach the island.

atoms.label: Cross back to shore without the plank
atoms.detail: Cross the gap back to shore without using the plank this time, which leaves you closer to the cave.

atoms.label: Follow the northern path east to the cave
atoms.detail: Follow the northern path east until you reach a cave entrance.

atoms.label: Chop the trees blocking the path with your axe
atoms.detail: Chop down the trees blocking the path while facing east to clear the way to the cave.

atoms.label: Enter the cave
atoms.detail: Enter the cave to find The Kendal.

atoms.label: Talk to The Kendal before the fight
atoms.detail: Speak to The Kendal, exchanging dialogue before combat begins.

hints.value: It's just me, no one special. -> You mean a sacrifice? -> You look like a man in a bearsuit! -> Can I see that corpse? -> I humbly request to be given the remains. -> I will kill you myself!

atoms.label: Kill The Kendal
atoms.detail: Kill The Kendal (level 70, melee-only); he can be safespotted using the skeletons around the room.

atoms.label: Take the corpse of the woman
atoms.detail: Pick up the corpse of the woman after defeating The Kendal.

atoms.label: Return to Hamal with the corpse
atoms.detail: Return to Hamal the Chieftain and tell him of your victory and the corpse you recovered.

hints.value: But he's not a god! -> I will.

atoms.label: Gather 5 muddy rocks around the camp
atoms.detail: Collect 5 muddy rocks from around the Mountain Camp for the burial mound.

atoms.label: Get Asleif's necklace from Ragnar
atoms.detail: Talk to Ragnar near the tall tree by the lake to receive Asleif's necklace.

atoms.label: Bury the corpse on the island at the shining pool
atoms.detail: Return to the shining pool and bury the woman's corpse on the island to create the burial mound.

atoms.label: Place the muddy rocks on the burial mound
atoms.detail: Use the 5 muddy rocks on the burial mound to complete the daughter's burial and finish the quest.

Cross the wilderness route to the shining pool
Broker peace between Mountain Camp and Rellekka
Secure a new food source on White Wolf Mountain

steps.detail: Short desert quest. Read a letter near the broken golem, repair it with 4 soft clay, ask about the portal. Grab a black mushroom (grind for black dye) and a strange implement from the ruins basement (both reusable for Shadow of the Storm if doing that soon after). Talk to Elissa at the Digsite, read Varmen's notes in the Exam Centre bookcase, then talk to Curator Haig Halen at Varrock Museum about the Uzer statuette, pickpocket him for the display cabinet key, and take the statuette from an upstairs case. Return to Uzer, place the statuette in an empty alcove, rotate 4 statues to all face north to open the portal north; optionally chisel the throne for 2 each of sapphire/emerald/ruby. Make a phoenix quill pen (feather + black dye) and write the golem program on papyrus, then use the strange implement on the golem followed immediately by the program to finish. Region-opener with no known deeper dependency; sets up the desert quest line (Uzer).

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Travel to the Ruins of Uzer
atoms.detail: Use the necklace of passage to Eagle's Eyrie and run south-east, or fairy ring code DLQ and go north-east.

atoms.label: Pick up and read the letter west of the broken clay golem
Talk to the golem and offer to repair it
Use four soft clay on the golem to repair it
atoms.detail: Soft clay can be made from clay rocks north-west near the shore with a bracelet of clay, if not already carried.

atoms.label: Talk to the repaired golem again to ask about the portal
Optional: mine 5 clay near the shore for the Desert Diary
atoms.detail: Optional task, not required for quest completion.

atoms.label: Optional: steal a phoenix feather from the Desert Phoenix nearby
atoms.detail: Optional task, not required for quest completion; the feather is also used in Spirits of the Elid.

atoms.label: Pick a black mushroom near the stairs before heading down
atoms.detail: Take an extra mushroom if planning to complete Shadow of the Storm afterwards.

atoms.label: Grind the black mushroom with a pestle and mortar for black dye
atoms.detail: Can be deferred until you're back at the golem later, as long as you carry an empty vial then.

atoms.label: Climb down the stairs into the ruins
Take the strange implement from the north-western room
atoms.detail: Keep it if planning to complete Shadow of the Storm afterwards.

atoms.label: Speak to the golem again to ask about the portal
Head to the north-east of the Digsite, near the large buried skeleton
Talk to Elissa at the Digsite

atoms.label: Head to the Exam Centre just south of the Digsite
Search the south-east bookcase and read Varmen's notes
atoms.detail: Both the golem repair and these notes are needed before the curator will discuss the quest.

atoms.label: Talk to Curator Haig Halen at Varrock Museum about the statuette

hints.value: 2I'm looking for a statuette recovered from the city of Uzer.
1I want to open a portal to the lair of an elder-demon.

atoms.label: Pickpocket Haig Halen for the display cabinet key
Open the second-most western case in the museum's northern row for the statuette
Return to the Ruins of Uzer
atoms.detail: Fairy ring code DLQ, or necklace of passage to Eagle's Eyrie.

atoms.label: Grab a phoenix feather from the Desert Phoenix if still needed, near the clay rocks
atoms.detail: Conditional -- only needed if not collected earlier.

atoms.label: Go back down the stairs into the ruins
Place the statuette in the one empty alcove of the four in the centre room
Turn the statues until all four point north
Go north through the double doors
Optional: chisel and hammer the throne for gems
atoms.detail: Optional; yields 2 each of sapphire, emerald, and ruby.

hints.value: optional, not required for quest completion

atoms.label: Head back through the south portal to the basement
Go back upstairs to the golem
Talk to the golem
Use the phoenix feather on the black dye to make a phoenix quill pen
Talk to the golem again
Use the phoenix quill pen on papyrus to write the golem program
Use the strange implement on the golem, then immediately use the golem program on it
atoms.detail: Both uses must happen in quick succession to finish the quest.

Retrieve the Uzer statuette from Varrock Museum
Program the golem to finish the quest

steps.detail: Pick a method: AFK fly fishing trout/salmon (bank trips) / 3-tick fly fishing trout/salmon.

hints.note: Barbarian Village has a permanent fire nearby for cooking+dropping without banking.

methods.notes: Matches the row's own 'bank nearby' framing (no tick manipulation). Page's own AFK table gives 13,000 xp/hr at level 20 rising to 30,000 xp/hr at level 40 (band endpoints), so a single band figure would misrepresent the ramp; left as ?? rather than averaged.

methods.location: Barbarian Village (or Prifddinas/Shilo Village spots)

items: swamp tar and a suitable herb for tick manipulation

methods.notes: Faster tick-manipulated variant of the same spot/tool; page's own 3-tick table gives 23,000 xp/hr at level 20 rising to 53,000 xp/hr at level 40, again left ?? rather than averaged into one figure.

atoms.detail: Withdraw a fly fishing rod and feathers (stack). No food required at this spot.

mapMarkers.label: Barbarian Village centre -- fishing spots sit east of here, exact tile not pinned on the page

steps.detail: First Elemental Workshop-series quest. Search a bookcase south-west of the Seers' Village bank for a battered book and read it to start. Slash it with a knife to get a battered key, then use the key on an odd-looking wall in the northern anvil-icon building to enter the underground Elemental Workshop. Turn the east then west water controls green and pull the lever to start the water wheel; fix the bellows with leather+needle (Crafting 20) and pull its lever. Mine an elemental rock (Mining 20) to spawn and kill an earth elemental (level 35) for elemental ore (kill extras now to save time for Elemental Workshop II / a Mind shield later). Fill a stone bowl with lava and use it on the furnace, then smelt the ore with 4 coal into elemental metal (Smithing 20) and smith an elemental shield at the workbench with the slashed book in inventory.

req_items.name: needle
req_items.note: obtainable during quest; costume needle does not work

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Go to the house south of the anvil, Seers' Village
atoms.detail: Head to the house immediately south of the anvil in Seers' Village.

atoms.label: Search the bookcase for a battered book
atoms.detail: Search the bookcase on the eastern wall to find a battered book.

atoms.label: Read the book, then slash it with a knife
atoms.detail: Read the battered book, then use a knife on it for a battered key; keep the now-slashed book, it is needed later.

atoms.label: Open the odd looking wall in the anvil building
atoms.detail: Use the battered key on the odd looking wall in the north of the anvil building to enter the workshop.

atoms.label: Go down the stairs into the workshop
atoms.detail: Descend the stairs to reach the underground Elemental Workshop.

atoms.label: Turn the water control east of the water wheel
atoms.detail: Set the eastern water control (in the north room).

atoms.label: Turn the water control west of the water wheel
atoms.detail: Set the western water control.

atoms.detail: Start the water wheel.

atoms.detail: Mine the elemental rock to make an Earth elemental spawn and attack.

atoms.detail: Use the elemental ore with 4 coal on the southern furnace to produce elemental metal.

atoms.label: Smith the elemental shield at the workbench
atoms.detail: With the slashed book in your inventory, use the elemental metal on the middle-room workbench to smith the elemental shield and finish the quest.

steps.detail: Second Elemental Workshop-series quest. Find a beaten book with a scroll in the Exam Centre library south of the Digsite, read both, then head to the Elemental Workshop (same entry as EW1). Search machinery in the water elemental room for a hatch key (must have read the scroll first), and smelt 2-3 elemental ore into elemental metal bars beforehand. Downstairs, collect crane and lever schematics, craft a crane claw from one bar, connect a junction box's pipes per the lever schematic's clue, and find 3 randomly-placed cogs + a pipe piece in crates to fix a broken pipe and set cog sizes on the wind tunnel pins (small upper-left, medium lower-left, large right). Run each elemental metal bar through the crane-lava-press-water tank-fan sequence via a cart-advancing lever to produce a primed bar (do this twice for a Mind shield). One level further down, drain a bar into a primed mind bar at the extractor gun/hat (temporarily lowers Magic by 20 per bar powered). With the beaten book in inventory, smith the primed bar into a mind helmet to finish; a second powered bar plus the slashed book from Elemental Workshop I in inventory instead makes a mind shield.

req_items.name: pickaxe
req_items.note: only if obtaining elemental ore during the quest

req_items.name: elemental metal (or elemental ore + coal to produce it)
req_items.note: 2 metals for the mind helmet, 3 for a mind shield; can substitute 2-3 elemental ore + 8-12 coal

req_items.name: battered key
req_items.note: carried over from Elemental Workshop I

req_items.name: slashed book
req_items.note: only if making the Mind shield

Go down the hatch in the centre room with the hatch key in your inventory
Take the crane and lever schematics from the crate to the south
Use one elemental bar on the workbench to craft a crane claw
atoms.detail: Careful not to accidentally make more than one.

atoms.label: Pull the western crane lever downstairs to lower the old crane
Use the crane claw on the old crane to replace it
Climb the stairs south-west onto the catwalk
Open the junction box and connect its pipe ends per the lever schematic's diagram
atoms.detail: Click the pipe ends, not the pipe itself, to connect them.

atoms.label: Search the ground floor and catwalk crates for a pipe and small/medium/large cogs

atoms.detail: The catwalk is no longer needed for the rest of the quest.

atoms.label: Place an elemental bar on the jig cart under the elemental claw
Raise the crane (western lever), rotate it over the lava (eastern lever), dip it into the lava and back up twice (western lever), then rotate it over the cart and lower the bar twice
atoms.detail: The bar should be orange after the lava dip.

atoms.label: Pull the lever north of the claw controls to advance the cart to the press station
Pull the western-most press lever to flatten the bar
atoms.detail: The bar should be flattened.

atoms.label: Pull the yellow-sign lever again to advance the cart to the water tank
Cycle the northern lever, corkscrew lever, and west/east water valves to fill then empty the tank, closing the door with the northern lever
atoms.detail: Sequence: northern lever; corkscrew x2; northern lever; west valve x2 (fills); east valve x2 (empties); northern lever (bar turns blue); corkscrew x2; northern lever again to close the door.

atoms.label: Pull the yellow-sign lever again to advance the cart to drying
Pull the east lever to start the fan until the bar turns white, then pull it again to stop the fan
atoms.detail: The machine may need to be turned off and back on again for the bar to whiten.

atoms.label: Pull the yellow-sign lever again to send the primed bar to the jig
Take the primed bar from the jig
Head down the north-west stairs and through the east door to the extractor gun
Place the primed bar under the extractor gun and operate the Extractor hat
atoms.detail: Drains 20 Magic.

atoms.label: Take the primed mind bar from the extractor gun
Go up both spiral staircases to the workbench
atoms.detail: Make sure the beaten book (not just the slashed book) is in your inventory, or you'll craft a mind shield instead of a mind helmet.

atoms.label: Use the primed mind bar on the workbench to smith the mind helmet

steps.detail: Pick a method: Gold amulet (u) / sapphire ring jewellery / Gem cutting (sapphire, emerald, ruby, diamond).

methods.location: Craft gold bars (with a sapphire for the ring) using the matching mould at a furnace (e.g. Prifddinas or Edgeville).
methods.notes: Gold amulet (u) unlocks at 8, sapphire ring at 20, matching the row's continuity method; page's hourly figures are a templated assumption, not one stated number.

methods.location: Cut uncut gems with a chisel to sell or use in jewellery.
methods.notes: Page frames this as the fastest XP path up to level 77 (sapphire 20, emerald 27, ruby 34, diamond 43); per-cut XP is literal (e.g. 50 for sapphire) but the page's per-hour figure is a templated cut-rate assumption, not a flat stated number.

atoms.detail: Smelt at any furnace (route names Prifddinas or Edgeville).

steps.detail: Only requirement is 21 Thieving (boostable); no items needed. Track a totem stolen from the Rantuki tribe through a shipping company's Ardougne depot: relabel a crate to redirect it, get teleported by Wizard Cromperty into collector Lord Handelmort's hideout, crack a spoken door password ('KURT' -- type slowly or it fails), thieve open a locked staircase (needs 21 Thieving) and search a chest for the totem, then return it to Kangai Mau in Brimhaven.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Accept Kangai Mau's totem-recovery job
atoms.detail: Speak to Kangai Mau in the Brimhaven food store and agree to help track down the tribe's stolen totem.

hints.value: I'm in search of adventure! -> Ok, I will get it back.

atoms.label: Travel to the Ardougne GPDT depot
atoms.detail: Head to Ardougne (a ship from Brimhaven also completes an easy Karamja Diary task) and go to the shipping depot just south of the eastern bank.

atoms.label: Find the address label on the north-east crate
atoms.detail: Investigate the most north-eastern crate at the depot to obtain an address label.

atoms.label: Relabel the nearby crate to reroute it
atoms.detail: Use the address label on the crate two tiles south of the first one to redirect its delivery.

atoms.label: Ask the depot employee about the delivery
atoms.detail: Talk to a GPDT employee at the depot and ask when the relabelled crate ships out.

hints.value: So, when are you going to deliver this crate?

atoms.label: Get teleported by Wizard Cromperty
atoms.detail: Talk to Wizard Cromperty in his house north-east of the Ardougne market (checkered floor), ask about his invention, and accept the teleport offer; he sends you straight to the collector's hideout. The dialogue chain is shorter if the medium-or-higher Ardougne diary is already complete.

hints.value: So what have you invented? -> Can I be teleported please? -> Yes, that sounds good. Teleport me!

atoms.label: Speak the password to open the hideout door
atoms.detail: Go two doors west and speak the password KURT; typing it too quickly makes the attempt fail, so enter it slowly.

atoms.label: Unlock and climb the hideout staircase
atoms.detail: Investigate the staircase, which requires 21 Thieving to unlock, then climb to the top floor.

atoms.label: Search the chest for the totem
atoms.detail: Search the chest on the top floor for the tribal totem, and be sure to finish the resulting dialogue completely before clicking away.

atoms.label: Return to Brimhaven
atoms.detail: Travel back to Brimhaven to report your success to Kangai Mau.

atoms.label: Give the totem to Kangai Mau
atoms.detail: Hand the recovered totem to Kangai Mau in Brimhaven, completing the quest.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Bury big bones / Offer bones at a gilded altar / Offer bones at the Chaos Temple altar.

methods.location: anywhere (right-click bury, no altar needed)
methods.notes: Big bones give 15 xp per bone when buried (per the page's own Sinister Offering bury-xp table); no page-stated hourly rate for plain burial.

methods.method: Offer bones at a gilded altar
methods.location: player-owned house gilded altar (or a hosted altar, e.g. worlds 330/465/512 at Rimmington)
methods.notes: Fastest but priciest method; Construction 75 builds the altar, but a host's altar (or a friend's) waives that requirement — page only gives the hourly rate for dragon/superior dragon bones, not big bones.

methods.method: Offer bones at the Chaos Temple altar
methods.location: Chaos Temple, level 38 Wilderness (multi-combat, player-killer risk)
methods.notes: Cheaper alternative to the gilded altar with a 50% chance per offering not to consume the bone, doubling effective xp per inventory; page's stated hourly rates only cover dragon/superior dragon bones.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw banked big bones
atoms.detail: Withdraw big bones banked from earlier combat bands (Hill Giants always drop them); top up from a non-GE bone vendor if stock is short (vendor ??).

atoms.label: Bury big bones until Prayer 43
atoms.detail: Manual bone burial -- no location requirement. Gilded altar (350% bonus) needs Construction 75, not assumed available this early; flagged as a later-route upgrade, not this band's default.

hints.note: Bone supply depends on earlier combat-band drop rates.
Construction 75 unlocks a much faster offering rate -- revisit this band once available.

steps.detail: One-way point of no return dungeon crawl west of Ardougne toward Tirannwn. Talk King Lathas then Koftik at West Ardougne cave entrance, enter dungeon (no going back except via lever/rope pull). Light an arrow via Koftik's cloth+tinderbox, shoot the bridge guide-rope, cross grid maze carefully (keep HP>15), pull lever. Collect 4 light orbs (avoid wall traps, use plank on flat rocks, disarm trap on 4th), fuel furnace, descend well. Navigate slave-cage/pipe area (50 Thieving shortcut optional). Get unicorn horn via railing-on-boulder trick, kill 3 paladins (safespottable) for badges, use badges+horn on well to open door. Meet dwarves Niloof and Klank (get gauntlets - keep inv slot free), steal Witch's cat to enter her house for loot, kill 3 demons for amulets, brew dwarf beer + tinderbox on tomb. Kill Kalrag the spider (safespottable, ignores Protect Melee), get Iban's dove wearing Klank's gauntlets. Kill a Disciple of Iban for ceremonial robes (required to enter temple), use Doll of Iban on the well in Iban's temple (repeat through his attacks, ~8dmg unblockable spikes) to destroy him. Return to King Lathas via Koftik. Gates access to Tirannwn/Elf lands questline infrastructure.

req_items.name: Non-poisoned metal-tipped arrows
req_items.note: 1-5 recommended; used to light and shoot the bridge guide-rope

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to King Lathas on the top floor of Ardougne Castle to begin
atoms.detail: He explains the plan to send you through the pass; committing here starts the point-of-no-return sequence once you reach Koftik.

atoms.label: Talk to Koftik at the West Ardougne cave entrance
atoms.detail: Bring all remaining supplies now; nothing extra can be fetched once you commit to entering.

atoms.label: Enter the cave and head south at the first junction
atoms.detail: Zone transition into the dungeon proper.

atoms.label: Get cloth from Koftik and light an arrow with it
atoms.detail: Use the cloth on an arrow, then light it with a tinderbox (or use the arrow on the ground fire).

atoms.label: Shoot the lit arrow at the bridge's guide rope
atoms.detail: Equip a bow first and pick up any dropped items beforehand -- nothing can be recovered once you're across unless you pull the lever to return.

atoms.label: Grab the plank in the room north of the bridge
atoms.detail: Skip if already carrying a plank from earlier.

atoms.label: Use a rope on the rock above the pit to cross it
atoms.detail: Failing the crossing loses the rope.

atoms.label: Cross the tile grid by trial and error
atoms.detail: Keep Hitpoints above 15 while crossing; some tiles collapse and some paths are dead ends.

atoms.label: Pull the lever next to the gate
atoms.detail: Opens the way into the next area; also the point where you could pull it again to retreat across the bridge.

atoms.label: Activate Rapid Heal at the nearby altar
atoms.detail: Optional but recommended before the trap corridor ahead.

atoms.label: Pass west through the zombie-camp corridor
atoms.detail: Attempt to disable or walk past the five sets of wall traps marked along the corridor.

atoms.label: Pick up the plank by the furnace
atoms.detail: Skip if already carrying one.

atoms.label: Take the first light orb via the north path
atoms.detail: Use the plank on the flat rocks to reach it.

atoms.label: Take the second light orb via the north-west path
atoms.detail: Path is guarded by ogres and blessed spiders.

atoms.label: Take the third light orb via the centre-west path
atoms.detail: Use the plank on the flat rocks again to reach it.

atoms.label: Disarm the trap and search the rock for the fourth light orb
atoms.detail: Do not pick up the orb directly on this path -- search the rock beneath it instead.

atoms.label: Fuel the furnace with all four light orbs
atoms.detail: Return east to the zombie camp furnace first.

atoms.label: Turn off Rapid Heal and climb down the well
atoms.detail: Return to the altar before descending.

atoms.label: Search the two stacked crates for food
atoms.detail: Optional: yields 2 salmon and 2 meat pies.

atoms.label: Picklock the south-east slave cage gate
atoms.detail: Opens the route west toward the obstacle maze.

atoms.label: Dig the loose mud with a spade
atoms.detail: Marked as point 2 on the guide map.

atoms.label: Cross the ledge
atoms.detail: Marked as point 3; you may fall and need to retry from the slave cage.

atoms.label: Take the 50-Thieving shortcut, or cross the stone bridge maze without it
atoms.detail: Shortcut is point 5 (avoid the bubbles); the stone bridge maze at point 4 is the non-Thieving alternative.

hints.value: stone bridge maze at point 4 if under 50 Thieving

atoms.label: Squeeze through the pipe
atoms.detail: Marked as point 6 on the guide map.

atoms.label: Search the unicorn cage, then use a railing piece on the boulder above it
atoms.detail: The railing piece can be dropped after this step.

atoms.label: Search the cage again to take the unicorn horn
atoms.detail: The railing piece can be dropped once the horn is retrieved.

atoms.label: Follow the tunnel to the three knights guarding the well
atoms.detail: Zone transition through the cave passage.

atoms.label: Kill the three knights guarding the well
atoms.detail: Safespottable from the hallway to the south; optional dialogue with any of them before the fight yields food and potions.

atoms.label: Take a badge from each defeated knight
Use the three badges and the unicorn horn on the well to open the door
Head south and descend into the dwarf encampment
atoms.detail: You can drop your spade, plank, and any spare rope before this point.

atoms.label: Talk to Niloof the dwarf
atoms.detail: Also yields 2 meat pies and a meat pizza; declining Kamen's beer instead costs 75 coins for food, accepting costs 5 damage and -3 Agility.

atoms.label: Talk to Klank the dwarf for his gauntlets
atoms.detail: Keep one inventory slot free to receive them.

atoms.label: Cross the broken bridge north-east and search the witch's window from outside
atoms.detail: Locates her house before entering.

atoms.label: Pick up the witch's cat
Use the cat on the witch's door to open it
Open the chest inside the witch's house for loot
atoms.detail: Requires 4 free inventory spaces; do not skip the chat option that appears.

atoms.label: Kill the three demons west of the witch's house
Take an amulet from each defeated demon
Open the chest north of the middle demon
Use a bucket on the brew barrel in the eastern dwarf house
atoms.detail: A spare bucket is available in the larger western house if needed.

atoms.label: Use the dwarf brew and a tinderbox on the tomb in the south-east corner
atoms.detail: A spare tinderbox is available in the eastern house if needed.

atoms.label: Head north to Kalrag's spider pit
atoms.detail: You can drop your tinderbox and bucket before this point.

atoms.label: Kill Kalrag the spider
atoms.detail: Safespottable; its attacks ignore Protect from Melee.

atoms.label: Head north-west through the cave entrance to the half-souless area
Wear Klank's gauntlets and search the marked cage for Iban's dove
atoms.detail: Requires Klank's gauntlets equipped; the dove attaches to the doll automatically and never enters the inventory.

atoms.label: Head south to the broken bridge, then east and south into the Disciples of Iban maze
Kill a Disciple of Iban in the middle of the maze
Take the fallen disciple's ceremonial robes
Equip the ceremonial robes
atoms.detail: Required to be let through the temple doors.

atoms.label: Enter Iban's temple
atoms.detail: Do not drop anything you are not willing to lose -- using the doll on the well teleports you to the tunnel entrance.

atoms.label: Use the Doll of Iban on the well repeatedly until Iban is destroyed
atoms.detail: Standing one tile north of the well helps dodge his unblockable spikes (roughly 8 damage each); his attacks may interrupt the action several times before it lands.

atoms.label: Talk to Koftik to be transported back through the pass
Return to Ardougne Castle
Talk to King Lathas to complete the quest

checkpoints.label: Dwarf camp and the witch's house

steps.instruction: Complete In Search of the Myreque
steps.detail: Myreque chain quest 1: deliver steel weapons from Cyreg Paddlehorn's boat at Mort'ton to the Myreque hideout, answer a lore quiz (spelling-checked) to get in, hand over weapons, then safespot-kill a level 97 Skeleton Hellhound before talking your way out. Vanstrom Klause at the tavern is later revealed as the villain -- first appearance in the chain.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Vanstrom Klause in the Canifis pub
atoms.detail: He is near the staircase; fairycode CKS teleports here.

hints.value: 1,4 (why do they need help / perhaps I could help you out here)

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Gather the quest supplies before teleporting
atoms.detail: 6 wooden planks, 10 coins, a hammer, all the steel weapons and nails, and fill your Druid Pouch if not already done.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Travel to Mort'ton
atoms.detail: Mort'ton teleport, Shades of Mort'ton minigame teleport, Barrows teleport, fairy ring code bip (needs 50 Agility), fairy ring code bkr plus the Swamp Boaty, or run from Canifis.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Cyreg Paddlehorn by the boat, east of Mort'ton
atoms.detail: Chained dialogue ending in handing over the wooden planks.

hints.value: 2,2,3,3,1 (own-words paraphrase, ending: give wooden planks to Cyreg)

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Board the boat
atoms.detail: Make sure your Druid Pouch is filled before boarding.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Climb and repair the tree rope bridge
atoms.detail: Go north and climb the bridge, then repair it.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Curpile Fyod and answer the Myreque lore quiz
atoms.detail: Continue north to reach him. Six spelling-checked questions: the only female Myreque member, the leader of the Myreque in Mort Myre, the boatman's name, the vampyre family ruling Morytania, the youngest member, and the member who was originally a scholar.

hints.value: 1 (I've come to help the Myreque, I've brought weapons)
check the spelling of each typed answer before submitting, per the page's own warning.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Enter the Myreque hideout
atoms.detail: Go north through the wooden doors set into the hill, follow the eastern wall north-west to an alcove, then enter the cave entrance in its southern wall.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to Veliaf inside the hideout
atoms.detail: No chat options are needed.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to everyone else in the hideout
atoms.detail: No chat options are needed for these introductions.

hints.value: exact roster count beyond the quiz's named members is not itemised on the page -- left as an until:state placeholder.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Hand your steel weapons over to Veliaf
atoms.detail: Give him the steel weapons you brought.

hints.value: 'all the steel weapons' is never itemised into a specific list/quantity on the page -- left as ??.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Kill the level 97 Skeleton Hellhound
atoms.detail: Safespot it by luring the hellhound to the north-east side of the room, to the right of the north barrel or below the north-east bed.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Ask Veliaf how to get out
atoms.detail: He explains the way out.

hints.value: 3,3 (how do I get out of here / ok, thanks)

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Search the north wall to reveal the exit
atoms.detail: Re-enter through the cave entrance, then search the wall on the north side of the room.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Climb the ladder out and return to the Canifis pub
atoms.detail: Climb the ladder on the north side of the room, then head back to the pub.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

atoms.label: Talk to the Stranger sitting in Vanstrom Klause's old chair to finish the quest
atoms.detail: He now sits where Vanstrom Klause was in the Canifis pub.

refs.title: In Search of the Myreque/Quick guide

checkpoints.label: Deliver weapons to the Myreque boatman
Answer the lore quiz and enter the hideout
Arm the Myreque and defeat the hellhound

steps.detail: Intermediate quest requiring defeat of a level 172 Black demon (safespottable). Talk to King Shareen for a translation book and bark sample, deliver the sample to Hazelmere on the island east of Yanille (fairy ring CLS) for a message. Report back and tell the king about the man with the King's seal and the Daconia rocks; talk to imprisoned Charlie upstairs, search Glough's house cupboard for his journal, confront Glough (he arrests you), get the shipyard password 'Ka-Lu-Min' from Charlie, and escape via the gnome glider. On Karamja: run past level 53 jogres to the Ship Yard, give the password, get a lumber order from the Foreman (fight him or answer his security questions), and deliver the order to the king. Talk to Charlie again, get a key from Anita north-west of the tree, take invasion plans from Glough's chest, deliver them for 4 sticks, spell TUZO on the watchtower pillars in Glough's house, then descend to fight a level 172 Black demon (lure it against the daconia rocks north of the ladder for a safespot). Find the last daconia rock by searching roots, then finish by talking to the king. Required for: Monkey Madness I, The Eyes of Glouphrie.

req_items.name: Coins
req_items.note: only needed if you previously refused to help Femi at the Stronghold gate

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to King Shareen for the translation book and bark sample
atoms.detail: Requires two empty inventory slots.

atoms.label: Deliver the bark sample to Hazelmere
atoms.detail: His house is on the island east of Yanille (fairy ring code CLS); he gives a message for the king.

atoms.label: Report the message to King Shareen
atoms.detail: Dialogue branches through confirming a man came with the King's seal and gave him Daconia rocks, which will kill the tree.

atoms.label: Walk to Glough's house
atoms.detail: South from the king, then east and up the ladder at the bottom of the incline.

atoms.label: Talk to Glough
atoms.detail: First meeting, upstairs in his house.

atoms.label: Return to King Shareen and ask to see the prisoner
atoms.detail: The king reveals Glough has caught a human.

atoms.label: Talk to the prisoner Charlie
atoms.detail: Top floor of the Grand Tree; the full conversation must be completed.

atoms.label: Search Glough's cupboard for his journal
atoms.detail: In Glough's house.

atoms.label: Talk to Glough and wait to be arrested
atoms.detail: Confronting him about the journal triggers a scripted arrest.

atoms.label: Talk to Charlie for the shipyard password
atoms.detail: He explains the Ship Yard on Karamja and gives the password 'Ka-Lu-Min' (own-words note: exact password string is game text, recorded verbatim only because it is required literal input, not narrated dialogue).

atoms.label: The king appears and tells you to escape via the gnome glider
atoms.detail: Automatically triggered on top of the Grand Tree.

atoms.label: Travel with the gnome glider to Karamja
atoms.detail: Boarded on top of the Grand Tree, following the king's escape instruction.

atoms.label: Run east past the level 53 jogres to the Ship Yard gate
atoms.detail: The glider crashes nearby.

atoms.label: Open the gate and give the password to the worker
atoms.detail: Tell him Glough sent you, then give the password Ka-Lu-Min.

atoms.label: Talk to the Foreman on the southern dock for a lumber order
atoms.detail: Canonical route: talk and answer his security questions (alt not modelled: kill him instead, also yields the lumber order).

atoms.label: Deliver the lumber order to the king
atoms.detail: Teleport into the stronghold, or pay Femi 1,000 coins to sneak in if she wasn't helped earlier; the king doesn't believe the order yet.

atoms.label: Talk to Charlie again on the top floor
atoms.detail: Opens the errand to see Anita.

atoms.label: Talk to Anita for Glough's key
atoms.detail: Up the stairs west of the swamp, north-west of the Grand Tree.

atoms.label: Use the key on Glough's chest for the invasion plans
atoms.detail: Complete the dialogue window fully to receive the plans.

atoms.label: Deliver the invasion plans for four sticks
atoms.detail: Requires four empty inventory slots.

atoms.label: Spell TUZO on the four watchtower pillars with the sticks
atoms.detail: Climb the watchtower (tree in the east part of Glough's house); eat a summer pie first if under 25 Agility.

atoms.label: Bank if needed and prepare for the Black demon fight
atoms.detail: Bring food and gear suited to a level 172 demon before descending.

atoms.label: Kill the level 172 Black demon
atoms.detail: Immediately after the cutscene, run to the tile directly north of the entrance ladder; the demon gets stuck behind the daconia rocks and can be safely fought with ranged, magic, or a halberd. It despawns if not killed within exactly 10 minutes.

atoms.label: Talk to the king found near a ladder past the demon
atoms.detail: He asks you to find the last daconia rock; the dialogue must be fully completed.

atoms.label: Search the roots for the last daconia rock
atoms.detail: Click continue on the dialogue when the stone is found.

atoms.label: Talk to the king one last time to finish
atoms.detail: Concludes the quest.

checkpoints.label: Get the translation book and deliver the bark sample
Report the message and confront Glough
Investigate Glough, get arrested, and escape by glider
Get the lumber order from the Ship Yard on Karamja
Get the invasion plans and spell TUZO on the watchtower
Fight the Black demon and find the last daconia rock

steps.detail: Novice Hunter-skill quest, no series. Charlie the zookeeper needs help finding huntsman Nickolaus, missing near Eagles' Peak west of the Tree Gnome Stronghold. Find his tent, pick up a bird book that drops a metal feather, and use it to open the mountain-top door into Eagles' Peak Dungeon. Shout to Nickolaus, trapped by a giant eagle, then craft two eagle costumes (10 eagle feathers + swamp tar + yellow dye + 50 coins at Varrock's Fancy Dress Shop) so you can both disguise as eagles. To open the eagle door to Nickolaus you first need three feathers: bronze (defeat a net trap via four corner winches), silver (Hunter 27 to read a pedestal trail leading to a hidden tunnel, then kill or threaten a level 13 kebbit), and gold (solve a bird-seed/lever puzzle moving eagle statues and wing-gates through a specific lever/feeder sequence, reset lever available if you mess it up). Use all three feathers on the eagle door, wear the disguise to pass the guard eagle, then learn to catch ferrets from Nickolaus (no box trap needed for this part) and deliver a ferret to Charlie at Ardougne Zoo to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Start the quest with Charlie
atoms.detail: Speak to Charlie in Ardougne Zoo, who needs help finding huntsman Nickolaus.

hints.value: Ah, you sound like someone who needs a quest doing! -> Sure. Any idea where I should start looking?

atoms.label: Travel to Eagles' Peak
atoms.detail: Head to Eagles' Peak west of the Tree Gnome Stronghold, via necklace of passage to The Outpost, fairy ring code AKQ, or the rowboat south-east of the Piscatoris teleport scroll (fastest).

atoms.label: Find the campsite at the mountain's base
atoms.detail: Go to the northern side of the mountain's base, by the agility shortcut, to find Nickolaus' campsite.

atoms.label: Inspect the campsite books
atoms.detail: Inspect the books at the campsite to receive a bird book.

atoms.label: Click the bird book for the metal feather
atoms.detail: Click on the bird book to obtain a metal feather.

atoms.label: Climb up to the rocky outcrop
atoms.detail: Climb the rocks attached to the mountain next to the campsite (25 Agility), or follow the grey path south-east of the campsite if you lack the level.

hints.value: Agility 25 is only needed for the rock-climbing shortcut -- an unrequired grey-path alternative exists for lower levels.

atoms.label: Open the dungeon entrance
atoms.detail: Use the metal feather on the rocky outcrop to open the cave and enter Eagles' Peak Dungeon.

hints.value: The metal feather only opens the dungeon entrance -- it is not consumed and is not the same feather used later on the eagle door.

atoms.label: Head to the canyon edge
atoms.detail: In the dungeon, go east to the Y-shaped intersection then south to the edge of the canyon.

atoms.label: Take a giant feather to draw out Nickolaus
atoms.detail: Try to take a giant feather from the south-western-most pile; Nickolaus, trapped by a giant eagle, shouts at you.

hints.value: The Ardougne zookeeper sent me to find you. -> Well if you gave me a ferret I could take it back for you. -> Could I help at all?

atoms.label: Collect 10 eagle feathers
atoms.detail: Pick up 10 eagle feathers from any of the piles on the ground.

atoms.label: Travel to the Fancy Clothes Store
atoms.detail: Head to the south-east corner of Varrock to the Fancy Clothes Store (Varrock teleport, Rat Pits Grouping teleport, etc).

hints.value: Items required for the disguise: 10 eagle feathers, 50gp, swamp tar, yellow dye.

atoms.label: Ask Asyff about the bird costumes
atoms.detail: Talk to Asyff and mention you're after a couple of bird costumes.

hints.value: Well, specifically I'm after a couple of bird costumes.

atoms.label: Hand over the materials for the disguise
atoms.detail: Give Asyff the eagle feathers, swamp tar, yellow dye, and 50gp; she makes you an eagle cape and fake beak.

hints.value: I've got the feathers and materials you requested. -> Okay, here are the materials. Eagle me up.
Swamp tar and yellow dye's own acquisition points are not stated in the Quick guide -- modeled as pre-existing consumed items.

atoms.label: Enter the south-west tunnel
atoms.detail: Go back into Eagles' Peak Dungeon and enter the farthest south-west tunnel.

atoms.label: Operate the four corner winches
atoms.detail: Try to grab the feather from the pedestal to trigger the trap, then operate all four corner winches in any order to release it.

atoms.label: Grab the bronze feather
atoms.detail: Take the bronze feather from the pedestal now that the winches are set.

atoms.label: Enter the next tunnel north
atoms.detail: Exit the bronze-feather tunnel and enter the next tunnel to the north.

atoms.label: Read the pedestal trail
atoms.detail: Inspect the pedestal, then complete the trail by inspecting the rock to the east and the rocks to the north-east.

atoms.label: Threaten the kebbit
atoms.detail: Inspect the opening in the wall north-east of the cave and threaten the kebbit found there.

atoms.label: Pick up the silver feather
atoms.detail: Take the silver feather once the kebbit encounter resolves.

atoms.label: Head to the golden feather tunnel
atoms.detail: Exit back to the main dungeon, run up the farthest north-east path, and go through the tunnel entrance.

atoms.label: Take 6 handfuls of bird seed
atoms.detail: Collect 6 handfuls of bird seed near the tunnel entrance.

atoms.label: Solve the lever and feeder puzzle
atoms.detail: Pull lever (1), place seed in feeders (2) and (3), pull lever (4), push lever (5, same as 1), place seed in (6), pull lever (7), place seed in (8), pull lever (9), place seed in (10), then place the last seed in (11, same feeder as 6).

hints.value: A reset lever outside the chamber restarts the puzzle if it gets messed up.

atoms.label: Retrieve the golden feather
atoms.detail: Take the golden feather from the pedestal to the west once the puzzle is solved.

atoms.label: Head to the eagle door
atoms.detail: Exit the golden feather tunnel and go to the door south of Nickolaus.

atoms.label: Use all three feathers on the eagle door
atoms.detail: Use the bronze, silver, and gold feathers on the door's eagle carving to open it and enter.

atoms.label: Wear the eagle disguise
atoms.detail: Equip the eagle cape and fake beak made earlier.

atoms.label: Walk past the giant eagle
atoms.detail: While disguised, click the giant eagle and choose to walk past it.

atoms.label: Speak to Nickolaus
atoms.detail: Talk to the freed Nickolaus once past the giant eagle.

atoms.label: Return to the campsite
atoms.detail: Exit the dungeon and go back to the campsite north of the mountain.

atoms.label: Learn ferret-catching from Nickolaus
atoms.detail: Talk to Nickolaus about the ferret; no box trap is needed for this part.

hints.value: Well I was originally sent to find you because of a ferret. -> That sounds good to me.

atoms.label: Receive the ferret after the cutscene
atoms.detail: Once the cutscene ends, a ferret appears in your inventory; do not release it or you'll have to catch another.

atoms.label: Return to Ardougne Zoo
atoms.detail: Head back to Ardougne Zoo with the ferret.

atoms.label: Deliver the ferret to Charlie
atoms.detail: Give the ferret to Charlie at Ardougne Zoo to complete the quest.

checkpoints.label: Reach Eagles' Peak and gather starting feathers
Open the eagle door and reach Nickolaus
Finish the quest with the ferret

steps.detail: Pick a method: Swamp Lizards or Barb-tailed Kebbits (box traps) / Swamp lizards / Sapphire glacialis (butterfly net) / Embertailed jerboas.

methods.location: Lumbridge Swamp

methods.location: north-west of Slepe
methods.notes: Page states ~20,000-28,000 xp/hr at 29-37 with two traps, rising to ~40,000-45,000 xp/hr with three traps from level 40; ranges left as ?? per single-figure policy.

methods.location: Rellekka hunter area / Farming Guild / Mons Gratia
methods.notes: Page states 28,500 xp/hr at level 25; can be combined with cerulean twitch bird trapping for a slightly higher rate.

methods.location: Locus Oasis

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw box traps
atoms.detail: Withdraw box traps (swamp lizard / kebbit method).

atoms.label: Go to the Lumbridge Swamp hunting ground
atoms.detail: Tile (3209,3165) per the route's own map pin.

atoms.label: Box-trap Swamp Lizards / Barb-tailed Kebbits until Hunter 43

atoms.label: Alt: box-trap embertailed jerboas (Locus Oasis)
