refs.title: In Aid of the Myreque/Quick guide

steps.detail: Unlocks blackjacking in Pollnivneach for fast Thieving XP.

hints.note: start: ask about his stock problems
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

media.caption: Northern Al Kharid: Ali Morrisane (quest-the-feud start)
Player beside Ali Morrisane; ask about work to start The Feud

atoms.label: Talk to Ali Morrisane about his stock problems
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali Morrisane next to the Silk Stall in northern Al Kharid; ask why he's still selling from a stall to trigger the quest start.

atoms.label: Obtain a kharidian headpiece and a fake beard
atoms.detail: Buy a kharidian headpiece and a fake beard (NPC clothing stock in Al Kharid, not the Grand Exchange).

atoms.label: Combine the headpiece and beard into a desert disguise
atoms.detail: Use the kharidian headpiece on the fake beard to combine them into a desert disguise for the Pollnivneach infiltration later.

atoms.label: Travel to Pollnivneach
atoms.detail: Head south to Pollnivneach to begin the local investigation.

atoms.label: Buy 3 beers from Ali the Barman
atoms.detail: Buy 3 beers from Ali the Barman at the Pollnivneach bar (NPC purchase).

atoms.label: Ply Drunken Ali with 3 beers
atoms.detail: Use one beer on Drunken Ali at the bar, talk through the full dialogue, then repeat with the second and third beers -- do not skip any dialogue between beers.

atoms.label: Question the bandits and the Menaphite Thugs
atoms.detail: Talk to the bandits by the general store, then head west of the bar and question the Menaphite Thugs.

atoms.label: Travel to the camel store
atoms.detail: Head to the camel store just north-west of the bar.

atoms.label: Buy 2 camels from Ali the Camel Man
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Camel Man and buy 2 camels for 500 coins (NPC purchase); keep 2 free inventory slots first.

atoms.label: Deliver camel receipts
atoms.detail: Talk to a Menaphite and a bandit, handing each of them a camel receipt.

atoms.label: Join Ali the Operator's gang
atoms.detail: Go to the large purple tent south-west of the bar and ask Ali the Operator to join his gang.

atoms.label: Demonstrate a pickpocket attempt
atoms.detail: Attempt to pickpocket a villager once (as a demonstration), then return to Ali the Operator for advice.

atoms.label: Pay the street urchin for a tip
atoms.detail: Talk to the street urchin near the centre town well and pay him 10 coins for a tip on which villager to target.

atoms.label: Pickpocket the marked villager
atoms.detail: Pickpocket the villager with an arrow marker over their head (the urchin's tip-off), then report back to Ali the Operator.

atoms.label: Obtain an oak blackjack
atoms.detail: Obtain an oak blackjack before continuing -- the walkthrough does not state an explicit source here ("??"); it is most likely supplied on joining Ali the Operator's gang, otherwise buy one from a Pollnivneach blackjack seller.

atoms.label: Equip the oak blackjack
atoms.detail: Equip the oak blackjack before approaching a villager.

atoms.label: Blackjack and pickpocket a villager
atoms.detail: Lure a villager into a secluded area, knock them out with the equipped oak blackjack, then pickpocket them while they're unconscious.

atoms.label: Report success, move to the jewels task
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Operator to move on to the jewel-theft task.

atoms.label: Equip the desert disguise and gloves
atoms.detail: Put on the desert disguise (made earlier) and a pair of gloves before infiltrating the mayor's house.

atoms.label: Hide behind the cactus near the mayor's house
atoms.detail: Hide behind the large cactus near the mayor's house, the large house to the east by the fountain.

atoms.label: Obtain the mayor's house keys
atoms.detail: Obtain the keys to the mayor's house -- the walkthrough does not state exactly how they're acquired here ("??"); they appear to be picked up automatically during the hide-behind-the-cactus sequence.

atoms.label: Enter the house and find the hidden dial
atoms.detail: Use the keys on the door, go up the stairs in the north-eastern corner, then search the landscape picture near the bed to reveal a hidden dial.

atoms.label: Crack the dial and take the jewels
atoms.detail: Hit the button on the dial to reset it, then click 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8 in that exact clockwise order to open the safe and take the jewels.

atoms.label: Hand over the jewels
atoms.detail: Give the recovered jewels to Ali the Operator.

atoms.label: Chase down the traitor lead
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Operator, then a Menaphite Thug, then Ali the Operator again, then Ali the Barman about "Traitorous Ali" -- a fixed dialogue chase with no branching outcome.

atoms.label: Buy special kebab sauce
atoms.detail: Buy special sauce from the kebab seller north-west of the well in the middle of town (NPC purchase).

atoms.label: Sabotage the trough behind the camel shop
atoms.detail: Use the special sauce on the trough behind the camel shop.

atoms.label: Collect Ugthanki dung
atoms.detail: Use a bucket on the dung behind the camel shop once it has turned brown; scoop 3 extra buckets of dung if also planning My Arm's Big Adventure later.

atoms.label: Get a snake charm and basket
atoms.detail: Use a coin on the snake charmer's money pot south of the bar, with 2 free inventory slots, to receive a snake charm and a snake basket.

atoms.label: Capture a desert snake
atoms.detail: Use the snake charm repeatedly on a desert snake north of the Menaphite tent until it goes into the snake basket.

atoms.label: Travel to Ali the Hag
atoms.detail: Head to Ali the Hag, north-west of the kebab seller.

atoms.label: Trade the snake and dung for hag's poison
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Hag twice, handing over the filled snake basket and the Ugthanki dung to receive the hag's poison.

atoms.label: Poison the beer table
atoms.detail: Use the hag's poison on the table with a beer in the bar.

atoms.label: Report the traitor
atoms.detail: Talk to Ali the Operator to report what was found.

atoms.label: Prepare for battle and confront the Menaphite Leader
atoms.detail: Gear up for combat, then talk to the Menaphite Leader just outside the tent.

atoms.label: Kill the Tough Guy for a willow blackjack
atoms.detail: Kill the level-75 Tough Guy from a safe-spot behind the bush; he drops a willow blackjack.

atoms.label: Find and question the Bandit Leader
atoms.detail: Talk to a villager, then find and talk to the Bandit Leader, who wanders near the northern magic carpet station.

atoms.label: Kill the bandit champion for an adamant scimitar
atoms.detail: Kill the level-70 bandit champion from a safe-spot behind the chair in the house to the east, while holding the willow blackjack; he drops an adamant scimitar.

atoms.label: Report to Ali the Mayor
atoms.detail: Talk to a villager, then talk to Ali the Mayor by the well in the village centre.

atoms.label: Return to Ali Morrisane to finish the quest
atoms.detail: Return to Ali Morrisane, who you started the quest with, to complete The Feud.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Steal from fruit stalls (Hosidius, Zeah) / Pickpocket Knights of Ardougne / Steal artefacts (Port Piscarilius).

methods.location: Hosidius market or coastal houses
methods.notes: Matches the row's own 'Fruit stalls on Zeah' continuity method; page states the full band as 25-50 (up to 42,750 xp/hr at the eastern coastal house, or 34,200 xp/hr from a single stall), sub-scoped here to 38-50.

methods.location: Ardougne marketplace or south-east bank
methods.notes: The row's 'Guards in Ardougne' phrasing most closely matches this section, but the page states Knights of Ardougne only becomes a viable method from level 55 onward -- the whole method sits at or above this row's 38-55 top edge rather than spanning it; flagged as a mismatch rather than silently rewritten or dropped.

methods.location: Port Piscarilius, via guard-lured bridges
methods.notes: Page states this is the fastest method from level 49-65; sub-scoped to this row's 49-55 slice, table spans multiple levels within that slice so xp_hr stays ??.

atoms.label: Go to the fruit stalls (Hosidius)
atoms.detail: Easternmost house near the beach has 2 stalls close together with no patrolling guard dogs, per Thieving_training.s20.

atoms.label: Steal from fruit stalls until Thieving 50
atoms.detail: Up to 42,750 xp/h from both stalls, 34,200 xp/h from one, per Thieving_training.s20. Eat strange fruits or use stamina potions for run energy; drop fruit while running between stalls unless banking. Section 20's own header covers levels 25-50 -- levels 1-25 are not documented by any cited section, left ??.

hints.note: Fastest rate is dropping fruit while running between the two stalls (Thieving_training.s20).
No method cited for pre-25 Thieving in this bundle's fetched sections; genuinely unsourced, not fabricated.

atoms.label: Go to the Ardougne market (Knights of Ardougne)
atoms.detail: South-eastern part of the Ardougne marketplace, per Thieving_training.s23.

atoms.label: Pickpocket Knights of Ardougne until Thieving 55
atoms.detail: 86,000 xp/h at level 55 assuming the medium Ardougne Diary + dodgy necklaces, per Thieving_training.s23's own table.

hints.note: Medium Ardougne Diary (-10% stun) + dodgy necklaces (25% resist) recommended per Thieving_training.s23; exact base fail rate at 55 not restated here.

steps.detail: Required for RFD Evil Dave. Requires Demon Slayer and The Golem.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Father Reen (start Shadow of the Storm)
atoms.detail: South of Al Kharid bank. He gives a free uncoloured Silverlight if you don't already carry a regular one -- bank any spare dyed Silverlight first, since carrying both later blocks progress.

atoms.label: Travel to the Ruins of Uzer
atoms.detail: Shantay Pass + magic carpet, a necklace of passage to Eagles' Eyrie then south-east, or fairy ring dlq then north-east. Bring Silverlight -- it's needed to continue.

atoms.label: Talk to Father Badden and pick a black mushroom
atoms.detail: Ask through all of his dialogue options. Pick a black mushroom outside the dungeon if not already carried, then enter.

atoms.label: Dye Silverlight and 3 clothing items black
atoms.detail: Grind the black mushroom into black dye with a pestle & mortar + vial. Assemble any 3 quest-accepted black clothing items (own-words per the page's own list -- e.g. a dyed desert shirt + robe, a black priest gown, dark mystic robes, black dragonhide, or 3 black cosmetic slot items; several black-looking cosmetic items like the black mask do NOT count, per the page's own exclusion list). Also dye Silverlight itself black with the same dye -- never carry a normal and a dyed Silverlight together.

atoms.label: Convince Evil Dave to let you through the portal
atoms.detail: Wearing all 3 black clothing items, tell Evil Dave you want to join the group. He leads you to Denath, the group's leader, who explains the plan to summon Agrith-Naar and gives a player-specific incantation order to remember (also written, reversed, in a demonic tome found later).

atoms.label: Cut gems from the demon's throne (optional)
atoms.detail: Use a chisel and hammer on the demon's throne for 2 sapphires, 2 rubies, 2 emeralds -- skip if already done during The Golem.

atoms.label: Get the sigil mould and the clay golem's account
atoms.detail: Talk to Jennifer for a demonic sigil mould, then Matthew about Josef -- he asks you to find Josef's dropped book. Talk to the clay golem: it reveals Denath killed Josef and hid the book in an outdoor kiln (must ask the golem before the kilns become searchable).

atoms.label: Search the outdoor kilns for the Demonic Tome
atoms.detail: Four kilns around Uzer (near the magic carpet and east of the temple) -- search until the tome turns up.

atoms.label: Craft the demonic sigil
atoms.detail: At any furnace (fairy ring dkr to Edgeville is fastest), use the silver bar with the demonic sigil mould.

atoms.label: Chant the incantation in Denath's order
atoms.detail: Read the Demonic Tome (its incantation is the reverse of Denath's), return through the portal, and hand Matthew the book. Join Denath's circle and chant the incantation in the order Denath gave using your sigil -- Denath walks into the portal and vanishes: he WAS Agrith-Naar, and the 'backwards' order banished rather than summoned him.

atoms.label: Recruit five allies and their sigils
atoms.detail: Pick up Denath's dropped sigil (or immediately chase Tanya back through the portal for a double sigil/bones drop). Chase Evil Dave, Eric, and Tanya through the portal -- Tanya and Eric die to hazards (loot their sigils), then convince Evil Dave to return and hand over his. Recruit Father Badden and Father Reen (give each a spare sigil) and the clay golem (use the strange implement found in the lair on it first, then ask again) as the final participants.

atoms.label: Summon and kill Agrith-Naar with Silverlight
atoms.detail: Re-enter the portal, talk to Matthew to gather everyone, chant the incantation in the book's (opposite) order. Agrith-Naar (level 100) appears, kills Matthew, then attacks you -- melee by default, switches to Fire Blast if you pray/step out of range, or Telekinetic Grabs you back in if you pray Magic from range. No cannon allowed. The final blow MUST land with Silverlight or his HP snaps back to 12; Silverlight merges into Darklight automatically on the kill.

checkpoints.label: Starting Out (Al Kharid -> Uzer -> black outfit)

steps.detail: Pick a method: Mazchna tasks / Vannaka tasks.

methods.location: Canifis
methods.notes: Mazchna's assignments require Priest in Peril plus 20 Combat or 99 Slayer (page's own OR-gate) and are based out of Canifis in Morytania.

methods.location: Edgeville Dungeon
methods.notes: Vannaka requires 40 Combat or 99 Slayer (page-stated OR-gate) with no quest gate, based in the Edgeville Dungeon.

atoms.label: Go to Vannaka (Edgeville Dungeon)
atoms.detail: Requires 40 combat or 99 Slayer, per Slayer_training.s2's own master-access table -- already met by this route position (Attack/Strength/Defence all trained to 70 earlier in this segment).

atoms.label: Talk to Vannaka for a Slayer task
atoms.detail: 8 points/task per Slayer_training.s2's own table.

atoms.label: Complete Slayer tasks until Slayer 50
atoms.detail: Task monster varies per assignment -- genuinely randomised, not a fixed target.

hints.note: Vannaka's assignable-monster pool and per-task quantity not restated from Slayer_training.s2 here; left ?? rather than listing a guessed subset.

atoms.label: Alt: Mazchna (Canifis) tasks
atoms.detail: 6 points/task, requires Priest in Peril (already completed earlier in this route per the quests:quest-priest-in-peril ledger entry) or 20 combat / 99 Slayer.

steps.detail: Desert Treasure — unlocks the Ancient Magicks spellbook.
God Wars Dungeon — access to the four god bosses and their unique drops.

mapMarkers.label: GWD entrance hole (surface, north of Trollheim)

steps.detail: Pick a method: Cook trout and salmon caught at Barbarian Village fishing spots on a nearby fire or range / Continue with pike (20-25) then salmon (25-30) from the page's current low-tier fish table at a bank-adjacent fire or range / Cook tuna for levels 30-40 at the Hosidius Kitchen (or Myths' Guild/Mor Ul Rek range), from the page's Levels 30-99 fish table / 1-tick cook cooked karambwan from level 30 onward after completing Tai Bwo Wannai Trio, for the fastest cooking xp in the game.

media.caption: Permanent fire (Cook) at Barbarian Village — train-cooking-40

methods.method: Cook trout and salmon caught at Barbarian Village fishing spots on a nearby fire or range
methods.location: Barbarian Village fishing spots
methods.notes: Matches the row's own detail; the current page's Levels 1-30 fish table lists trout 15-20 and salmon 25-30, so this covers the lower part of the band.

methods.method: Continue with pike (20-25) then salmon (25-30) from the page's current low-tier fish table at a bank-adjacent fire or range
methods.location: any bank-adjacent fire or range
methods.notes: Rounds out the table's remaining rows above trout, up to the table's own ceiling of 30.

methods.method: Cook tuna for levels 30-40 at the Hosidius Kitchen (or Myths' Guild/Mor Ul Rek range), from the page's Levels 30-99 fish table
methods.location: Hosidius Kitchen
methods.notes: Page gives an approximate xp/h range for tuna (85,000-100,000, with a 143,500 theoretical figure) rather than one clean number, so xp_hr is left unknown rather than picking a value from the range.

methods.method: 1-tick cook cooked karambwan from level 30 onward after completing Tai Bwo Wannai Trio, for the fastest cooking xp in the game
methods.location: Rogues' Den / Myths' Guild / Mor Ul Rek
methods.notes: Page's per-level 1-tick table starts at level 30 (464,000 xp/h 1-tick, 141,000 AFK); left as ?? since it is not an exact band-boundary figure.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw fly-fishing loadout
atoms.detail: Fly fishing rod + feathers (trout/salmon), tinderbox + logs for the cooking fire.

atoms.label: Go to Barbarian Village fishing spot
atoms.detail: Fishing spot with an adjacent fire, per the coarse row's own mapMarker.

atoms.label: Fly-fish trout and salmon
atoms.detail: Own-caught, never bought -- feeds the produce loop below.

atoms.label: Cook trout and salmon on the Barbarian Village fire until Cooking 40
atoms.detail: Buy roughly 2.5x more raw fish than the successfully-cooked amount needed at low levels per the burn-rate table (own-caught here, not bought). Trout 70xp/success (15-20), pike 80xp (20-25), salmon 90xp (25-30); continue with tuna at Hosidius Kitchen for 30-40 per the page's own level split.

hints.note: Burn rate is fairly high at low Cooking levels per Pay-to-play_Cooking_training.s3's own note; exact per-level figures not in the fetched table.

atoms.label: Alt: Cook tuna at Hosidius Kitchen (levels 30-40)
atoms.detail: 85,000-100,000 xp/h per Pay-to-play_Cooking_training.s8's own table; own-caught tuna, not bought.

checkpoints.label: Barbarian Village trout/salmon (Hosidius tuna optional continuation)

steps.detail: No formal quest prerequisites, but recreating King Alvis's battleaxe needs Thurgo (Mudskipper Point smith) which can be found either via The Knight's Sword or by asking the Keldagrim librarian then Reldo in Varrock library (no quest completion actually required). Introduces Keldagrim city. Flow: talk Dwarven Boatman, then Commander Veldaban, then Blasidar the sculptor (east Keldagrim) who needs exquisite clothes+boots+a repaired dwarven battleaxe for a statue. Clothes: get a costume book from a bookcase in the library (need <30kg weight to climb), buy coal/logs-spun cloth from Vermundi for 200gp. Boots: steal the left boot from Dromund when he's not looking, telegrab the right boot through his window. Axe: get it from Santiri's weapon shop, socket 3 sapphires, take to Thurgo at Mudskipper Point with an iron bar to repair (may need a redberry pie bribe). Deliver all 3 items to Riki (Blasidar's model) then talk Blasidar for a cutscene. Join the Consortium: pick one company (not Red Axe) upstairs in the market, run ore-delivery fetch-tasks for their secretary (hidden score, 20 points per success, need 100 to progress, wearing full H.A.M. robes gives Purple Pewter a +20 head start), then bar-delivery tasks for the director, then formally join the company and report back to Commander Veldaban to finish. Do not world-hop mid-consortium-grind or progress is lost.

req_items.name: Various ores/bars
req_items.note: for consortium delivery tasks; obtainable in-quest with Smithing 50 or roughly 5000gp/Mining 55

hints.value: mining +2500, smithing +2500, crafting +2500, magic +1500, thieving +1500, firemaking +1500
hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

steps.instruction: Complete The Hand in the Sand
steps.detail: Talk to Bert in Yanille (house next to the POH portal) to get a sandy hand. Buy/bring a beer and give it to the Guard Captain at the Dragon Inn pub south of Bert's house. Ring the bell outside the Wizards' Guild (or enter with 66 Magic) and give the hand to Zavistic Rarve. Get Bert's rota from Bert, travel to Brimhaven, find Sandy south of the Shrimp and Parrot restaurant, search his desk for Sandy's rota, and pickpocket him for sand. Back in Yanille, get a magic scroll from Bert, ring the bell for a magical orb from Zavistic Rarve, who then offers to teleport you to Port Sarim. At Betty's magic shop get bottled water, mix in redberries then white berries (order matters) for pink dye, dye the lantern lens for a rose-tinted lens, then use the lens on the counter from the doorway for a truth serum, and hand over sand. In Brimhaven, distract Sandy with dialogue and use the truth serum on his coffee mug, then activate the magical orb and click through every dialogue option with him. Back in Yanille, ring the bell twice more at the Wizards' Guild (getting a cutscene on the second), sail to Entrana and talk to Mazion at the sandpit for a wizard's head, then return to Yanille and ring the bell/talk to Zavistic Rarve one last time to finish.

steps.detail: Part 2 of the Rise of the Red Axe series (after The Giant Dwarf). Investigate the Red Axe via an extremely drunk, kebab-obsessed dwarf: ply him with beer, fetch a random item requested by a rowdy dwarf, deliver a dwarven stout to Khorvak, then grow kelda seeds in the Kelda Hops Patch (15-20 min real-time wait) and brew them into kelda ale at the East Keldagrim pub vat (another 15-20 min wait) -- plan filler activities like High Alch around the waits. Explore a closed-off minecart tunnel through 6 rooms, including 3 sliding-block cart-track puzzles and a room requiring you to read 3 Red Axe documents. Finish by drinking a beer and eating a kebab back at the eastern pub after reporting to Veldaban.

req_items.note: approximate total coin cost across the quest

req_items.name: Random item from an NPC-specified list

atoms.detail: Speak to Commander Veldaban just west of the Keldagrim bank to begin a cutscene. Don't click the east side of the bridge as the cutscene starts or your character drifts east.

hints.value: I need to know about the Red Axe...

atoms.detail: Produce or otherwise source whichever item the rowdy dwarf asked for; it is randomised per playthrough.

atoms.detail: Head to the White Wolf Mountain tunnel; optionally buy a 100-coin ticket from the Keldagrim Cart Conductor and ride the south minecart track.

hints.value: What if I offer you a drink?

atoms.detail: Optionally buy a Keldagrim ticket from the Cart Conductor (discounted with a Ring of charos) or teleport to the Blast Furnace minigame to get back.

atoms.label: Ask Rind the Gardener for permission
atoms.detail: Speak with Rind the Gardener at the Kelda Hops Patch south-east of the bank before using the patch.

atoms.label: Plant the kelda seeds
atoms.detail: Plant the kelda seeds in the patch; a rake is available just south of it.

atoms.label: Harvest the kelda hops
atoms.detail: Wait for a chat notification that the crop is ready (you can log out while waiting) then harvest the kelda hops.

atoms.label: Buy ale yeast (optional)
atoms.detail: Upstairs in the East Keldagrim pub, buy ale yeast from Blandebir for 25 coins if you didn't bring your own; an empty pot spawns near the vat.

hints.value: Do you have any spare ale yeast?
That's a good deal - please fill my pot with ale yeast for 25GP.

atoms.label: Add water to the vat
atoms.detail: Pour two buckets of water into the vat first.

atoms.label: Add barley malt to the vat
atoms.detail: Add two barley malts to the vat next.

atoms.label: Add kelda hops to the vat
atoms.detail: Add the harvested kelda hops to the vat.

atoms.label: Add ale yeast to the vat
atoms.detail: Add the ale yeast last, in this order: water, barley malt, kelda hops, ale yeast.

atoms.label: Wait for the brew
atoms.detail: Wait for another chat notification (15-20 minutes) that the kelda ale has finished brewing.

atoms.label: Draw the finished ale
atoms.detail: Turn the valve and use an empty beer glass on the barrel to draw the finished kelda ale.

atoms.label: Report the ale to the drunken dwarf
atoms.detail: Return to the drunken dwarf's house north-east of the kebab shop and talk about the Red Axe again.

hints.value: I need to know about the Red Axe...

atoms.label: Ask about the closed-off tunnel
atoms.detail: Talk to the southernmost cart conductor in south-eastern Keldagrim; only one of the conductors will discuss the closed-off tunnel.

atoms.label: Ask your mining company director for help
atoms.detail: Find the director of the mining company you joined during The Giant Dwarf, upstairs in either the west or east marketplace; only your own director has time to talk.

hints.value: Can you help me with a boarded up tunnel?

atoms.label: Ride the southernmost minecart into the tunnel
atoms.detail: Return to the minecarts and ride the southernmost cart; no ticket is needed but both hands must be free.

atoms.label: Search the box in room 1
atoms.detail: Search the box in the first room to collect stones for the cart-track puzzle.

atoms.label: Use the dwarven machinery
atoms.detail: Use the dwarven machinery in room 1 to open the sliding-block cart-track puzzle interface.

atoms.label: Solve the room 1 cart-track puzzle
atoms.detail: Set up each of the three shown paths in turn and click OK, riding the cart and collecting more stones from the box between attempts, to move on to room 2.

atoms.label: Crawl through room 2
atoms.detail: Listen to the conversation, crawl to the other side of room 2, and leave.

atoms.label: Solve the room 3 cart-track puzzle
atoms.detail: Complete the sliding-block cart-track puzzle in room 3 the same way as room 1.

atoms.label: Read the Red Axe documents in room 4
atoms.detail: Search the crates and bookshelves in room 4 until you've read three documents relating to the Red Axe, then continue on.

atoms.label: Solve the room 5 cart-track puzzle
atoms.detail: Complete the sliding-block cart-track puzzle in room 5 the same way as the previous ones. Room 6 is a cutscene with no player action, watched on entry.

atoms.label: Buy a kebab (optional)
atoms.detail: Buy a kebab from the kebab shop in East Keldagrim if you don't already have one.

atoms.label: Buy a beer (optional)
atoms.detail: Buy a beer in the East Keldagrim pub if you don't already have one.

atoms.label: Report the tunnel to Commander Veldaban
atoms.detail: Return to Commander Veldaban west of the bank and report what you found in the tunnel.

atoms.label: Drink the beer
atoms.detail: Back at the eastern pub on the east side of Keldagrim, drink your beer.

atoms.label: Eat the kebab
atoms.detail: Eat your kebab at the eastern pub to complete the quest.

atoms.detail: Take the spirit tree network (the Grand Exchange spirit tree is the fastest hop) to the Gnome Stronghold, then run east.

atoms.label: Confirm membership with Bolongo
atoms.detail: Talk to Bolongo and confirm his Group of Advanced Gardeners membership.

atoms.label: Confirm membership with Prissy Scilla
atoms.detail: Run south-west to the tree patch and talk to Prissy Scilla; confirm her membership.

atoms.label: Travel to Falador Park
atoms.detail: Teleport to Falador (Ring of wealth's Falador option lands directly in the park) and run to the tree patch.

atoms.label: Confirm membership with Heskel
atoms.detail: Talk to Heskel at the Falador Park tree patch; confirm his membership -- this completes the 5-gardener tally.

atoms.label: Report back to Martin
atoms.detail: Return to the Draynor Village market and talk to Martin again to move the quest forward.

atoms.label: Equip a dramen staff or Lunar staff
atoms.detail: Equip a dramen staff or Lunar staff -- required to enter Zanaris; source of the staff itself is outside this quest's own walkthrough ("??" if not already owned from Lost City).

atoms.label: Travel to Zanaris
atoms.detail: Enter the small shack south of Lumbridge Castle in Lumbridge Swamp with the staff equipped to teleport to Zanaris; if the quest spade still needs collecting, enter once without the staff equipped first to grab it.

atoms.label: Ask the Fairy Godfather about the Fairy Queen
atoms.detail: Run to the throne room and talk to the Fairy Godfather; ask where the Fairy Queen is.

atoms.label: Get the symptoms list from Fairy Nuff
atoms.detail: Run north of the bank and talk to Fairy Nuff to receive the Fairy Queen's symptoms list.

atoms.label: Consult Zandar Horfyre
atoms.detail: Speak to Zandar Horfyre on the top floor of the Dark Wizards' Tower, just north of the Makeover Mage.

atoms.label: Fill a druid pouch (recommended)
atoms.detail: Fill a druid pouch before collecting the 3 random items -- it protects any of them that ghasts could otherwise turn to rotten food. Recommended, not strictly required.

atoms.label: Dig up a Draynor skull if needed
atoms.detail: If you don't already have a Draynor skull, travel to Draynor Manor and use a spade on the grave north of the building, within the fence, to dig one up.

atoms.label: Trade the skull for the collection list
atoms.detail: Talk to Malignius Mortifer, the necromancer north-west of Port Sarim's rune shop; give him the Draynor skull to receive the list of 3 required items. Buy secateurs/spade from the nearby farm shop if still missing.

atoms.label: Collect the 3 randomly-assigned items
atoms.detail: Collect the 3 randomly-picked items per your quest journal's list -- the exact items vary per playthrough ("??"); carry the filled druid pouch while gathering any that ghasts could rot.

atoms.label: Travel to the Nature Grotto
atoms.detail: Travel to the Nature Grotto in Mort Myre Swamp via the Shades of Mort'ton minigame teleport, go west, then follow the winding path north over the bridge.

atoms.label: Equip the Ghostspeak amulet
atoms.detail: Equip the Ghostspeak amulet before entering the grotto so the Nature Spirit can be understood.

atoms.label: Trade the items for the Magic secateurs
atoms.detail: Talk to the Nature Spirit inside the grotto and hand over the 3 collected items to receive the Magic secateurs.

atoms.label: Bring food and armour for the Tanglefoot fight
atoms.detail: Bring food and armour before returning to Zanaris to face the Tanglefoot.

atoms.label: Return to Zanaris with the Magic secateurs
atoms.detail: Travel to Zanaris with the Magic secateurs in your inventory.

atoms.label: Squeeze through the gap by the Cosmic Altar
atoms.detail: Run south of the wheat fields to the Cosmic Altar and squeeze through the gap in the western wall.

atoms.label: Equip the Magic secateurs
atoms.detail: Equip the Magic secateurs before entering the tunnel.

atoms.label: Defeat the Tanglefoot
atoms.detail: Run to the end of the tunnel and defeat Tanglefoot; toggle Protect from Melee if the level allows, or lure it around the mushrooms to the east to flinch it.

atoms.label: Pick up the Queen's secateurs
atoms.detail: Pick up the Queen's secateurs dropped by Tanglefoot.

atoms.label: Finish the quest with the Fairy Godfather
atoms.detail: Talk to the Fairy Godfather to complete Fairytale I - Growing Pains.

steps.detail: Earn ecto-tokens at the Ectofuntus, then chase down items for a runaway ghost bride's quest: brew nettle tea for an old crone, repair a toy ship and dye its flag to solve a mast puzzle for a hidden treasure map, dig up the Book of Haricanto after fighting a level-32 giant lobster, win a coin-flip game (Rune-Draw) for a translation manual, and collect 10 ghost signatures on a petition before performing a passing-on ceremony for Necrovarus.

req_items.name: Ecto-tokens
req_items.note: approximate; or bone/pot/bucket to earn them at the Ectofuntus

req_items.name: Nettle tea ingredients
req_items.note: tinderbox, log, closed-finger gloves, bowl of water

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Pray at the Ectofuntus and collect ecto-tokens from the Ghost disciple
atoms.detail: Pray 7 or more times (bring 8 worth of bones/buckets/pots as a buffer) then talk to the Ghost disciple to convert them into ecto-tokens.

hints.value: exact ecto-token yield per prayer is not stated on the fetched page -- left as ?? rather than guessed.

atoms.label: Talk to Velorina inside Port Phasmatys to begin the quest
atoms.detail: She lives in the house just east of the town gates.

hints.value: 1,1,1 (own-words: why is something the matter / yes, a sad story / yes)

atoms.label: Talk to Necrovarus back at the Ectofuntus
atoms.detail: Report to Necrovarus after speaking with Velorina.

atoms.label: Talk to Velorina again to learn where to find the old crone
atoms.detail: Ask her about the woman's whereabouts.

hints.value: 1 (do you know where this woman can be found)

atoms.label: Head to the nettle patch east of Slayer Master Mazchna in Canifis
atoms.detail: The patch sits a few steps east of Mazchna.

atoms.label: Pick at least 5 nettles while wearing gloves
atoms.detail: Wear closed-fingered gloves and pick at least 5 nettles -- the nettle water can boil over easily at low Cooking levels.

hints.value: page suggests picking one extra nettle tea's worth for the optional Skippy and the Mogres miniquest -- dropped as an optional aside, not part of the required checklist.

atoms.label: Brew nettle tea over a fire
atoms.detail: Combine the nettles with a bowl of water and cook it over a fire near the dead tree south-east of the Slayer Tower. Do not drink the tea.

atoms.label: Head to the old crone's house by the water
atoms.detail: North-west of the nettle patch, just east of the Slayer Tower.

atoms.label: Talk to the old crone with nettle tea in your inventory
atoms.detail: Approach her with the brewed tea.

atoms.label: Mix the nettle tea with milk in the porcelain cup
atoms.detail: Put the tea in the porcelain cup and add your bucket of milk to it.

hints.value: the finished mixture is never named on the page -- left as ?? rather than guessed.

atoms.label: Talk to the old crone again
atoms.detail: Hand her the finished mixture.

hints.value: 1,1 (I'm here about Necrovarus / is there anything I can do for you)

atoms.label: Repair the model ship with the needle
atoms.detail: Use the needle on the model ship; this uses up the silk and thread.

atoms.label: Head to the wrecked ship north-west of the Ectofuntus
atoms.detail: It sits directly north of the farming allotment.

atoms.label: Search the mast until the flag's three colours are revealed
atoms.detail: Wait for the wind speed to drop to low, then search the mast repeatedly.

hints.value: the flag colours are randomised per playthrough -- left as an until:state placeholder rather than a fixed guess.

atoms.label: Dye the model ship's flag the correct colours
atoms.detail: Mix dyes as needed and dye each part of the flag to match the colours found on the mast.

atoms.label: Talk to the Old man on the ship deck
atoms.detail: He asks about the toy boat.

atoms.label: Unlock the closed chest in the captain's quarters for the first map scrap
atoms.detail: Use the key on the chest inside the captain's quarters.

atoms.label: Fight the giant lobster on the lowest deck for the second map scrap
atoms.detail: Search the chests on the lowest level until attacked by the level 32 giant lobster; kill it, then search the chest it came from.

atoms.label: Cross the rock path from the gangplank for the third map scrap
atoms.detail: From the north-west side of the deck, walk the gangplank onto the rocks and jump the path (some rocks cost run energy) to a chest at the end.

atoms.label: Assemble the three map scraps into a treasure map
atoms.detail: Fit all three map pieces together.

atoms.label: Pay for passage to Dragontooth Island
atoms.detail: Take the small rowing boat from the docks south-east inside Port Phasmatys; costs 25 ecto-tokens, or 10 with the (Charm) option if carrying a ring of charos (a).

hints.value: cost drops to 10 ecto-tokens with a ring of charos (a) via the Charm dialogue option -- canonical 25-token cost modelled, alt flagged here.

atoms.label: Dig up the book of Haricanto
atoms.detail: Starting at the statue, use the treasure map to find the dig spot and dig with your spade. Make sure you have both a spade and the treasure map, or you waste the ecto-tokens spent on passage.

atoms.label: Return to Port Phasmatys
atoms.detail: Head back into town.

atoms.label: Talk to Ak-Haranu around the docks
atoms.detail: He offers to fetch you a bow.

hints.value: 1 (okay, wait here, I'll get you your bow)

atoms.label: Play Rune-Draw with Robin in the inn until you've won 4 times total
atoms.detail: Wins do not need to be consecutive; once he owes you 100 coins he hands over the signed oak bow.

atoms.label: Receive the signed oak bow from Robin
atoms.detail: He repays his debt with the bow.

atoms.label: Trade the signed oak bow to Ak-Haranu for the translation manual
atoms.detail: Take the bow back to Ak-Haranu.

atoms.label: Ask the ghost innkeeper for a job
atoms.detail: He gives you a bedsheet to dye.

hints.value: 4,1 (do you have any job I can do / yes I'd be delighted)

atoms.label: Buy a bucket of slime from a trader crewmember at the docks
atoms.detail: Trader crewmembers stand at the docks to the east.

atoms.label: Dye the bedsheet with the bucket of slime and wear it
atoms.detail: Use the slime on the bedsheet to dye it into wearable robes.

atoms.label: Equip the dyed bedsheet
atoms.detail: Wear the robes before asking for signatures.

atoms.label: Talk to Gravingas at the town gate about the petition
atoms.detail: He is the ghost activist protesting just inside the gate; he asks for 10 signatures.

hints.value: 1 (after hearing Velorina's story I will be happy to help out)

atoms.label: Collect 10 signatures from ghost villagers around town
atoms.detail: Wear the dyed bedsheet; you can alternate between just two ghosts for all the signatures, and may skip any that ask for ecto-tokens.

atoms.label: Show the completed petition to Necrovarus
atoms.detail: Present all 10 signatures.

atoms.label: Take the dropped key, unlock the door, and take the robes from the coffin
atoms.detail: Necrovarus drops a key; use it on the door upstairs, enter the room, and take his robes from the coffin.

atoms.label: Talk to the old crone one more time
atoms.detail: Report your progress to her.

atoms.label: Talk to Necrovarus at the Ectofuntus to release the ghosts
atoms.detail: Cast the spell using the mystical robes, book of Haricanto and translation manual.

hints.value: 1 (let any ghost who so wishes pass on into the next world)

atoms.label: Talk to Velorina inside Port Phasmatys to finish the quest
atoms.detail: One last conversation to complete the quest.

checkpoints.label: The old crone and some nettle tea

steps.detail: 43 QP gate makes this a mid-game unlock, not an early one. Tell Juna stories to earn a stone bowl recipe, then use a light creature (attracted by the sapphire lantern) to cross the chasm to a rock vein, mine a magic stone, chisel it into a stone bowl, and hand it to Juna to finish. The sapphire lantern doubles as the light source needed to safely navigate the caves and is reusable later for While Guthix Sleeps. Gates While Guthix Sleeps and the Hard Lumbridge & Draynor Diary. Note: 'Tears of Guthix' the quest and 'Tears of Guthix' the repeatable minigame it unlocks are the same wiki title-root but two distinct pages -- cited both above since the depth:04 brief's long-run-value framing refers to the minigame, not the quest itself.

req_items.name: Lit sapphire lantern
req_items.note: or the parts to make one: bullseye lantern/bullseye lantern (unf), cut sapphire, tinderbox, lamp oil from the Rimmington chemist or Dorgesh-Kaan lamp still

req_items.name: Rope
req_items.note: only needed if this is your first entry to the Lumbridge Swamp Caves and you lack The Lost Tribe progress

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Head to the Lumbridge Swamp Caves to find Juna
atoms.detail: If The Lost Tribe is complete, use the Lumbridge Castle cave route instead (no Spiny helmet/Slayer helmet needed): squeeze through the hole, run south past Kazgar, pickaxe the blocked hole and climb through, run south, jump the stepping stones, and enter the south tunnel. A lit Sapphire lantern with oil also saves time.

atoms.label: Talk to Juna
Use a cut sapphire on a Bullseye lantern frame
Light the sapphire lantern with a tinderbox
Climb back up the rock to the north
Use the lit sapphire lantern on a light creature above the chasm
atoms.detail: This lets you cross the chasm.

atoms.label: Mine a rock from the vein
Use a chisel on the stone to shape it into a stone bowl
Climb down the rocks to the east
Talk to Juna and give her the stone bowl to finish the quest

checkpoints.label: Reach Juna in the Chasm of Tears
Craft and deliver the Bowl of Stone

steps.detail: Dialogue-free, environmental-storytelling 'Twisted Tale' quest. Translate a lost lizardman/Old Ones language by finding stone tablets, wood carvings and dirty notes across four hidden dungeons in sequence (Kebos campsite, Lake Molch Island, Xeric's Shrine, Ruins of Morra); each dungeon's translated words unlock the location clue for the next. Concludes revealing the Old Ones performed soul transference before the Citizens of Arceuus ever did. Wiki lists 'Required for completing: Desert Treasure II - The Fallen Empire' (Twisted Tale companion-quest cross-reference, not a normal prerequisite chain).

req_items.name: Secateurs
req_items.note: obtainable in-quest; magic secateurs also work

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Search the tent for Kasonde's journal
atoms.detail: Search the tent at the Kebos campsite (fairy ring code BLS, then head south-east) to find Kasonde's journal and start the quest.

atoms.label: Read Kasonde's journal
atoms.detail: Read the journal to learn about the campsite.

atoms.label: Search the camping equipment for secateurs
atoms.detail: Search the camping equipment nearby to receive a pair of secateurs.

atoms.label: Climb down the nearby hole
atoms.detail: Climb down the hole near the campsite to enter the first hidden dungeon.

atoms.label: Search the first stone table for a stone tablet
atoms.detail: Search the stone table marked '1' to receive the first stone tablet.

atoms.label: Read the first stone tablet and the note
atoms.detail: Read the stone tablet and take the accompanying note to receive the word translations scroll.

atoms.label: Translate the first word set
atoms.detail: Read the word translations scroll, click 'Attempt Translation', and enter the words Island, Water, Time, Vessel, North in order.

atoms.label: Climb up the rope to exit the hole
atoms.detail: Climb the rope to leave the first dungeon.

atoms.label: Travel to Molch Island
atoms.detail: Board Boaty and select Molch Island (or use fairy ring code DJR then head west).

atoms.label: Enter the hole on Molch Island
atoms.detail: Climb down the hole on Molch Island to enter the second dungeon.

atoms.label: Inspect the vines for a dirty note
atoms.detail: Inspect the vines blocking the path to find a dirty note.

atoms.label: Cut the vines with the secateurs and squeeze through
atoms.detail: Cut the vines using the secateurs, then squeeze through the gap.

atoms.label: Search the second stone table for a stone tablet
atoms.detail: Search the stone table marked '1' to receive the second stone tablet.

atoms.label: Read the second stone tablet
atoms.detail: Read the second stone tablet.

atoms.label: Translate the second word set
atoms.detail: Input the words West, Poison, Body, Food, Earth on the word translations scroll.

atoms.label: Climb up the rope to exit the hole
atoms.detail: Climb the rope to leave the second dungeon.

atoms.label: Travel to Xeric's Shrine
atoms.detail: Board Boaty and select Molch, then run west and south to the altar at Xeric's Shrine.

atoms.label: Enter the hole at Xeric's Shrine
atoms.detail: Climb down the hole at Xeric's Shrine to enter the third dungeon.

atoms.label: Search the third stone table for a stone tablet
atoms.detail: Search the stone table marked '1' to receive the third stone tablet.

atoms.label: Read the third stone tablet
atoms.detail: Read the third stone tablet.

atoms.label: Translate the third word set
atoms.detail: Input the words Make, Yes, No, Move, Arrive, East, South on the word translations scroll.

atoms.label: Travel to the Ruins of Morra
atoms.detail: Board Boaty and select Shayzien, then run south to the Ruins of Morra.

atoms.label: Enter the hole at the Ruins of Morra
atoms.detail: Climb down the hole at the Ruins of Morra to enter the fourth and final dungeon.

atoms.label: Search the final stone table for a stone tablet
atoms.detail: Search the stone table marked '1' to receive the fourth and final stone tablet.

atoms.label: Read the final stone tablet
atoms.detail: Read the fourth stone tablet.

atoms.label: Translate the final word set
atoms.detail: Input the words Few, Big, Sun, Moon, Life, Death, Mind, Home, Air, Fire on the word translations scroll.

atoms.label: Re-read the tablet and the warning note to finish
atoms.detail: Read the fourth stone tablet again, then read the warning note to complete the translation and finish the quest.

checkpoints.label: Start at the Kebos campsite and find the first tablet
Translate the first tablet and search Molch Island
Translate the second tablet and reach Xeric's Shrine
Translate the third tablet and reach the Ruins of Morra
Translate the final tablet and finish

steps.detail: Plant ranarr seeds in herb patches with ultracompost; harvest ranarr weed. ~6.5 ranarr per run at 32 Farming with ultracompost. Loop every ~80 minutes.

mapMarkers.label: Falador herb patch (south of Falador, gardener Elstan)
Catherby herb patch (north of Catherby, gardener Dantaera)
Ardougne herb patch (north of Ardougne, gardener Kragen)
Hosidius herb patch (SW corner of Hosidius, gardener Marisi)

hints.value: min 6 w/ ultracompost; ~8.8 avg w/ ultracompost+secateurs+cape
hints.note: Herb_patch: 'using ultracompost...increase the minimum yield to 6 herbs per seed' (with 3 base harvest lives +1 per compost tier, max 6 w/ ultracompost, per the same yield mechanic documented on Guam_seed s2). Herb_patch/Seeds footnote: average-profit column 'Assumes average of 8.8 herbs per seed in a standard (non-protected) herb patch' premised on ultracompost+magic secateurs+farming cape (empirical sample).
RECURRING -- one atom per run, patch route ordered per pps-03-withdraw-herb-run (XREF: bg:pps-03-withdraw-herb-run).

steps.detail: Two-trip Entrana quest that unlocks the balloon transport network -- explicitly a hard prerequisite for Monkey Madness II's Gnome Stronghold route. Trip 1: gather papyrus/candle/dye/silk/sand-filled sacks around Entrana to help Auguste build a balloon frame. Trip 2 (after leaving to gather logs/willow branches, since axes can't be brought to Entrana): attach 12 willow branches and 10 regular logs to the balloon. Piloting is a 3-screen minigame of dropping sandbags, burning logs, pulling coloured ropes, and "relaxing" a set number of times per prompt to control altitude/direction -- crashing just costs 10 more logs and a restart from Auguste. Optionally stockpile extra noted logs (oak/willow/yew/magic) in log storage to unlock further balloon routes post-quest.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Sail to Entrana
atoms.detail: Speak to the monks on the second most northern dock in Port Sarim to sail across to Entrana.

atoms.label: Talk to Auguste to start the quest
atoms.detail: Find Auguste north of the Herblore shop on Entrana and talk to him three times to agree to help build the balloon.

atoms.label: Use papyrus on the ball of wool
atoms.detail: Combine a papyrus with the ball of wool to make a component for the balloon structure.

atoms.label: Light the balloon structure with the candle
atoms.detail: Use the unlit candle on the balloon structure near Auguste.

atoms.label: Talk to Auguste again
atoms.detail: Report back to Auguste after handling the candle and papyrus.

atoms.label: Give Auguste the papyrus and potatoes
atoms.detail: Talk to Auguste again while carrying the remaining two papyrus and a sack of potatoes.

atoms.label: Fill sacks with sand
atoms.detail: Fill the eight empty sacks with sand just south of Auguste's position.

atoms.label: Hand over dye, silk, bowl and sandbags
atoms.detail: Give Auguste a yellow dye, a red dye, ten silk, a bowl and the eight sandbags. A bowl spawns in the house just east of Auguste, up the ladder, if you need one.

atoms.label: Leave Entrana for the remaining supplies
atoms.detail: Axes cannot be brought to Entrana, so leave to gather logs and branches; Pest Control's minigame teleport or the Port Sarim ships both work for banking along the way.

atoms.label: Obtain 12 willow branches
atoms.detail: Trim willow branches with secateurs from a willow tree, including the sapling Auguste can grow, without felling the tree until all branches are collected.

atoms.label: Chop 10 regular logs
atoms.detail: Cut ten regular logs before returning, since axes cannot be carried onto Entrana itself.

atoms.label: Return to Entrana
atoms.detail: Sail back across to Entrana with the branches and logs.

atoms.label: Attach the willow branches to the balloon frame
atoms.detail: Use the willow branches on the balloon frame on the platform near Auguste.

atoms.label: Store spare logs in log storage (optional)
atoms.detail: Optionally bank any extra noted oak, willow, yew or magic logs in log storage to unlock further balloon routes after the quest.

atoms.label: Tell Auguste you're ready to fly
atoms.detail: Talk to Auguste once the frame is fully assembled to begin the flight.

atoms.label: Drop a sandbag
atoms.detail: Screen one of the flight minigame: drop a sandbag to adjust altitude.

atoms.label: Burn a log
atoms.detail: Screen one: burn a log to adjust altitude.

atoms.label: Relax 9 times
atoms.detail: Screen one: click relax nine times in sequence.

atoms.label: Pull the red rope
atoms.detail: Screen one: pull the red steering rope.

atoms.label: Relax 2 times
atoms.detail: Screen one: relax twice more.

atoms.label: Pull the brown rope
atoms.detail: Screen one: pull the brown steering rope.

atoms.label: Relax 5 times
atoms.detail: Screen one: finish with five relaxes.

atoms.label: Burn a log
atoms.detail: Screen two: burn a log.

atoms.label: Relax
atoms.detail: Screen two: relax once.

atoms.label: Burn a log
atoms.detail: Screen two: burn another log.

atoms.label: Relax 10 times
atoms.detail: Screen two: relax ten times.

atoms.label: Burn a log
atoms.detail: Screen two: burn a third log.

atoms.label: Relax 5 times
atoms.detail: Screen two: relax five times to finish.

atoms.label: Relax 7 times
atoms.detail: Screen three: relax seven times.

atoms.label: Pull the red rope
atoms.detail: Screen three: pull the red rope.

atoms.label: Pull the brown rope
atoms.detail: Screen three: pull the brown rope.

atoms.label: Relax 3 times
atoms.detail: Screen three: relax three times.

atoms.label: Burn a log
atoms.detail: Screen three: burn a log.

atoms.label: Relax 4 times
atoms.detail: Screen three: relax four times.

atoms.label: Pull the brown rope
atoms.detail: Screen three: pull the brown rope to land.

atoms.label: Talk to Auguste to finish
atoms.detail: Talk to Auguste after landing to complete the quest. Crashing only costs 10 more logs and a restart from Auguste.

steps.detail: Pick a method: Tree runs (maple) / Herb runs / Allotment runs (watermelon).

methods.location: tree patch circuit
methods.notes: Maple saplings (lvl45) replace willow in the tree run rotation for a larger per-check xp dump.

methods.location: herb patch circuit (3 patches free by default; Morytania/Harmony Island/Hosidius/Farming Guild/Troll Stronghold/Weiss/Civitas illa Fortis add more via quests/diary)
methods.notes: Herbs take 80 minutes to grow; treat patches with ultracompost to reduce disease and guarantee a 6-herb minimum yield with magic secateurs. Specific per-herb level gates live on a separate seed table page, out of this fetch's scope.

methods.location: allotment patch circuit, run alongside herb runs
methods.notes: At Farming 47 players add watermelon allotments alongside herb runs (54.5 xp per harvested watermelon); grow nasturtiums on the flower patch to prevent disease.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw tree-run loadout
atoms.detail: Highest-tier tree saplings available (maple at 45+ per the page's own tree table) + payment coins for the gardener (own-farmed/self-funded, not a GE sapling purchase -- saplings can also be grown from seeds per Farming_training.s7).

atoms.label: Run the tree-patch circuit (check + replant) until Farming 50
atoms.detail: Tree runs are the single most effective Farming xp method per Farming_training.s7 -- pay the gardener to fell the mature tree, replant, check health of grown trees for xp. Passive: only ~5 minutes actively spent per run.

hints.note: RECURRING, ahead-of-time. XREF: farm-ranarr-patch and farm-herb-patch-guam (existing steps.jsonl rows, prayer-pot-supply chain) already run herb/ranarr patches on the same circuit shape and contribute passive Farming xp as a side effect of the same loadout/travel pattern -- reused as concurrent background contributors per U8 rather than re-authored here.

atoms.label: Alt: Allotment runs (watermelon) alongside herb runs
atoms.detail: Unlocks at Farming 47 per Farming_training.s16; 54.5 xp per harvested watermelon, run alongside the existing farm-ranarr-patch herb-run circuit rather than as a dedicated trip.

steps.detail: Prepare a Kelda stew using spiced stew with brown spice boosts. RNG: avg ~5 attempts. Rate: ??

mapMarkers.label: Rohak, tunnel under White Wolf Mountain ({{Map}}-sourced)

hints.note: inspect the frozen dwarf in the Lumbridge Castle dining room to start
Rohak sobers up if fed ales too slowly — bring 2 extra (6 total) as insurance, per the wiki walkthrough.
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Mountain Dwarf

atoms.label: Inspect the frozen dwarf to start
atoms.detail: Inspect the frozen Mountain Dwarf statue in the Lumbridge Castle dining room to begin this chapter.

refs.title: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Mountain Dwarf

atoms.label: Travel to the Rising Sun Inn in Falador
atoms.detail: Head to the Rising Sun Inn next to Falador's west bank to learn the secret ale recipe.

refs.title: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing the Mountain Dwarf

atoms.label: Ask a barmaid about dwarves and ale
atoms.detail: Ask any of the three barmaids about dwarves and ale; she offers the Asgoldian ale secret for 200 coins (cheaper or free with an activated ring of charos, a plain pizza, or a chocolate bar) and explains adding a coin to an Asgarnian ale.

atoms.label: Climb down into the basement

atoms.detail: Bring any cat except an overgrown cat into the basement; each hellrat it catches yields a brown, red, yellow or orange spice worth 1-4 doses, and catching seven evolves the cat into a hellcat.

hints.value: spice colour and dose count per catch are random, 1-4 doses

atoms.label: Cook a trial stew with one dose of a spice colour

atoms.detail: He reports whether the tested dose count is correct or not; work up from 1 to at most 3 doses per colour (max six doses spent per colour to fully confirm).

hints.value: if he says none are right, retry with two doses, then infer three if still wrong

atoms.label: Cook the final stew with all four confirmed spice doses
atoms.detail: Combine the confirmed correct number of doses of all four spice colours into one final stew.

steps.detail: Long quest, mostly farming-timer-gated. Talk to Ellamaria then the Wise Old Man in Draynor (wearing ring of charos) to pass a quiz. Grow seeds for 5 NPCs to trade up to rarer seeds: Lyra (west of Port Phasmatys, fairy ring AJQ) grows onions for orchid seeds; Kragen (north Ardougne, fairy ring BJR) grows cabbages for snowdrop seeds; Elstan (south Falador) grows marigolds for delphinium seeds; Dantaera (Catherby) needs a cutting from the White Tree on Ice Mountain grown in a filled plant pot; Brother Althric (Edgeville monastery) needs the ring of charos(a) thrown down the well then retrieved with a fishing rod, plus rune dust used on a plant cure for diseased vines, for rose seeds; Bernald (behind Burthorpe pub) similarly needs a plant-cure/rune-dust vine cure via Alain at the Taverley tree patch, for vine seeds. Then move two statues via trolley (Lumbridge king statue east across the bridge to the garden's east plinth; Falador Saradomin statue north through the gate, cutscene, to the south plinth). Finally plant everything with compost/supercompost in the garden (10-15 min grow, cannot die), talk to Ellamaria, then King Roald (ring of charos(a) must be equipped or he won't follow) for the finishing cutscene.

req_items.name: Rune dust
req_items.note: hammer/chisel rune essence, or pestle+mortar rune shards

steps.instruction: Pickpocket Master Farmers until ranarr seeds banked
steps.detail: Master Farmer at Draynor market. Keep herb seeds, drop junk seeds. Need one ranarr seed per patch per planned run (patches: Falador, Catherby, Ardougne, Hosidius + Farming Guild if unlocked). Seed rate: ??

hints.note: Seed table is random; bank each ranarr immediately (HC habit).

hints.value: 1/268.75 (or 1/555.83 past Farming 85) inside the herb table, and the herb table itself is only 48/1000 of a successful pickpocket
hints.note: Master Farmer pickpocket chance table (Master_Farmer.s3): 90/240 (low/high out of 256) at level 1-99 normal, level requirement 38. Ranarr seed rate composite: chance-to-hit-herb-table (48/1000) x chance-of-ranarr-within-table (1/268.75) -- exact seeds-per-hour stays '??', not stated as a rate on this page.

steps.instruction: Pickpocket Master Farmer at Draynor Village for guam seed
steps.detail: Pickpocket the Draynor Village Master Farmer until the herb-seed drop table rolls a guam seed -- the item's own page names monsters/seed-packs/master-farmers as its non-GE sources, and Master Farmer is the only one of those that's a repeatable, player-controlled action rather than a random drop.

hints.value: 485/1000 chance to roll the Allotment table is NOT this table -- guam is on the separate 48/1000 Herbs table, then 1/58.36 (or 1/67.2 below Farming 85) within it
hints.note: Master_Farmer Loot section, Herbs subtable; low overall hit rate, this is a background/opportunistic pickpocket target, not a dedicated farming loop.

steps.detail: Firemaking 45 is listed as a requirement but is not actually needed in practice (only used to identify brazier fuel by inspection; trial-and-error works without it). Build a statue for Lazim from 32kg sandstone base + 20kg sandstone body (chiseled down from bigger pieces), pick a head design, carve it from a 5kg granite piece, hand it over and fall into a buried temple. Bottom floor: chisel a fallen statue for 4 limbs, collect M/R/K/Z sigils by walking the outer hallway rooms (limbs auto-consumed to open each door), place all 4 sigils in the center room. Middle floor: mold soft clay + carved 5kg granite into a new stone head for the pedestal (triggers cutscene), then solve 4 corner puzzles - feed food to Pentyn (NW), cast a wind spell on the furnace (NE), light 6 braziers with correct fuel per item (SE), cast a fire spell on the fountain (SW) - to pass the magic barrier. Top floor: cast Crumble Undead on a boneguard, then Protect-from-Melee-tank while talking to a second boneguard, patch a wall with 3 sandstone pieces (chisel each into place) to finish. Region-opener quest, no known deeper dependency; unlocks quick desert-temple teleport infrastructure via Camulet.

req_items.name: food item (bread/pie/cake/pizza/baked potato)
req_items.note: must not be partial or burnt

req_items.name: logs (regular, oak, willow, and maple)
req_items.note: one of each tier needed for the brazier puzzle

req_items.name: soft clay, coal, 52kg sandstone, and two 5kg granite
runes for a Fire spell, a Wind spell, and Crumble Undead
req_items.note: any tier of Fire Bolt/Blast/Wave and Wind Bolt/Blast/Wave works

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Lazim to start the statue-building task
atoms.detail: Approach Lazim, north-east of the Bandit Camp Quarry, and accept the job through the dialogue.

hints.value: Of course! / Okay, I'll get on with it.

atoms.label: Gather 32kg of sandstone for the statue base
atoms.detail: Collect sandstone in any combination of pieces totalling 32kg (weight, not a piece count); big pieces can be broken down with a chisel.

atoms.label: Chisel the 32kg of sandstone into the statue base
atoms.detail: Use a chisel on the assembled 32kg of sandstone and place the finished base on the flat ground to start the statue.

atoms.label: Gather 20kg of sandstone for the statue body
atoms.detail: Repeat the sandstone collection for the body piece, again as a 20kg weight total rather than a fixed piece count.

atoms.label: Chisel the 20kg of sandstone into the statue body
atoms.detail: Chisel the assembled 20kg of sandstone into the body and set it onto the base, then chisel the combined statue to finish shaping it.

atoms.label: Talk to Lazim and choose a head design
atoms.detail: Talk to Lazim and pick any head design for the statue; remember which one is chosen, since a wrong head must be remade.

atoms.label: Mine two 5kg granite pieces
atoms.detail: Mine granite (not sandstone) for the head: one 5kg piece is carved now, the other is carried to the middle floor for later. Ironman accounts mine a third piece of any size for King's Ransom (out of scope here).

atoms.label: Carve the chosen head from a 5kg granite piece
atoms.detail: Chisel one of the 5kg granite pieces into the head design chosen earlier and give it to Lazim to fit onto the statue.

atoms.label: Top up clay or coal if not already carried
atoms.detail: Only needed if not already carrying soft clay or coal: mine some now, since both are needed on the middle floor later.

hints.value: conditional — skip if already carrying clay and coal

atoms.label: Talk to Lazim to fall into the buried temple
atoms.detail: Hand over the finished statue by talking to Lazim, which triggers the fall into the temple below.

atoms.label: Talk to Lazim on the bottom floor
atoms.detail: Talk to Lazim after landing. Optionally climb the ladder and sand pile next to the statue now to unlock exiting/entering the temple from any outer room later.

hints.value: optional shortcut — climb ladder+sand pile now for later outer-room access

atoms.label: Chisel the fallen statue four times for its limbs
atoms.detail: Use a chisel on the fallen statue four times to collect all four limbs.

atoms.label: Talk to Lazim again to retrieve the statue head
atoms.detail: Talk to Lazim a second time to get the fallen statue's head.

atoms.label: Take the M sigil from the pedestal
atoms.detail: Take the M sigil from the pedestal south of Lazim; this step can be skipped and returned to later if short on inventory space.

atoms.label: Collect the R, K and Z sigils around the outer hallways
atoms.detail: Walk the outer hallway rooms to pick up the R, K and Z sigils; the matching limb is automatically used and consumed to open each door.

atoms.label: Head to the centre room
atoms.detail: Once all four sigils are collected, walk to the centre room of the bottom floor.

atoms.label: Place all four sigils to open the centre doors
atoms.detail: Try to open each door with its sigil, completing the dialogue each time.

atoms.label: Climb the ladder to the middle floor
atoms.detail: Climb the ladder up from the centre room to reach the middle floor.

atoms.label: Use soft clay on the pedestal
atoms.detail: Mould soft clay onto the pedestal; cast a fire spell on the frozen fountain first if a water source is still needed for the clay.

atoms.label: Chisel the remaining 5kg granite piece
atoms.detail: Chisel the second 5kg granite piece (carried from the statue build) into a new stone head for the pedestal.

atoms.label: Fit the new stone head onto the pedestal
atoms.detail: Place the newly carved head into the pedestal — the original head is slightly too small, but the new one fits and triggers a cutscene; finish the dialogue.

atoms.label: Feed Pentyn in the north-west corner
atoms.detail: Use bread, cake or pie on Pentyn; right-click again on Pentyn if the food is applied to the spell instead.

hints.value: It's okay, I don't need any help.

atoms.label: Cast a wind spell on the furnace in the north-east corner
atoms.detail: Cast Wind Bolt, Wind Blast, Wind Wave or Wind Surge on the furnace.

atoms.label: Cast a fire spell on the fountain in the south-west corner
atoms.detail: Cast Fire Bolt, Fire Blast, Fire Wave or Fire Surge on the frozen fountain.

atoms.label: Light all six braziers in the south-east corner
atoms.detail: Light the six braziers with their fuels; each brazier needs a specific fuel from logs, oak logs, willow logs, maple logs, a candle or coal — the quick guide does not spell out which fuel matches which brazier, so match by trial and error or a per-brazier hint.

hints.value: exact fuel-to-brazier pairing is not stated on the fetched page — "??"

atoms.label: Pass the magic barrier and climb to the top floor
atoms.detail: With all four corner puzzles solved, walk through the now-open magic barrier and climb the ladder; talk to Lazim if the barrier still won't open.

atoms.label: Cast Crumble Undead on the first boneguard
atoms.detail: Cast Crumble Undead on the boneguard blocking the way to destroy it and open the path south.

atoms.label: Climb down the stone ladder to the south
atoms.detail: Climb down the stone ladder south of the defeated boneguard.

atoms.label: Turn on Protect from Melee
atoms.detail: Activate the Protect from Melee prayer before approaching the second boneguard.

atoms.label: Talk to the second boneguard
atoms.detail: With Protect from Melee active, talk to the new boneguard.

hints.value: Of course, I'll help you out. / Okay, I'll start building.

atoms.label: Take three sandstones from the rubble pile
atoms.detail: Collect three sandstone pieces from the nearby rubble pile.

atoms.label: Patch the southern wall with sandstone
atoms.detail: Use a sandstone piece on the southern wall, then chisel it into place; repeat for all three pieces to complete the repair.

atoms.label: Talk to the boneguard to finish the quest
atoms.detail: Talk to the boneguard again to complete Enakhra's Lament.

checkpoints.label: Solve the middle floor's four corner puzzles

steps.detail: Pick a method: Blast Furnace — gold bars, wearing goldsmith gauntlets / Giants' Foundry — forge Steel/Mithril alloy swords for Kovac / Anvil smithing — steel platebodies (no goldsmith gauntlets needed) / Smithing steel cannonballs (ammo mould).

methods.method: Blast Furnace — gold bars, wearing goldsmith gauntlets
methods.location: Blast Furnace, Keldagrim

quests: The Giant Dwarf (started, for Keldagrim access via the Dwarven Boatman)

methods.notes: 380,000 xp/h is the guide's stated rate wearing goldsmith gauntlets (56.2 xp/ore vs 22.5 without). Ice gloves speed up banking further but are an optional accessory, not gated as required.

methods.method: Giants' Foundry — forge Steel/Mithril alloy swords for Kovac
methods.location: Giants' Foundry minigame
methods.notes: 164,640 xp/h is the guide's stated rate for the steel/mithril alloy tier, which unlocks at Smithing 50.

methods.method: Anvil smithing — steel platebodies (no goldsmith gauntlets needed)
methods.location: Any anvil (not location-specific in this section)
methods.notes: Guide frames this as the fallback for accounts that lack goldsmith gauntlets; 144,000 xp/h covers levels 48-68 on steel platebodies, so it only applies to the tail of this band.

methods.location: Any furnace with an ammo mould

items: Ammo mould (or double ammo mould for 27,648 xp/h)

methods.notes: Low-attention, usually profitable, but much slower xp than the other options; unlocks at Smithing 35. Membership status of the ammo mould source is not stated in this section, left ??.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw pickaxe + hammer
atoms.detail: Pickaxe equipped for mining, hammer for the anvil.

atoms.label: Mine iron ore and coal
atoms.detail: Own-mined, never bought. Exact mining site not pinned -- Mining level reached by this route position (train-mining-45, earlier in the previous segment) may not meet the Mining Guild's 60 requirement, so left as a generic iron+coal deposit rather than assuming Guild access.

atoms.label: Smelt steel bars
atoms.detail: 1 iron ore + 2 coal -> 1 steel bar at a furnace (own-mined inputs).

atoms.label: Smith steel platebodies at an anvil until Smithing 60
atoms.detail: 144,000 xp/h per Pay-to-play_Smithing_training.s10's own table (48-68 band, this training band covers 40-60 as a sub-range); no goldsmith gauntlets needed, unlike the coarse row's own recommended Blast Furnace gold-bar method.

hints.note: Smithed platebodies can feed a later High Level Alchemy loop (train-magic-70's tmg70-02, own-produced fodder) instead of GE sale.

checkpoints.label: Self-sufficient anvil smithing (mine -> smelt -> smith), gather/produce only

steps.detail: Cook raw monkfish on a range. Stop burning at 92 (68 with cooking gauntlets). Terminal step of the monkfish food supply chain.

hints.note: 1 raw_monkfish -> 1 food_monkfish per action (ticks=1, facilities=Cooking range). Ref: Monkfish Creation.
Wearing cooking gauntlets lowers the stop-burning level; see notes for the full table.

atoms.detail: Wear ice gloves to avoid up to 50 damage from the flambe; an antifire potion plus anti-dragon shield is a substitute.
