atoms.label: Rub the dragon token to summon K'klik
atoms.detail: While in Lumbridge or Zanaris, rub the token; K'klik appears and flambes the brulee into a brulee supreme.

hints.value: could I just keep your token exits the flambe scene early if ice gloves were forgotten

refs.title: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Sir Amik Varze

atoms.label: Deliver the brulee supreme to Sir Amik Varze
atoms.detail: Return to Lumbridge Castle and give him the finished brulee supreme to complete the subquest.

refs.title: Recipe for Disaster/Freeing Sir Amik Varze

checkpoints.label: Learn the recipe from the Cook
Prepare the milk, cornflour and vanilla base
Hunt the Evil Chicken's egg past a black dragon
Flambe and deliver the brulee supreme

steps.detail: Requires Icthlarin's Little Helper and Gertrude's Cat complete, plus The Giant Dwarf started for Keldagrim access. Your cat catches rats through five vignettes across the map: sneak it past guards in an Ardougne mansion to nab 6 rats, poison cheese to lure rats from a Varrock warehouse's holes, smoke a rat hole in Keldagrim with a lit weed pot, meet Felkrash in Port Sarim's rat pits, then learn animal charming from Ali the Snake Charmer in Pollnivneach (an 8-note sequence: D G E F# B(+octave) C# A) to finish.

req_items.name: Rat poison
req_items.note: or ingredients to make it: empty vial, cleaned kwuarm, red spiders' eggs

req_items.name: Snake charm
req_items.note: from The Feud or obtained in-quest

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Gertrude to begin the quest
Talk to Phingspet or Grimesquit in the Varrock Sewers
Catch 8 rats by letting your cat chase them down
Talk to the sisters again to finish this errand
Talk to Jimmy Dazzler in the house west of the Ardougne pub
Read the directions to find the mansion
Go west then north around to the back of the mansion and climb the trellis to the upper floor
atoms.detail: Guards notice you by proximity and line of sight; getting caught respawns you here but does not reset caught rats.

atoms.label: Catch 1 rat in the upstairs north-west room
Sneak into the north-east room and wait for both guards to step out together before running to the south-east room
atoms.detail: World-hop to find guards that sync up if they never step out together.

atoms.label: Catch 2 rats in the upstairs south-east room, then climb down the ladder
Catch the 3 combined rats in the downstairs south-east and north-east rooms
Climb back down the trellis or teleport back to Ardougne
Talk to Jimmy Dazzler to complete this errand
Talk to Hooknosed Jack near the Varrock rat pits manhole
atoms.detail: He makes you rat poison from kwuarm, red spiders' eggs, and an empty vial (or bring pre-made rat poison).

atoms.label: Run south to the abandoned building and climb the ladder
Use rat poison on cheese pieces, then use the poisoned cheese on the 4 rat holes
Talk to Hooknosed Jack
Talk to the Apothecary south-west of Varrock Square

hints.value: 2 then 1 (or 3 then 1 if Dragon Slayer II / A Tail of Two Cats is complete, or One Small Favour is in progress)

atoms.label: Return and talk to Hooknosed Jack
Head back to the top of the abandoned building
Pick up your cat and use it on the corner hole in the wall
Use fish on the hole in the wall (not on the cat) to heal it while it fights
atoms.detail: Raw karambwanji work too and preserve inventory space.

atoms.label: Talk to Hooknosed Jack to finish this errand
Head to Keldagrim via the north-western Grand Exchange trapdoor or the Blast Furnace minigame teleport
atoms.detail: Requires The Giant Dwarf to have been started.

atoms.label: Talk to Smokin' Joe east of the Keldagrim mining shop
Use weeds on a pot and light it with a tinderbox
Drop your cat, then use the smouldering pot on the rat hole east of Smokin' Joe
Try again and accept your cat's help while wearing the catspeak amulet
atoms.detail: Not required if Dragon Slayer II is complete.

atoms.label: Talk to Smokin' Joe to finish this errand
Head to Port Sarim
Climb down the nearby manhole to enter the rat pits
Talk to Felkrash in the east room
Exit the rat pits and talk to The Face
Head to Ali (or Badir) the Snake Charmer in Pollnivneach, just south of the pub
Put a coin in his pot and ask him about animal charming
atoms.detail: Skip this if you already own a snake charm from The Feud.

hints.value: I want to talk to you about animal charming. / What if I offered you some money? / Forget about it, I don't care. / Walk away slowly / Stop

atoms.label: Return to the Port Sarim manhole without descending, then remove items from your hand slots
Play the snake charm's 8-note sequence: D, G, E, F#, D raised an octave, B, C#, A
atoms.detail: Select one note per page across all 8 pages, then press play to trigger the cutscene.

atoms.label: Return and talk to Felkrash in the rat pits to complete the quest

checkpoints.label: Smoke out Hooknosed Jack's warehouse rats
Smoke Smokin' Joe's Keldagrim rat hole
Learn animal charming from the Snake Charmer

steps.detail: Direct sequel to Dwarf Cannon. Cross the river to Dondakan via the Dwarven Ferryman, then collect 3 Dwarven lore book pages in the Dwarven Mine (kill scorpions, search mine carts, mine any non-Adamantite/Coal rock). Make a golden cannonball (gold bar smelted at a furnace) and fire it at Dondakan's rock to get a Schematic; combine it with base schematics from the lore book and further schematics from the Dwarf Engineer, then smith a gold helmet. Final battle: equip the gold helmet + best pickaxe, mine 6 or 15 gold ore inside the arena (15 lowers the boss from level 125 to 75), then fight one of three Arzinian Avatar variants (chosen by your highest combat stat) within an 8-minute time limit -- removing the helmet mid-fight aborts the attempt. Talk to Dondakan again to finish.

req_items.name: Ammo mould
req_items.note: buyable in-quest for 5 coins; a double ammo mould also works

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Travel to the Dwarven Ferryman
atoms.detail: Reach the ferryman via the tunnel and cave just south of the Polar Hunter area (fairy ring code DKS), or via the Dwarven Boatman's Travel option from northern Keldagrim.

atoms.label: Pay or travel across the river with the Dwarven Ferryman
atoms.detail: Use a Ring of charos (a) to charm a free crossing, or pay coins/use the Travel option instead.

hints.value: 3(Charm) I don't have any money on me.

atoms.label: Talk to Dondakan
atoms.detail: Cross the bridges north then east past the second wooden bridge to find Dondakan firing a cannon at a rock wall.

hints.value: 2Why are you firing a cannon at a wall?
1So why were you trying to get through the rock again?

atoms.label: Travel to western Keldagrim
atoms.detail: Head to the Trading Consortium's palace smithing shop in western Keldagrim; the Dwarven Boatman gives a quick shortcut there and back.

atoms.label: Talk to the Dwarf Engineer
atoms.detail: Speak to the Dwarf Engineer in the Trading Consortium's palace smithing shop.

atoms.label: Travel to the Dwarven Mine's Ice Mountain entrance
atoms.detail: Head to the Ice Mountain side entrance of the Dwarven Mine.

atoms.label: Talk to Rolad
atoms.detail: Rolad is in the east house at the mine entrance; the conversation disengages once then re-engages.

atoms.label: Optionally buy an Ammo mould from Nulodion
atoms.detail: Nulodion sells the Ammo mould needed later to cast the golden cannon ball, useful if one was not kept from Dwarf Cannon.

atoms.label: Go down the trapdoor into the Dwarven Mine
atoms.detail: Descend into the mine proper to start collecting lore-book pages.

atoms.label: Kill scorpions for Book page 1
atoms.detail: Fight scorpions in the Dwarven Mine until Book page 1 drops.

atoms.label: Search mine carts for Book page 2
atoms.detail: Search the mine carts scattered through the Dwarven Mine until Book page 2 turns up.

atoms.label: Mine any non-Adamantite/Coal rock for Book page 3
atoms.detail: Mine any rock in the Dwarven Mine except Adamantite or Coal until Book page 3 appears.

atoms.label: Return to Rolad
atoms.detail: Report back to Rolad; lie about how it went. Dialogue disengages then re-engages again.

atoms.label: Read the Dwarven lore book
atoms.detail: Read the Dwarven lore book cover to cover and keep it; it is needed again later for the base schematics.

atoms.label: Return to Dondakan at the Keldagrim mines
atoms.detail: Head back to the Keldagrim mines to talk to Dondakan.

atoms.label: Use a gold bar on Dondakan
atoms.detail: Hand Dondakan a gold bar to set up the golden cannonball plan.

atoms.label: Travel to a furnace
atoms.detail: Any furnace works; Edgeville is recommended for easy fairy-ring or Keldagrim-minecart access.

atoms.label: Smelt the golden cannon ball
atoms.detail: Use a gold bar on the furnace, with an Ammo mould held, to cast a golden cannon ball.

atoms.label: Fire the golden cannon ball at Dondakan's rock
atoms.detail: Use the golden cannon ball on Dondakan to receive a Schematic.

hints.value: 1Yes, I'm sure this will crack open the rock.
1So you want to... fire me into the rock?
2I can't argue with that, shoot me in!

atoms.label: Read the Dwarven lore book again
atoms.detail: Re-read the Dwarven lore book to receive the base schematics.

atoms.label: Collect the Engineer's schematics
atoms.detail: Return to the Dwarf Engineer at the Western Trade Consortium for their schematics.

atoms.label: Smith the gold helmet
atoms.detail: Use a gold bar on the nearby anvil to make a gold helmet; smithing it in the Wilderness Resource Area also completes a Wilderness Diary Medium task.

atoms.label: Travel to the pub in the White Wolf Mountain passage
atoms.detail: Head to the pub inside the White Wolf Mountain passage tunnel.

atoms.label: Talk to Khorvak
atoms.detail: Speak to Khorvak at the pub about the schematics.

hints.value: 1No, I've had enough of buying drinks for people!

atoms.label: Assemble the completed Schematic
atoms.detail: Combine the Dondakan Schematic, the Dwarf Engineer's Schematics, and the Base schematics per the in-game diagram.

atoms.label: Equip the gold helmet and best pickaxe
atoms.detail: Gear up with the gold helmet and your best wieldable pickaxe before entering the arena.

atoms.label: Start the final battle with Dondakan
atoms.detail: Talk to Dondakan with the completed Schematic to begin; an 8-minute timer starts and removing the gold helmet mid-fight aborts the attempt, teleporting you out.

atoms.label: Mine gold ore inside the arena
atoms.detail: Mine 6 or 15 gold ore and keep it in the inventory; getting 15 lowers the Arzinian Avatar from level 125 to 75, recommended for lower-level players.

atoms.label: Pass through the first set of flames
atoms.detail: Walk to the centre of the area and go through the first set of flames.

atoms.label: Talk to the second set of flames
atoms.detail: Interact with the second set of flames to trigger the boss encounter.

atoms.label: Defeat the Arzinian Avatar
atoms.detail: The avatar variant is chosen by your highest combat stat: Magic avatar if melee is highest, Ranged avatar if Magic is highest, Strength avatar if Ranged is highest -- gear and pray accordingly.

atoms.label: Talk to Dondakan to finish
atoms.detail: Report to Dondakan a final time to complete Between a Rock...

steps.detail: Must beat 3 level-75 golems (white/grey/black), each weak to a different melee style (stab/slash/crush respectively) or a ranged/magic water-channel puzzle. Talk Awusah then Ghaslor the Elder for the ballad, find torn robe top+bottom in a cupboard, repair with needle+thread and equip (Robes of Elidinis), telegrab an ancestral key. Follow the river north to a waterfall cave, rope the overhanging root, use the ancestral key wearing the robes to open the door. Kill white golem (stab) then clear its water channel via Thieving; kill grey golem (slash) then clear via pickaxe; kill black golem (crush) then clear via Ranged/Magic on a target. Talk to a spirit through the north door, return to Nardah. Separately: take a genie's shoes by Awusah's door, knife them for a sole, find a crevice west of the general store, rope it, talk to and strike a deal with the Genie for a statuette, then place the statuette on the shrine plinth north of the fountain to finish. Region-opener (Nardah/desert), no known deeper dependency; useful all-purpose restoration shrine unlock.

req_items.name: Crush/stab/slash weapons
req_items.note: one weapon of each combat style, or a spear/hasta/bladed staff that covers all 3

req_items.name: Ranged or Magic attack method
req_items.note: 37 Ranged is needed even for the magic option

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Awusah the Mayor in Nardah to start
atoms.detail: Awusah explains the town's curse and river-spirit trouble.

atoms.label: Head to Ghaslor the Elder's house to the north
atoms.detail: Ghaslor lives north of Awusah's location.

atoms.label: Talk to Ghaslor the Elder and receive the ballad
atoms.detail: Ask about the town's curse to learn about the river spirits and receive the ballad.

hints.value: 1I am trying to find out the cause of this town's curse.

atoms.label: Head to the building north of the fountain, west of Ghaslor's house
atoms.detail: The torn robe pieces are hidden inside this building.

atoms.label: Search the north-west cupboard for the torn robe pieces
atoms.detail: Search twice if needed to find both the torn robe top and bottom.

atoms.label: Repair the torn robes with a needle and thread
atoms.detail: Mend both pieces into the wearable robes of Elidinis.

atoms.label: Equip the robes of Elidinis
atoms.detail: Wear both pieces; the golem-area door only opens while both are worn.

atoms.label: Telegrab the ancestral key on the east table
atoms.detail: Cast Telekinetic Grab to pull the key off the table without touching it.

atoms.label: Follow the River Elid north to the waterfall cave
atoms.detail: The cave entrance sits behind a waterfall; alternatively teleport to Eagle's Eyrie with a necklace of passage and go south-west.

atoms.label: Rope the overhanging root at the cave mouth
atoms.detail: Attach the rope to climb down into the dungeon.

atoms.label: Use the ancestral key on the door while wearing the robes of Elidinis
atoms.detail: Both robe pieces must be equipped or the door will not open; talk to Ghaslor again if it still won't.

hints.value: robes of elidinis must be equipped

atoms.label: Kill the white golem to the south
atoms.detail: It is weak to stab weapons.

atoms.label: Clear the water channel in the white golem's room via Thieving
atoms.detail: Use the Thieving skill on the channel mechanism to clear it.

atoms.label: Kill the grey golem to the east
atoms.detail: It is weak to slash weapons.

atoms.label: Clear the water channel in the grey golem's room with a pickaxe
atoms.detail: Use a pickaxe on the channel mechanism to clear it.

atoms.label: Kill the black golem to the north-east
atoms.detail: It is weak to crush weapons.

atoms.label: Clear the water channel in the black golem's room with Ranged or Magic
atoms.detail: Attack the target on the far side of the channel; 37 Ranged is required even when using Magic.

atoms.label: Talk to the spirit through the north door
atoms.detail: Explain you're an emissary from Nardah and ask about restoring the fountain.

hints.value: 4I come as an emissary from the people of Nardah.
1Is there anything they can do to get their fountain working again?

atoms.label: Head back to Nardah
atoms.detail: Return south to Nardah.

atoms.label: Talk to Awusah the Mayor again
atoms.detail: Begin the Genie side of the quest.

atoms.label: Take the shoes by Awusah's door
Cut the sole from the shoes with a knife outside the house
atoms.detail: Must be done outside the house.

atoms.label: Head west from the Nardah General Store to a crevice
atoms.detail: Bring a light source before entering.

atoms.label: Rope the crevice and head through the door to the north
Talk to the Genie and strike a deal for the statuette
atoms.detail: Visiting the Genie counts as a Medium Desert Diary task.

hints.value: 1I'm after a statue that was thrown down here.
1Maybe I can make a deal for it?

atoms.label: Talk to the Genie again to receive the statuette
Head back to Nardah, to the shrine north of the fountain
Place the statuette on the shrine plinth to finish the quest
atoms.detail: Placing the statuette on the Shrine to Elidinis completes the quest.

checkpoints.label: Get the ballad and repair the ancestral robes
Defeat the three golems and clear their channels
Trade with the genie and restore the shrine

steps.detail: Must be able to defeat a level 84 Fire Warrior of Lesarkus with Ranged. Choice quest with a good path (side with Guardians of Armadyl, kill Lucien level 14) or evil path (steal the Staff of Armadyl for Lucien, may need to kill a safespottable level 43 Guardian of Armadyl). Enter the temple dungeon south of the Ranging Guild; get boots of lightness from behind a web (needs light source+knife), equip Pendant of Lucien to pass the north gate, cross a lava bridge at -1kg or less, take a lever, cross back and attach the lever to a bracket then pull it, loot ice arrows from chests along an icy path (16 arrows enough with Ava's + 60 Ranged). Go back through the north gate, search-and-pull another lever (needs 42 Thieving), fight through to the Fire Warrior of Lesarkus (level 84, kill with ice arrows, Protect from Magic negates damage), then hand Winelda 20 unnoted limpwurt roots at once to be teleported across the lava (one-way, no going back - caution for ironmen). Optionally grab a shiny key for a dungeon shortcut. Push through to the Guardians of Armadyl room and pick a side to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Lucien at the Flying Horse Inn in north-west East Ardougne
atoms.detail: He asks you to retrieve the Staff of Armadyl and hands you his pendant.

hints.value: Why can't you get it yourself?

atoms.label: Enter the temple dungeon south of the Ranging Guild
atoms.detail: Climb down the ladder to get inside.

atoms.label: Slash the web downstairs to the west and take the boots of lightness
atoms.detail: Needs a light source plus a knife or slash weapon.

atoms.label: Equip the boots of lightness
atoms.detail: They reduce carried weight by 4.5kg, needed for the lava bridge crossing.

atoms.label: Equip the Pendant of Lucien
atoms.detail: Required to pass through the temple's north gate.

atoms.label: Go back upstairs and through the north gate
atoms.detail: The pendant must be equipped to pass.

atoms.label: Cross the lava bridge
atoms.detail: You must weigh -1kg or less (the boots alone are enough) or you'll fail and take 20 damage.

atoms.label: Open the large door beyond the bridge
Take the lever inside
Cross the lava bridge again to head back
Attach the lever to the bracket on the wall west of the entry ladder
Pull the attached lever
atoms.detail: Triggers hidden machinery somewhere in the dungeon.

atoms.label: Go through the south gate and follow the icy path
Search chests along the icy path for ice arrows
atoms.detail: 16 arrows is enough with Ava's device and 60+ Ranged; re-search a chest right after it drops an arrow since the same chest can hit multiple times in a row, and search every chest to reset them (world-hopping no longer works for that).

atoms.label: Head back through the north gate (pendant equipped) and continue north to a small lever room
Search the lever for traps, then pull it
atoms.detail: Requires 42 Thieving.

atoms.label: Go west then north through the doors
Kill the Fire Warrior of Lesarkus (level 84) with ice arrows
atoms.detail: He spawns automatically when you try the second door; Protect from Magic negates his damage. Requires Ranged 40 to wield the ice-arrow bow; 60+ is recommended for efficient arrow farming above.

atoms.label: Give Winelda 20 unnoted limpwurt roots all at once
atoms.detail: She teleports you across the lava; this is one-way, so ultimate ironmen must be careful not to be juggling items when it triggers.

atoms.label: Optional: follow the path to its end and take the shiny key
atoms.detail: Opens a dungeon shortcut from McGrubor's Wood.

hints.value: Optional — not required to finish the quest.

atoms.label: Push the wall to the north into the Guardians of Armadyl room
atoms.detail: You now choose a side: the walkthrough below follows the good path (siding with the Guardians); the evil path instead has you take the Staff of Armadyl straight off the table, possibly fighting a safespottable level 43 Guardian of Armadyl, then handing the staff to Lucien.

hints.value: Evil-path alternative folded in here rather than atomized separately: grab the staff (may require killing a level 43 Guardian), then give it to Lucien west of the Grand Exchange.

atoms.label: Remove the Pendant of Lucien
atoms.detail: Required before approaching a Guardian of Armadyl on the good path.

atoms.label: Talk to a Guardian of Armadyl
atoms.detail: Convince them you'll help rather than steal the staff for Lucien.

hints.value: I seek the Staff of Armadyl.
Lucien will give me a grand reward for it!
You're right, it's time for my yearly bath.

atoms.label: Receive the Armadyl pendant from the Guardian in place of Lucien's pendant
atoms.detail: The walkthrough doesn't spell out the exact hand-off, only that you now carry an Armadyl pendant instead.

hints.value: Item swap inferred from the walkthrough's wording change (Pendant of Lucien -> Armadyl pendant); the exact hand-off action isn't spelled out.

atoms.label: Enter the building west of the Grand Exchange wearing the Armadyl pendant
Kill Lucien (level 14)
atoms.detail: Completes the good path and the quest.

checkpoints.label: Navigate the temple: boots, lava bridge, lever, ice arrows
Fight the Fire Warrior of Lesarkus and cross the lava
Choose a side with the Guardians of Armadyl (good path shown)

steps.detail: Required for RFD Pirate Pete. Moderate quest on Braindeath Island.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Pirate Pete at the dock to start
atoms.detail: Pirate Pete waits at the dock north-east of the Ectofuntus; agree to help him, agree past his Barrelor warning, then refuse the money he offers before he knocks you out and rows you off.

atoms.label: Wake up and talk to Captain Braindeath
atoms.detail: A cutscene reveals Pete's story was fabricated; you wake in the rum brewery on Braindeath Island and Captain Braindeath explains the zombie-pirate siege and the rum plan.

atoms.label: Take the rake and seed dibber from the basement cupboard
atoms.detail: If not already held, go down the north-west ladder to the basement and head south-east past the spiders to a cupboard.

atoms.label: Intimidate zombie swabs blocking the farming patches
atoms.detail: Leave via the southernmost stairway; if attacked by zombie swabs, walk out of combat and right-click Intimidate to permanently stop them attacking.

atoms.label: Rake and plant the blindweed seed
atoms.detail: Use the rake on the only usable (south-eastern) patch to clear weeds, then plant Braindeath's seed with the dibber.

atoms.label: Harvest the grown blindweed
atoms.detail: Wait for the "I wonder how my blindweed is coming along..." notification, then harvest. If lost afterward, Braindeath supplies a backup.

atoms.label: Add blindweed to the hopper upstairs
atoms.detail: Climb the south-eastern ladder and use the blindweed on the north-western hopper.

atoms.label: Ask Braindeath for the next ingredient (stagnant water)
atoms.detail: He hands over a bucket if not already held and sends you to a nearby volcano.

atoms.label: Fill the bucket with stagnant water at the volcano
atoms.detail: Exit south then west past 50% Luke's gate (Ring of charos (a) or a tinderbox on him for optional dialogue) and up the volcano.

atoms.label: Pour the stagnant water into the hopper
atoms.detail: Return to the house and add the water to the hopper, then talk to Braindeath.

atoms.label: Catch 5 sluglings (or karamthulhu) at the nearby fishing spot
atoms.detail: Braindeath hands over a fishbowl tangled in a net (use them on each other if untangled). Fish at the spot by the farming patch.

atoms.label: Add the sluglings to the pressure barrel and pull the lever
atoms.detail: Upstairs next to the hopper; pulling the lever sets the brewing apparatus spinning.

atoms.label: Get the wrench blessed by Davey
atoms.detail: Former priest Davey, west side of the house, only blesses the wrench with 47+ available Prayer points (does not drain Prayer).

atoms.label: Beat the possessed controls and kill the Evil spirit
atoms.detail: Hit the controls south of Braindeath with the blessed wrench; a level-150 Evil spirit attacks — negate with Protect from Melee or a Ranged/Magic/halberd safespot.

atoms.label: Learn the final ingredient is a fever spider carcass
atoms.detail: Complete the full dialogue with Braindeath or the carcass will not drop from the kill.

atoms.label: Kill a fever spider in the basement for its carcass
atoms.detail: Fever spiders inflict disease even through Protect from Melee; negate with a safespot, Slayer gloves, or a cure such as Relicym's balm. Killing the fever spider also completes a medium Morytania Diary task.

atoms.label: Add the fever spider carcass to the hopper
atoms.detail: Finishes the rum recipe.

atoms.label: Collect the finished 'rum' from the output tap
atoms.detail: South end of the machinery; Braindeath supplies a bucket if not already held.

atoms.label: Give the 'rum' to Captain Donnie
atoms.detail: Found near the farming patches; he downs it and accidentally names his boss, Rabid Jack.

atoms.label: Report Rabid Jack's name to Braindeath to finish
atoms.detail: He is shocked, then thanks you and confirms the brewery stays put.

checkpoints.label: Setting out and reaching Braindeath Island
Evil spirits and the fever spider

steps.detail: Unlocks Piscatoris Fishing Colony monkfish spot. Required for the monkfish food supply chain.

hints.note: start: agree to fight the sea trolls
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

media.caption: Piscatoris Fishing Colony: Herman Caranos (quest-swan-song start)
Player beside Herman Caranos; ask him for work to start Swan Song

atoms.label: Talk to Herman Caranos
atoms.detail: Talk to Herman Caranos at the Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north of fairy ring code AKQ; the offered cutscene is optional.

atoms.label: Gather blood, mist, and lava runes
atoms.detail: Gather 5 blood runes, 10 mist runes, and 10 lava runes before visiting the Wise Old Man.

atoms.label: Talk to the Wise Old Man
atoms.detail: Talk to the Wise Old Man in Draynor Village, handing over the gathered runes.

atoms.label: Bring combat supplies for the Sea Trolls
atoms.detail: Bring food, armour, a melee or ranged weapon, and prayer potions to fight the Sea Trolls guarding the colony.

atoms.label: Return to the Colony with the Wise Old Man
atoms.detail: Return to the Fishing Colony and talk to the Wise Old Man.

atoms.label: Fight through the Sea Trolls into the Colony
atoms.detail: Kill the level-79 Sea Trolls blocking the entrance and collect 7 of their bones if needed for later; note that after 1-3 kills the trolls switch to dropping only big bones, which don't count toward that requirement.

atoms.label: Talk to Herman in the east building
atoms.detail: Talk to Herman inside the east building -- click inside the building itself, not directly on Herman, or your character will run back outside.

atoms.label: Gather repair materials
atoms.detail: Bring logs, a tinderbox (or get one from Franklin), 5 iron bars, a hammer (or get one from Franklin), a small fishing net (or get one from Arnold), and level-boosting items if below Fishing 62 or Smithing 45.

atoms.label: Talk to Franklin Caranos
atoms.detail: Talk to Franklin Caranos near the colony entrance to begin repairs.

atoms.label: Light the firebox
atoms.detail: Use a log on the firebox -- not the furnace -- and light it, inside the building marked with the furnace symbol; Franklin supplies a tinderbox if asked again.

atoms.label: Press iron sheets
atoms.detail: Use each of the 5 iron bars on the Metal Press to produce iron sheets.

atoms.label: Repair the western perimeter wall
atoms.detail: Use the iron sheets to repair the western colony perimeter's broken walls; Franklin supplies a hammer if asked.

atoms.label: Talk to Arnold Lydspor
atoms.detail: Talk to Arnold Lydspor in the bank; he supplies a small fishing net if you don't already have one.

atoms.label: Fish 5 fresh monkfish
atoms.detail: Fish 5 fresh monkfish at the spot to the north-west, catching a few extra in case some burn while cooking.

atoms.label: Optionally fight spawning Sea Trolls
atoms.detail: Optionally kill Sea Trolls as they spawn nearby while fishing; after 1-3 kills they only drop big bones, which no longer count toward the earlier bones requirement.

atoms.label: Cook the monkfish
atoms.detail: Cook the monkfish in the kitchen south of the fishing spot; note that Arnold's bank cannot be used to access cooking gauntlets here.

atoms.label: Deliver the cooked monkfish to Arnold
atoms.detail: Talk to Arnold and hand over the cooked monkfish.

atoms.label: Report back to Franklin
atoms.detail: Talk to Franklin again.

atoms.label: Report to the Wise Old Man and Herman
atoms.detail: Talk to the Wise Old Man and Herman in the far eastern building.

atoms.label: Gather bones, an airtight pot, and a brown apron
atoms.detail: Gather 7 bones (from the earlier Sea Troll kills), an airtight pot OR a pot with a pot lid, and a brown apron (or ask Malignius for one); if not banking afterward also bring food, armour, a weapon, and prayer potions.

atoms.label: Travel to the Wizards' Guild basement
atoms.detail: Travel to the basement of the Wizards' Guild in Yanille; the Nightmare Zone minigame teleport is needed to leave the colony first.

atoms.label: Talk to Wizard Frumscone
atoms.detail: Talk to Wizard Frumscone and agree to help the necromancer.

atoms.label: Portal to the Dark Wizards' Tower
atoms.detail: Use the southern portal on the guild's 2nd floor to teleport to the Dark Wizards' Tower, near Malignius Mortifer.

atoms.label: Get a brown apron from Malignius Mortifer
atoms.detail: Talk to Malignius Mortifer, south of Falador, about saving the fishing colony; receive a brown apron for Crafting Guild entry.

atoms.label: Talk to the Master Crafter
atoms.detail: Talk to the Master Crafter with dreadlocks on the east side of the Crafting Guild.

atoms.label: Make a pot and pot lid
atoms.detail: If carrying soft clay, use it on the potter's wheel then the potter's oven to produce a pot and pot lid; if carrying a pickaxe instead, mine clay first then follow the same steps.

atoms.label: Assemble the airtight pot
atoms.detail: Combine the pot and pot lid into an airtight pot.

atoms.label: Remove Saradomin-affiliated gear
atoms.detail: Remove any Saradomin-affiliated gear before continuing -- Malignius refuses to hand over bone seeds while it's worn or held, and dropping gear here isn't advisable since you'll be teleported away shortly.

atoms.label: Collect bone seeds and teleport back
atoms.detail: Talk to Malignius Mortifer to receive the bone seeds and teleport back to the Fishing Colony.

atoms.label: Bring supplies for the Final Battle
atoms.detail: Bring food, armour, a melee or ranged weapon, prayer potions, and the bone seeds to the final fight.

atoms.label: Begin the fight with Herman
atoms.detail: Talk to Herman to begin the final battle.

atoms.label: Defeat the Sea Troll Queen
atoms.detail: Fight the Sea Troll Queen; use Protect from Magic while in melee range, and Ranged or Melee to deal damage.

atoms.label: Finish the quest with Herman
atoms.detail: Talk to Herman to complete Swan Song.

atoms.label: Optionally cook a diary monkfish
atoms.detail: Optionally catch and cook another monkfish afterward -- satisfies a hard Western Provinces Achievement Diary task.

steps.detail: Sub-quest completion grants access to Barrows gloves and NMZ bosses.

mapMarkers.label: The Cook, Lumbridge Castle kitchen (RFD start)

hints.note: start: agree to help gather feast ingredients
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

media.caption: Lumbridge Castle kitchen: the Cook (Recipe for Disaster start / RFD sub-quest assignment)
Player beside the Cook; talk to him to start RFD or pick up the next sub-quest

atoms.label: Talk to the Cook in Lumbridge Castle's kitchen to begin Recipe for Disaster
atoms.detail: This is the same opening conversation that starts the Another Cook's Quest chapter (rfd-intro) -- the umbrella Recipe for Disaster page names Cooking 10 plus Cook's Assistant as the entry requirement and this single talk-to as the start point for the whole questline.

hints.note: same unstated opening exchange as rfd-intro's first atom

checkpoints.label: Talk to the Cook to begin Recipe for Disaster

steps.detail: Unlocks 1-tick Karambwan cooking for fast Cooking XP.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Slice a banana into Karamjan rum
atoms.detail: Pick a banana at the Musa Point plantation, buy Karamjan rum at the Karamja Spirits Bar, slice the banana with a knife/spear, then add the slice to the rum before leaving the island (leaving unslied breaks it).

atoms.label: Talk to Timfraku to start the quest
atoms.detail: Upstairs in the north-west house of Tai Bwo Wannai (fairy ring CKR); mention Trufitus sent you, then ask "So far??" to receive the task of reuniting his three sons.

atoms.label: Ask Tamayu about the Shaikahan
atoms.detail: South-east of the village at the mine; talk twice, asking when he'll succeed and offering to join his next hunt. A cutscene shows him failing against The Shaikahan.

atoms.label: Net-fish 20+ raw karambwanji at the Holy Lake
atoms.detail: South-west of Tamayu; keep a few spares in case of a low Cooking level burning the karambwan later.

atoms.label: Become Lubufu's karambwan apprentice
atoms.detail: By the south-eastern Brimhaven shore; ask his age, offer to help collect bait, catch and hand over 20 karambwanji, then ask about his catching method and become his apprentice to unlock the karambwan vessel and 65-Fishing raw karambwan catching (1500 Fishing xp). Collect extra vessels here (drop and re-ask Lubufu) — one each for Tiadeche, Tinsay, and yourself.

atoms.label: Give Tiadeche a full karambwan vessel
atoms.detail: North-east corner of the Karamja jungle (fairy ring DKP); fill a vessel with karambwanji first, then hand it over for a raw karambwan (vessel is not returned).

atoms.label: Grab seaweed on the beach near Tiadeche
atoms.detail: Spawns on the beach by Tiadeche; needed later for Tinsay's seaweed sandwich.

atoms.label: Cook the karambwan and grind it into paste
atoms.detail: Cook the raw karambwan into a poison karambwan, then grind it with a pestle and mortar into karambwan paste (use the "use" option, not eat, to avoid damage).

atoms.label: Poison the spear with karambwan paste
atoms.detail: Any of iron/steel/mithril/adamant/rune/dragon spear works; do NOT give it to Tamayu before poisoning it.

atoms.label: Get jogre bones on the way back to Tamayu
atoms.detail: Kill a Jogre en route back south (also a fallback source for an iron spear if none carried).

atoms.label: Give Tamayu the poisoned spear and 4-dose agility potion
atoms.detail: Cross the agility shortcut back to the mine; use the poisoned spear then a full 4-dose agility potion on him (can be topped up over multiple potions), then join his hunt for a successful cutscene.

atoms.label: Kill a monkey and have Tamayu skin it
atoms.detail: Ranged/Magic/halberd only (melee does 0 damage); use the corpse on Tamayu to skin it and keep the monkey skin (saves a Tinsay trip later).

atoms.label: Climb to Cairn Isle and talk to Tinsay
atoms.detail: Up the rockslide (Agility 15) and across the bridge; he asks for three items to regain his sanity and repair the Tribal Statue.

atoms.label: Give Tinsay the banana rum
atoms.detail: First of his three requests.

atoms.label: Make and deliver a seaweed sandwich
atoms.detail: Combine the seaweed and monkey skin into a seaweed sandwich (do not combine before skinning, or it becomes a joke item), then give it to Tinsay.

atoms.label: Give Tinsay a spare karambwan vessel
atoms.detail: Unlocks the Crafting manual for Tiadeche (he won't hand it over until the sandwich is delivered).

atoms.label: Burn, grind, paste, and cook jogre bones into marinated bones
atoms.detail: Burn jogre bones on a tinderbox (Firemaking 30+) or a furnace/Superheat Item if lower; grind a raw karambwanji into paste and add it to the burnt bones; cook the result on a range or fire until green (white means it was done in the wrong order).

atoms.label: Give Tinsay the marinated jogre bones
atoms.detail: His third request; he regains his sanity and agrees to return to the village.

atoms.label: Bring the Crafting manual back to Tiadeche
atoms.detail: Both brothers then head back to Tai Bwo Wannai.

atoms.label: Talk to Timfraku to finish the quest
atoms.detail: Same north-west house; completes the quest. Afterward, talk to each brother in their village house to claim their individual xp rewards.

checkpoints.label: Introduction: Timfraku and the banana rum
Tamayu: karambwanji, Lubufu's apprenticeship, poisoned spear
Tinsay: three requests on Cairn Isle
Wrapping up with Tiadeche and Timfraku

steps.detail: Required for RFD Skrach. Learn to hunt chompy birds with ogre bows.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Rantz to start the quest
atoms.detail: Rantz the ogre is south-east of Gu'Tanoth (Fairy ring AKS, Feldip Hills teleport, or gnome glider). The quest must be started by talking to him first, and he only accepts arrows you make yourself.

atoms.label: Kill 4 level-64 wolves for wolf bones
atoms.detail: In the crater south-west of Rantz; safespottable near the north-east swamp roots.

atoms.label: Chisel the wolf bones into wolfbone arrowtips
atoms.detail: Each bone yields 2-6 tips at random.

atoms.label: Chop 4 achey trees for logs
atoms.detail: Growing near Rantz.

atoms.label: Knife the achey logs into ogre arrow shafts
Feather the shafts into flighted ogre arrows
Attach wolfbone arrowtips to the flighted arrows
atoms.detail: Finishes at least 6 usable ogre arrows for the hand-in.

atoms.label: Hand at least 6 ogre arrows to Rantz
atoms.detail: He explains the swamp toads his children play with; ask him every listed question or the chest cannot be opened later. Ask every dialogue option offered, not just the minimum — required to open the chest later.

atoms.label: Enter the cave and talk to Fycie and Bugs
atoms.detail: North of Rantz; they explain their ogre bellows are locked in a rock-weighted chest.

atoms.label: Unlock the chest and search it for the bellows
atoms.detail: Failed unlock attempts reduce Strength by 1; search immediately after opening or it re-locks. Keep the bellows afterward if planning Mourning's End Part I and/or Recipe for Disaster.

atoms.label: Inflate 3 swamp toads into bloated toads
atoms.detail: South-west of Rantz at the swamp (also findable near poison spiders in the Yanille Agility dungeon); the bellows hold 3 charges before needing a refill at the swamp bubbles. Carrying capacity for bloated toads is 3 — inflating more replaces one already held.

atoms.label: Return to Rantz to learn the lure spot
atoms.detail: He shows the flashing arrow tile where toads should be dropped to lure a chompy bird.

atoms.label: Offer to shoot for Rantz and receive the ogre bow
atoms.detail: After his first miss (he blames the arrows), offer to help; he hands over his ogre bow.

atoms.label: Lure and kill a chompy bird with the ogre bow
atoms.detail: Drop a bloated toad on the marked tile and stand back but in view; range the bird once it appears (re-bait if the lure fails). You must land the kill yourself — a bought/traded raw chompy will not progress the quest. Purchasing a raw chompy bird instead of killing one yourself will NOT progress the quest — confirmed on the quest's own page, not a real GE-alternative.

atoms.label: Pluck the chompy and bring it back to Rantz
atoms.detail: He asks for it cooked with a seasoning of his children's choosing.

atoms.label: Ask Fycie and Bugs what seasoning they want
atoms.detail: Two of three needed ingredients (onion, doogle leaves, equa leaves, tomato, potato, cabbage) are randomised per player; only one bird is cooked.

atoms.label: Gather the 3 requested seasoning ingredients around the area
atoms.detail: Onion/tomato near the fire west-south-west of Rantz; doogle leaves to the west by the glider; equa leaves on the south-east peninsula; potato south-east near the equa spawns; cabbage scattered south-west/south-east — pick another plant if a seed drops instead.

atoms.label: Cook the chompy with all 3 seasonings on the spit
atoms.detail: North of Rantz; hold all three ingredients plus the raw chompy.

atoms.label: Present the seasoned chompy to Rantz to finish
atoms.detail: Completes the quest.

steps.detail: Unlocks Ancient Magicks spellbook. Required for many late-game routes.

hints.note: start: ask about the treasure rumours
Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Talk to Asgarnia Smith at Bedabin Camp (start Desert Treasure)
atoms.detail: Asgarnia Smith stands by the magic carpet at Bedabin Camp; bring at least one free inventory slot and agree to help him.

atoms.label: Gather the starting materials Eblis needs
atoms.detail: Assemble 650 coins, ashes, a blood rune, bones, 6 molten glass, 12 magic logs, charcoal, and 6 steel bars via non-GE routes: bones from any kill, molten glass crafted from bucket-of-sand + soda-ash in a furnace, steel bars smithed from iron ore + coal, ashes from burning any logs. Blood rune sourcing (Runecrafting at the Blood Altar, or a monster drop) and magic-log sourcing (Woodcutting 75 on magic trees) and charcoal sourcing are not detailed in this quest's own Quick guide -- flagged "??", genuine gaps for Lane 5 rather than a GE substitution.

atoms.label: Get the book translated at the Digsite Exam Centre
atoms.detail: Go to the Digsite Exam Centre and talk to Terry Balando about the Desert Treasure quest, then talk to him again for a translation.

atoms.label: Show the translated book to Asgarnia Smith
atoms.detail: Return to Asgarnia Smith in the desert; tell him not to read the book, then talk to him again to have him help you.

atoms.label: Buy a drink at the Bandit Camp bar and ask about the diamonds
atoms.detail: Run south to the Bandit Camp and buy a drink in the pub for 650 coins (remove any Saradomin/Zamorak items first so the bandits don't attack). Talk to the bartender again and ask about the four diamonds.

atoms.label: Talk to Eblis about the four diamonds
atoms.detail: Find Eblis in or just outside the small rectangular building east of the bar; ask about the four diamonds of Azzanadra and agree to fetch them.

atoms.label: Deliver the gathered supplies to Eblis
atoms.detail: Use each required item (ashes, blood rune, bones, molten glass, magic logs, charcoal, steel bars) on Eblis, then talk to him again. Items can remain noted for this delivery.

atoms.label: Follow Eblis to the mirrors and begin the diamond hunt
atoms.detail: Go south-east to the mirrors and talk to Eblis there. The four diamonds (Smoke, Shadow, Ice, Blood) can be collected in any order; watch for a level 95 stranger who may randomly ambush you with a poisoned dragon dagger while carrying a diamond -- bank or place diamonds in the pyramid to avoid it.

atoms.label: Equip a facemask or gas mask
atoms.detail: Equip a facemask, gas mask, or Slayer helmet before entering the Smoke Dungeon.

atoms.label: Light the four torches and grab the warm key
atoms.detail: Enter the Smoke Dungeon (west of Pollnivneach, east of the mirrors). Light all four standing torches, one per corner, and open the centre chest for the warm key before any torch burns out. Starting NE then SE, NW, SW with 100% run avoids needing stamina potions.

atoms.label: Unlock the gate and kill Fareed for the Smoke diamond
atoms.detail: Use the warm key to open the gate east, then kill Fareed. Ice gloves are needed to wield melee gear (ranged works unarmoured but ash-es arrows), and only water spells damage him with Magic. protect-from-melee+water-spells-or-ranged.

atoms.label: Talk to Rasolo south of Baxtorian Falls
atoms.detail: Rasolo is outside his house south of Baxtorian Falls; ask about the Diamonds of Azzanadra.

atoms.label: Gather 20+ lockpicks and antipoison
atoms.detail: Gather-not-GE alternative to the wiki's own coin-exchange shortcut (flagged GE-violation): pickpocket bandits in the Bandit Camp vicinity for lockpicks and antipoison instead of exchanging noted coins with Tiles' general store.

atoms.label: Pick the secure chest and give the gilded cross to Rasolo
atoms.detail: In the southernmost Bandit Camp tent, pick all 3 locks on the secure chest consecutively (can take many tries, faster at higher Thieving) to get the gilded cross. Bring it back to Rasolo, who swaps it for a visibility ring even with a full inventory.

atoms.label: Equip the visibility ring and climb down
atoms.detail: Equip the visibility ring, then climb down the ladder east of Rasolo in the fenced area.

atoms.label: Kill Damis (both forms) for the Shadow diamond
atoms.detail: Run through the dungeon and kill Damis in both of his forms, then pick up the shadow diamond. His second form drains Prayer rapidly.

atoms.label: Gather sweet food and spiked boots
atoms.detail: Bring any sweet food from the Troll child's list, plus fire-spell runes. Get spiked boots from Dunstan by giving him a pair of climbing boots and an iron bar.

atoms.label: Give the troll child sweet food and enter the ice gate
atoms.detail: North-west of Trollheim, use the sweet food on the troll child, talk to it, then enter the ice gate.

atoms.label: Kill 5 ice trolls
atoms.detail: Kill 5 ice trolls guarding the gate; you won't need to re-kill them if you teleport out and return.

atoms.label: Follow the path and kill Kamil
atoms.detail: Enter the cave, follow the path, then fight Kamil. Only fire spells damage him with Magic (Iban Blast, Flames of Zamorak, and the trident's built-in spell do not work); your stats are constantly drained during the fight. protect-from-magic-then-melee.

atoms.label: Wear spiked boots, cross the ice ledge, and free the frozen trolls
atoms.detail: Continue west along the long icy path. Wear spiked boots to climb the ice ledge, follow the new path, go through the gate, then use a fire spell on each troll frozen in ice. Talk to them for the Ice diamond.

atoms.label: Talk to Malak in the Canifis pub
atoms.detail: Talk to Malak in the Canifis pub about the special diamond; ask how to kill Dessous.

atoms.label: Gather a silver bar, spice, and garlic powder
atoms.detail: Smelt a silver bar (silver ore in a furnace). Garlic can be searched from the cupboard upstairs in Morgan's house in Draynor; grind it with a pestle and mortar for garlic powder.

atoms.label: Get a silver pot made and enchanted
atoms.detail: Travel to the Draynor Sewer and give Ruantun the silver bar for a silver pot. Take the pot to the High Priest in the Entrana church (Entrana bans combat equipment) and he enchants it.

atoms.label: Talk to Malak again
atoms.detail: Return to Malak in the Canifis pub. He deals 5 damage during this conversation but cannot kill you.

atoms.label: Add spice and garlic powder to the pot of blood
atoms.detail: Add the spice and garlic powder to the pot Malak gives you to create a pot of blood. Prepare combat gear and prayer/healing supplies before the boss fight ahead.

atoms.label: Pour the blood on the tomb and kill Dessous
atoms.detail: Go to the Morytania Graveyard north of Castle Drakan, pour the pot of blood on the tomb, and defeat Dessous. He has 99 Defence and strong slash resistance -- range or mage him, alternating Protect from Melee/Missiles each tick to avoid damage.

atoms.label: Return to Malak and claim the Blood diamond
atoms.detail: Go back to Malak in the Canifis pub and claim the blood diamond. You keep the blessed pot even after leaving the fight (a new pot of blood is only needed if you leave mid-fight).

atoms.label: Place a diamond in each of the pyramid's obelisks
atoms.detail: Go south-east of Eblis and place the smoke, shadow, ice, and blood diamonds in the pyramid's obelisks.

atoms.label: Enter the pyramid and run each floor without stopping
atoms.detail: Enter the pyramid from the top and run through each floor without stopping -- traps may still trigger and can send you back to the start regardless. Mummies and Scarabs can hit over 20.

atoms.label: Talk to Azzanadra to finish the quest
atoms.detail: Talk to Azzanadra at the end of the pyramid to complete Desert Treasure and unlock the Ancient Magicks spellbook. Praying at his altar twice afterward unlocks a hard Desert-area task.

checkpoints.label: Starting out (Bedabin Camp -> Digsite -> Bandit Camp -> Eblis)

steps.detail: Fish and cook a fishcake INSIDE the Mogre Camp minigame area. No ahead-of-time staging — all gathering is minigame-locked.

media.caption: Lumbridge Castle dining room: Pirate Pete's plinth (rfd-pirate-pete / Mogre Camp minigame)

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Inspect Pirate Pete to start
atoms.detail: Inspect the frozen Pirate Pete statue in the Lumbridge Castle dining room to begin this chapter.

atoms.label: Talk to the Cook about the fishcake
atoms.detail: The Cook lists the four fishcake ingredients (ground cod, breadcrumbs, ground giant crab meat, ground kelp) and directs you to Murphy in Port Khazard for the crab meat and kelp.

hints.note: ask every available ingredient question -- skipping one can block making the fishcake later

atoms.label: Grind raw cod into ground cod
atoms.detail: Use a pestle and mortar on a raw cod to make ground cod. Bring extra raw cod since a burned fishcake wastes the batch.

atoms.label: Cut bread into breadcrumbs
atoms.detail: Use a knife on bread to make breadcrumbs. Bring extra bread for the same burn-insurance reason.

atoms.label: Travel to Port Khazard
atoms.detail: Head to Port Khazard, most quickly via the Fishing Trawler minigame teleport, to find Murphy.

atoms.label: Get the diving apparatus from Murphy
atoms.detail: Murphy converts an empty fishbowl into a diving apparatus. Diving requires under 28kg carried weight and several free inventory spaces; cats cannot come along.

hints.note: ask Murphy to make the diving apparatus, then ask to go diving

atoms.label: Equip the diving apparatus
atoms.detail: Wear the diving apparatus before asking Murphy to dive.

atoms.label: Dive into the Mogre Camp
atoms.detail: Ask Murphy to take you diving into the underwater Mogre Camp area.

hints.note: enters the underwater instanced area; weapons cannot be wielded until inside the mudskipper cave or crab pen

atoms.label: Pick kelp underwater
atoms.detail: Pick the tall kelp plant underwater for a kelp.

hints.value: gather 2-3 extra kelp and crab meat in case the fishcake burns later

atoms.label: Pick up rocks near the mudskipper cave
atoms.detail: Pick up five rocks near the entrance to the mudskippers' cave on the western wall of the underwater area before entering.

atoms.label: Kill mudskippers for hides
atoms.detail: Enter the cave (you can wield weapons normally inside) and kill mudskippers until you have five mudskipper hides.

hints.value: hand hides to Nung immediately -- they disappear if you surface while still carrying them

atoms.label: Give Nung the hides, needle and bronze wire
atoms.detail: Hand Nung the five mudskipper hides plus a needle and three bronze wire; he then lets you into the crab pen.

atoms.label: Kill a crab and collect its meat
atoms.detail: Kill a crab in the pen and collect its meat; kill extras if you want burn-insurance meat.

atoms.label: Grind the kelp and crab meat
atoms.detail: Grind the kelp and crab meat with the pestle and mortar into ground kelp and ground crab meat.

atoms.label: Surface and return to the Cook
atoms.detail: Leave the underwater area and head back to the Cook in Lumbridge Castle's kitchen.

atoms.label: Report back with the prepared ingredients
atoms.detail: Show the Cook the ground cod, breadcrumbs, ground crab meat and ground kelp.

atoms.label: Combine and cook the fishcake
atoms.detail: Use the ingredients on each other under the Cook's guidance and cook the mixture into a fishcake.

hints.note: can burn at low Cooking -- keep spare ground ingredients ready to retry

atoms.label: Use the fishcake on Pirate Pete
atoms.detail: Right-click and use (do not eat) the finished fishcake on Pirate Pete's statue in the dining room to complete the chapter.

checkpoints.label: Start and learn the fishcake recipe
Prepare the cod and bread ingredients
Dive at Port Khazard for crab meat and kelp
Cook the fishcake and free Pirate Pete

steps.detail: Hunt and cook a jubbly bird near Rantz in Feldip Hills. Hunter 41 + Cooking 41 required.

media.caption: Lumbridge Castle dining room: Skrach Uglogwee's plinth (rfd-skrach / jubbly bird, Feldip Hills)

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Inspect Skrach Uglogwee in the Lumbridge Castle dining room
atoms.detail: Start the subquest by inspecting Skrach Uglogwee's plinth.

atoms.label: Travel to the Feldip Hills
atoms.detail: Reach Rantz's cave in the Feldip Hills, e.g. via fairy ring code AKS.

hints.value: fairy ring, Feldip Hills teleport, or Eagle Transport System all work

atoms.label: Talk to Rantz
atoms.detail: Rantz explains he needs to travel to Karamja for a potion and asks to be met south-east of his cave.

atoms.label: Walk south-east to the transportation symbol
atoms.detail: Head south-east from Rantz's cave toward the marked transportation icon.

atoms.label: Talk to Rantz again
atoms.detail: He kicks over a tree and asks you to turn it into a boat.

atoms.label: Chop the felled tree into a boat
atoms.detail: Use an axe on the kicked-over tree twice to shape it into a boat.

atoms.label: Talk to Rantz to launch the boat
atoms.detail: He fires an arrow into a tree on Karamja to mark the landing spot.

atoms.label: Talk to Rantz once more
atoms.detail: He asks for a cooked chompy for good luck before the crossing; gather a raw chompy from a chompy bird first if none is carried.

hints.value: chop a nearby normal tree for a log too if none was brought

atoms.label: Travel to the marked tree on Karamja
atoms.detail: Cross via the fairy ring (code CKR) or from Brimhaven, then find the tree with an arrow in it north-west of Tai Bwo Wannai, just north of Banisoch.

atoms.label: Light a fire by the marked tree
atoms.detail: Build a fire next to the arrow tree using logs and a tinderbox.

atoms.label: Skewer and cook the chompy
atoms.detail: Use an iron spit on a raw chompy, then cook the skewered chompy on the fire; success brings Rantz's boat back to collect you.

atoms.label: Talk to the second Rantz near the water
atoms.detail: This waterside Rantz explains you need a balloon toad as jubbly-bird bait.

atoms.label: Inflate toads with the ogre bellows
atoms.detail: Fill the bellows with swamp gas then use them on a toad to inflate it; get about three, since a later step can fail.

hints.value: extra toads are cheap insurance against the balloon-toad step failing

atoms.label: Mine matching rocks west of the swamp
atoms.detail: Mine one rock per inflated toad from the mining spot west of the swamp (or beside Rantz's cave).

atoms.label: Combine rock, wool and gas into balloon toads
atoms.detail: Refill the bellows with swamp gas, then use them on an already-inflated toad together with a rock and a ball of wool to create a balloon toad; the wool is rarely consumed.

atoms.label: Drop a balloon toad as bait
atoms.detail: Drop the balloon toad south of Rantz's cave or east of the gnome glider to lure the jubbly bird.

atoms.label: Kill the jubbly bird once it appears
atoms.detail: Wait for the level 9 jubbly bird to spawn near the dropped bait, then shoot it down with an ogre bow or comp ogre bow.

hints.value: spawn is not guaranteed; drop another balloon toad and relog if it fails to appear

atoms.label: Pluck the jubbly bird and take its meat
atoms.detail: Pluck the fallen jubbly bird and collect the meat.

atoms.label: Cook the jubbly meat on Rantz's ogre spit
atoms.detail: Cook the raw jubbly meat on the ogre spit near Rantz's cave.

hints.value: cook or kill a spare jubbly in case one is burnt or accidentally eaten

atoms.label: Deliver the cooked jubbly to Skrach Uglogwee
atoms.detail: Return to the Lumbridge Castle dining room and carefully use the cooked jubbly on Skrach Uglogwee without eating it, to complete the subquest.

checkpoints.label: Meet Rantz in the Feldip Hills
Build a boat and cross to Karamja
Cook a chompy for good luck
Craft bait and hunt the jubbly bird

steps.detail: Fish monkfish at the Piscatoris Fishing Colony. Requires Swan Song and Fishing 62. Cook for Barrows food supply.

mapMarkers.label: Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)
Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)
Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)
Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)
Fishing spot (Piscatoris Fishing Colony, north coast)

hints.note: Raw_monkfish s1 Fishing info: tool=Small fishing net, bait=No. Fishing_spot page confirms 'Always' rarity (guaranteed catch on success roll, no drop-chance variance beyond the standard skilling success curve).

Piscatoris_Fishing_Colony s1, ranked shortest-run-to-spot first: Western banner 3/4 (centre of colony) > Piscatoris teleport (entrance) > Fairy ring AKQ (Hunter area, south of entrance) > Necklace of passage (Outpost, well south). Kathy Corkat ferries from west of Tree Gnome Stronghold for free once Swan Song is complete (50gp before); 75 Sailing + full Swan Song also unlocks mooring a boat on the NW side.

steps.detail: Defeat 6 Culinaromancer minions with boosted combat stats. Rewards: Barrows gloves (best-in-slot). Attack/Strength/Defence 65 required.

media.caption: Lumbridge Castle basement: the Culinaromancer (rfd-finale / Defeating the Culinaromancer)

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Follow the Culinaromancer through the portal
atoms.detail: After freeing all eight council members, watch Aris restart time and the Culinaromancer flee through the portal, then follow him into his own dimension.

atoms.label: Stock up for the boss gauntlet
atoms.detail: Bank and withdraw ice gloves (for Flambeed), a stat-restore or Menaphite remedy (Karamel drains stats), good healing food such as sharks, and gear for each named boss; Prayer cannot be used inside this dimension, and it is possible to leave and restock between each boss without losing progress.

atoms.label: Defeat Agrith-Na-Na
atoms.detail: Fight the banana-formed Agrith-Na-Na (level 146), who uses melee up close and Fire Blast at range; a strong melee or ranged setup works well.

hints.value: the dimension gates each next boss behind defeating the previous ones in order

atoms.label: Equip ice gloves before fighting Flambeed
atoms.detail: Wear ice gloves so your weapon does not get knocked back to your inventory when attacking Flambeed.

atoms.label: Defeat Flambeed
atoms.detail: Fight Flambeed (level 149); without Prayer he hits often, so bring plenty of healing food, or snare and range him from a distance to save supplies.

atoms.label: Defeat Karamel
atoms.detail: Fight Karamel (level 136) with a fire spell below your maximum level, since she lowers Magic; her ranged attacks are weak at melee range and Iban Blast is effective, unlike against the original Kamil.

atoms.label: Defeat Dessourt
atoms.detail: Fight Dessourt (level 121) with stab weapons, Ranged, or Iban Blast, since melee is weak against him; bring plenty of food and end the fight quickly.

atoms.label: Withdraw elemental runes for the Gelatinnoth Mother
atoms.detail: Bank Water, Air, Earth and Fire runes so a matching elemental spell is available for each colour phase of the fight.

atoms.label: Defeat the Gelatinnoth Mother
atoms.detail: Fight the Gelatinnoth Mother (level 130), switching attack style to match her current colour (white=Air, blue=Water, orange=Melee, brown=Earth, red=Fire, green=Ranged); she has low Magic defence and high Melee defence, so maging or ranging in strong dragonhide is recommended.

hints.value: switch combat style each time her colour changes to exploit the matching elemental weakness

atoms.label: Defeat the Culinaromancer
atoms.detail: Fight the Culinaromancer himself (level 75); he hits hard and often with Magic but has almost no Defence, so any attack style with good food works.

hints.value: a full inventory drops the reward lamp at your feet on return to Lumbridge instead of granting it directly

atoms.label: Claim the finale rewards
atoms.detail: Collect the experience lamp (20,000 xp to any skill above level 50, bankable for later) and gain full access to the Culinaromancer's Chest, including barrows gloves.

checkpoints.label: Defeat the five bosses in sequence

steps.detail: Grish asks you to investigate zombified ogres (zogres) infesting the ogre ceremonial grounds. Head into the cave below Jiggig, being careful of disease from zogre/skogre attacks if under 89 combat (carry super restores). Loot a ruined backpack and a torn page from a skeleton/lectern, then pry open a coffin with a knife for a black prism. Head to Yanille, use the recovered Dragon Inn tankard on the bartender there, then visit Zavistic Rarve at the Wizards' Guild. Investigate the ogres' bedridden neighbor Sithik Ints: search his room for a portraiture book, necromancy book, papyrus/charcoal and a Book of 'H.A.M.', read and use all three on him, then sketch a portrait that reads as an honest "classic realist charcoal portrait" (higher Crafting speeds this up) and get it signed by the Dragon Inn bartender. Bring the necromancy book, H.A.M. book, tankard and signed portrait to Zavistic Rarve for a strange potion; spike Sithik's tea with it, then question him for the secrets to Relicym's balm, curing the disease, and removing the undead ogres. Return to Grish for an ogre gate key and to learn comp ogre bow use, then fight the level-111 Slash Bash (uses Ranged+Melee — safespot with Protect from Missiles, or use Crumble Undead) in the ceremonial chamber to finish.

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Ask Grish about the sick ogres
atoms.detail: Speak with Grish in Jiggig and offer to help investigate the zombified ogres.

hints.value: What do you mean sickies? -> Can I help in any way? -> Yes.

atoms.label: Get the ogre guard to remove the barricade
atoms.detail: Speak to the Ogre guard east of Grish so he clears the way into the Zogre-infested area.

atoms.label: Climb the barricade and descend into the cave
atoms.detail: Climb over the crushed barricade, run east to the stairs, and go down them.

atoms.label: Search the skeleton and defeat the zombie it spawns
atoms.detail: Search the skeleton next to the broken lecturn; a zombie appears and must be killed to get the ruined backpack.

hints.value: Under 89 combat, Zogre/Skogre attacks from here on can cause disease that lowers a random skill 10 levels roughly every minute -- carry super restore potions.

atoms.label: Open the ruined backpack
atoms.detail: Open the backpack to obtain a Dragon inn tankard, rotten food, and a knife.

atoms.label: Search the broken lecturn for the torn page
atoms.detail: Search the broken lecturn and keep the torn page it holds.

atoms.label: Cut open the coffin and search it for the black prism
atoms.detail: Use the knife on the coffin west of the skeleton, then search it (may take a few tries) for the black prism.

atoms.label: Show the tankard to the Yanille bartender
atoms.detail: Go to the Dragon Inn in Yanille and use the Dragon inn tankard on the bartender to begin identifying its owner.

atoms.label: Speak to Zavistic Rarve at the Wizards' Guild
atoms.detail: Find Zavistic Rarve inside the Wizards' Guild in Yanille (ring the bell out front if you lack the level to enter).

hints.value: I'm here about the sicks...err Zogres (only if Hand in the Sand already started)

atoms.label: Speak to the bedridden Sithik Ints
atoms.detail: Sithik is bedridden in the upstairs bedroom of the guest house north of the Wizards' Guild; ask to look around his room.

hints.value: Do you mind if I look around?

atoms.label: Search Sithik's drawers, cupboard, and wardrobe
atoms.detail: Search all three pieces of furniture in the room for a portraiture book, necromancy book, papyrus, charcoal, and a Book of H.A.M.

hints.value: More papyrus can be found here if a re-sketch is needed later.

atoms.label: Read all three found books
atoms.detail: Read the portraiture book, necromancy book, and Book of H.A.M before acting on them.

atoms.label: Use all three books on Sithik
atoms.detail: Use the portraiture book, necromancy book, and Book of H.A.M on Sithik in turn.

atoms.label: Use papyrus on Sithik to sketch his portrait
atoms.detail: Use papyrus on Sithik to sketch a portrait whose examine text must read a classic realist charcoal portrait of Sithik.

hints.value: A low Crafting level (1-10) reduces the odds of sketching a correct portrait on the first try; 20+ Crafting is recommended to speed this up -- soft speed factor, not a hard requirement.

atoms.label: Show the sketched portrait to Sithik
atoms.detail: Use the portrait on Sithik; he must appreciate its honesty, not just its truth.

atoms.label: Return to the Dragon Inn
atoms.detail: Head back to the Dragon Inn in Yanille to get the portrait signed.

atoms.label: Have the bartender sign the portrait
atoms.detail: Use the tankard then the portrait on the bartender; he signs the portrait as an affidavit.

atoms.label: Return to the Wizards' Guild
atoms.detail: Head back to Zavistic Rarve at the Wizards' Guild with the evidence in hand.

atoms.label: Present the evidence to Zavistic Rarve
atoms.detail: Speak to Zavistic Rarve while holding the necromancy book, Book of H.A.M, the tankard, and the signed portrait to receive a strange potion.

hints.value: I have some items that I'd like you to look at.
Text doesn't explicitly say whether the 4 items are truly consumed here vs merely checked -- modeled as consumed.

atoms.label: Spike Sithik's tea
atoms.detail: Use the strange potion on the cup of tea on top of Sithik's drawers.

atoms.label: Reset Sithik's dialogue by leaving and returning
atoms.detail: Go downstairs then back upstairs so Sithik has drunk the spiked tea before you talk to him.

atoms.label: Get the three secrets out of Sithik
atoms.detail: Question Sithik for the cures to the disease, the removal of the undead ogres, and the effects of the spell -- needed for Relicym's balm and Brutal arrows.

hints.value: How do I remove the effects of the spell from the area? / How do I get rid of the undead ogres / How do I get rid of the disease / Sorry, I have to go.

atoms.label: Report the culprit to Grish
atoms.detail: Tell Grish you found who's responsible for the Zogres; he gives you an ogre gate key for the ceremonial chamber.

hints.value: I found who's responsible for the Zogres being here.

atoms.label: Learn to equip a composite ogre bow
atoms.detail: Ask Grish about an easier way to kill Zogres to learn how to equip composite ogre bows.

atoms.label: Chop an achey tree for logs
atoms.detail: Optional: cut an achey tree for logs to make a composite ogre bow instead of relying on Crumble Undead.

hints.value: Optional side-path; not required to finish the quest.

atoms.label: Make an unstrung comp bow
atoms.detail: Use a knife on the achey tree logs with wolf bones in your inventory and select box 2 to create an unstrung comp bow.

atoms.label: String the composite ogre bow
atoms.detail: String the unstrung bow with a bow string to finish it.

atoms.label: Brew Relicym's balm
atoms.detail: Optional: add a Rogue's purse to a vial of water then add snake weed to brew Relicym's balm; not needed for the quest itself but unlocks purchasing more from Uglug Nar.

hints.value: ge_violation: page also lists 'buy one from the Grand Exchange' as an alternative -- excluded per the never-GE-buy hard rule; only the gather/produce path is modeled.

atoms.label: Cut achey trees for arrow logs
atoms.detail: Optional: cut achey trees for logs to fletch brutal arrows instead of buying them.

hints.value: ge_violation: page also says 'if you have access to the Grand Exchange, just buy the arrows and skip this section' -- excluded per the never-GE-buy hard rule.

atoms.label: Fletch the logs into ogre arrow shafts
atoms.detail: Fletch the achey tree logs with a knife into ogre arrow shafts.

atoms.label: Add feathers to the arrow shafts
atoms.detail: Add feathers to the ogre arrow shafts to make flighted ogre arrows.

atoms.label: Nail the flighted arrows into brutal arrows
atoms.detail: With a hammer in your inventory, use nails on the flighted ogre arrows to finish them.

atoms.label: Head to the ceremonial chamber
atoms.detail: Return to Jiggig, travel west through both sets of doors, then go down the stairs.

atoms.label: Search the stand at the end of the chamber
atoms.detail: Follow the chamber to its end and search the stand to approach Slash Bash.

hints.value: No item result is stated for this search -- treated as a pure trigger.

atoms.label: Kill Slash Bash
atoms.detail: Fight the level-111 Slash Bash, who uses both Ranged and Melee; safe-spot with Protect from Missiles or use Crumble Undead.

atoms.label: Return to Grish to finish
atoms.detail: Report Slash Bash's defeat to Grish to complete the quest.

checkpoints.label: Talk to Grish and reach the Zogre cave
Search the cave for the backpack, torn page, and black prism
Identify the tankard's owner in Yanille
Relocate the ceremonial grounds with Grish
Optional: craft a composite ogre bow

steps.detail: Pick a method: Make attack potions / Make strength potions / Make restore potions.

hints.note: Non-GE gather/vendor source for Limpwurt root not confirmed by a fetched page — left ?? rather than guessed.
