methods.notes: Guam potion (unf) + eye of newt, 62,500 xp/hour per the page's table; low-level recipe still valid for players already past level 10.

methods.location: anywhere with bank access
methods.notes: Tarromin potion (unf) + limpwurt root, 125,000 xp/hour per the page's table.

methods.location: anywhere with bank access
methods.notes: Harralander potion (unf) + red spiders' eggs (the page's stat-restore option), 156,250 xp/hour per the page's table.

atoms.label: Bank: withdraw vials of water + limpwurt root
atoms.detail: Limpwurt root source not confirmed by a fetched non-GE page -- left ?? per the coarse row's own hint, not fabricated.

atoms.label: Gather tarromin weed from herb patches
atoms.detail: Same herb-patch circuit as the existing farm-herb-patch-guam row (steps.jsonl), planting tarromin seeds instead of guam -- reused per U8 rather than re-describing the patch locations.

atoms.label: Combine tarromin + vial of water into unfinished potion
atoms.detail: Clean tarromin weed, then combine with a vial of water.

atoms.label: Combine unf. tarromin potion + limpwurt root until Herblore 38
atoms.detail: Herblore 12 required, 50xp/dose (125,000xp/h at ~2,500 potions/h), per Strength_potion.s3's own {{Recipe}} infobox and Herblore_training.s3's rate table -- both confirm the exact recipe and xp figure independently.

atoms.label: Bank: deposit strength potions
atoms.detail: Bank as a combat-training supply (str60/70 bands earlier could have used these, but this band trains Herblore after those bands in route order).

steps.detail: Search the shelf in the ruined SW house of Mort'ton and read the diary found there to start (this also unlocks making Serum 207). Make 2 doses of Serum 207 (clean tarromin + vial of water, then add ashes), use one on Razmire (afflicted) in the general store, kill 5 loar shades for their remains, return the remains to Razmire. Buy an olive oil from his general store and 5 timber beams/5 limestone bricks/25 swamp paste (+ optional Flamtaer hammer) from his builders' store. Serum the sick Ulsquire Shauncy east of the store and talk to him twice about the remains/temple. Head to the temple NE of Mort'ton and repair it to 100% with at least 20 sanctity (minigame, safer with other players present), light the sacred altar (or wait for someone with 5+ Firemaking), pour olive oil on the flame for sacred oil, and dip Serum 207 in the flame for permanent-cure Serum 208. Make a pyre log with the sacred oil, take it plus loar remains to one of the stone funeral pyre groups west of the general store, light the pyre (25 Prayer xp), collect the reward, then cure both Razmire and Ulsquire with Serum 208 to finish.

req_items.name: Tarromin potion (unf)
req_items.note: or 2 vials of water + 2 grimy tarromin, both obtainable in-quest

req_items.name: Logs
req_items.note: or an axe to cut some

req_items.name: Hammer
req_items.note: a Flamtaer hammer (buyable from Razmire, ~13,000 coins) is highly recommended since a regular hammer alone can't finish the temple repair if the minigame world is empty

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Search the shelf in the ruined south-west house and read the diary
atoms.detail: Enter the ruined house in south-west Mort'ton, search the wall shelf, and read the diary to start the quest and unlock Serum 207.

atoms.label: Search the smashed table for tarromin (if you didn't bring your own)
atoms.detail: If you didn't bring unfinished tarromin potions, pick up empty vials from the north-east house then search the smashed table for two grimy tarromin and a grimy rogue's purse.

atoms.label: Brew two doses of Serum 207
atoms.detail: Add clean tarromin to a vial of water, then add ashes, to make two doses of Serum 207.

atoms.label: Dose Razmire with Serum 207 and agree to help
atoms.detail: Use a Serum 207 on the afflicted Razmire in the general store and pick the dialogue confirming you'll deal with the shadowy creatures; avoid the temple's official world until the repair step so NPC chats aren't interrupted.

hints.value: What are all these shadowy creatures?
Yes, I'll dispatch those dark and evil creatures.

atoms.label: Kill five loar shades for their remains
atoms.detail: Shades killed before talking to Razmire don't count, so kill five afterward and pick up their remains.

atoms.label: Return the loar remains to Razmire
atoms.detail: Hand the remains to Razmire; he may ask for another dose of Serum 207 before accepting them.

atoms.label: Buy an olive oil from Razmire's general store
atoms.detail: Open Razmire's general store stock and buy a bottle of olive oil.

atoms.label: Buy temple-repair materials from the builders' store
atoms.detail: Buy 5 timber beams, 5 limestone bricks and 25 swamp paste, plus an optional Flamtaer hammer, from Razmire's builders' store.

atoms.label: Dose Ulsquire Shauncy with Serum 207
atoms.detail: Find Ulsquire Shauncy in the house east of the general store, use a Serum 207 on him, then talk to him while carrying the loar remains.

atoms.label: Ask Ulsquire about the remains and the temple
atoms.detail: Talk to Ulsquire again and route the dialogue to ask what he found out about the remains, then about the temple.

hints.value: What did you find out about the remains?
What can you tell me about that temple?

atoms.label: Repair the temple to 100% with at least 20 sanctity
atoms.detail: Head north-east of Mort'ton and repair the temple in the minigame area until it reaches full repair and at least 20 sanctity; the official world is recommended for help from other players.

atoms.label: Light the sacred altar at the temple's centre
atoms.detail: Light the sacred altar yourself if able, or wait for another player with at least level 5 Firemaking to light it.

atoms.label: Pour olive oil on the flame to make sacred oil
atoms.detail: Use the olive oil on the lit altar's flame to produce sacred oil.

atoms.label: Dip Serum 207 in the flame to make Serum 208
atoms.detail: Use a dose of Serum 207 on the flame to permanently upgrade it into Serum 208, the permanent-cure version.

atoms.label: Make a pyre log with the sacred oil
atoms.detail: Use the sacred oil on a log to create a pyre log.

atoms.label: Set up and light a stone funeral pyre
atoms.detail: Head to any grouping of four stone funeral pyres west of the general store, use the pyre log then the loar remains on one, and light it for Prayer experience.

atoms.label: Collect the reward from the burned pyre
atoms.detail: Pick up the reward left behind once the funeral pyre burns down.

atoms.label: Cure Razmire with Serum 208
atoms.detail: Use Serum 208 on Razmire to cure him permanently.

atoms.label: Cure Ulsquire and finish the quest
atoms.detail: Use Serum 208 on Ulsquire Shauncy and complete the closing dialogue to finish the quest.

checkpoints.label: Start the quest and gather serum ingredients
Brew Serum 207, cure Razmire, and gather temple materials
Burn a shade and cure both patients

steps.detail: Talk to an examiner to attempt (and auto-fail) a first exam, then get a sealed letter from Curator Haig Halen at Varrock Museum. North of the Exam Centre near the blue urn hilltop, search bushes for a teddy bear, take a panning tray, use a cup of tea on the panning guide, pan for a Special cup (and an opal if needed), and pickpocket the nearby workman for an animal skull and specimen brush. Deliver the teddy/cup/skull to the three named students around the dig (NW, E, S respectively, talk twice each). Retake all 3 exams at the Exam Centre picking the correct dialogue options (fail is not possible once you know the answers) to get Level 1/2/3 certificates, re-visiting the students between exams (the female student demands an opal for the 2nd). Save the certificates for the museum curator. Back at the Exam Centre's western room, get a rock pick and specimen jar from cupboards, use the trowel on soil in a level-3 dig site until you find an ancient talisman (can take a while), then talk to Terry Balando and use his invitation on any digsite workman except the one by the western winch. Rope down the western winch to grab arcenia root and search bricks, then rope down the northern winch to talk to Doug Deeping about the rocks. South of the site, unlock a chest for chemical powder, get an unidentified liquid from a barrel (careful — it deals 25 damage and breaks the vial if dropped), grind charcoal, then give the powder/liquid to Terry Balando and mix nitroglycerin+ammonium nitrate, then charcoal, then arcenia root into a chemical compound. Use the compound then a tinderbox on the bricks down the western winch, enter the chamber (watch for level-22 skeletons), grab the stone tablet, and hand it to Terry Balando to finish.

req_items.name: Cup of tea
req_items.note: stealable from Varrock tea stall; or nettle tea

req_items.name: Opal or uncut opal
req_items.note: small chance while panning for a quest item

req_items.name: Specimen brush, specimen jar, panning tray, trowel

hints.note: Quest reward XP — counts toward your skills, replacing that much training.

atoms.label: Ask an examiner about taking an exam
atoms.detail: Visit the Exam Centre and ask an examiner about sitting an exam.

atoms.label: Talk to Curator Haig Halen at Varrock Museum
atoms.detail: Ask the curator for interesting news; he hands over a sealed letter for the Exam Centre.

atoms.label: Optionally steal a cup of tea from the tea stall
atoms.detail: A cup of tea is needed later for the panning guide; stealing one here also counts toward the Varrock easy diary.

hints.value: optional at this exact point -- Varrock easy diary requirement, but the cup is required later regardless

atoms.label: Return to an examiner for the first exam
atoms.detail: Hand over the sealed letter; the chat options do not matter here, the first exam always ends in an automatic fail.

atoms.label: Search the bush for a teddy bear
atoms.detail: North of the Exam Centre at the hilltop with the blue urn, search the second bush east of the urn for a teddy bear.

mapMarkers.label: Hilltop with the blue urn, north of the Exam Centre

atoms.label: Take a panning tray
atoms.detail: Pick up a panning tray near the dig.

atoms.label: Use the cup of tea on the panning guide
atoms.detail: Show the panning guide a cup of tea to learn how to pan.

atoms.label: Pan for the Special cup and an opal
atoms.detail: Pan the water at the panning points until a Special cup (shown as "Shiny Cup" in the panning dialogue) turns up; keep panning for an opal too if one isn't already held for the second exam's student demand.

atoms.label: Pickpocket the workman for a skull and brush
atoms.detail: Steal from the nearby digsite workman repeatedly until an animal skull and a specimen brush are both obtained.

atoms.label: Give the teddy bear to the north-west student
atoms.detail: Run to the blonde, pigtailed student at the north-west end of the dig and hand over the teddy bear, talking to her twice.

atoms.label: Give the Special cup to the eastern student
atoms.detail: Run to the bearded student in a reddish-orange shirt to the east and hand over the Special cup, talking to him twice.

atoms.label: Give the animal skull to the southern student
atoms.detail: Run to the student in a green shirt to the south and hand over the animal skull, talking to him twice.

atoms.label: Sit the first Earth Sciences exam
atoms.detail: Answer the examiner's four questions to earn the Level 1 Certificate.

atoms.label: Update all three students after exam one
atoms.detail: Talk to each of the three students again to keep them progressing.

atoms.label: Sit the second Earth Sciences exam
atoms.detail: Answer the second set of examiner questions to earn the Level 2 Certificate.

atoms.label: Update the students again, giving the opal
atoms.detail: Talk to each of the three students again; the female student now demands an opal, so talk to her twice to hand it over.

atoms.label: Sit the third Earth Sciences exam
atoms.detail: Answer the final set of examiner questions to earn the Level 3 Certificate.

atoms.label: Hand in the certificates to the curator
atoms.detail: Give all three certificates to Curator Haig Halen at Varrock Museum for a reward item (a fruit blast, an Another Cook's Quest requirement, or a chocolate cake).

atoms.label: Get a rock pick and specimen jar
atoms.detail: In the Exam Centre's western room, search the north and south cupboards for a rock pick and a specimen jar.

atoms.label: Dig for an ancient talisman with the trowel
atoms.detail: Use the trowel on the soil of a level-3 digsite repeatedly until an ancient talisman turns up; this step is luck-based and can take several minutes.

atoms.label: Talk to Terry Balando
atoms.detail: Speak to Terry Balando in the exam centre about the discovery.

atoms.label: Use the invitation on a digsite workman
atoms.detail: Use the invitation on any digsite workman except the one stationed by the western winch.

atoms.label: Descend the western winch for arcenia root
atoms.detail: Use a rope on the western winch and climb down, take one of the arcenia root in the room, search the bricks to the east, then climb back up.

atoms.label: Descend the northern winch and talk to Doug Deeping
atoms.detail: Walk north-east to the northern winch, use a rope on it and climb down, then ask Doug Deeping about the rocks before climbing back up.

atoms.label: Unlock the southern chest for chemical powder
atoms.detail: At the tent south of the dig marked with an orange vial, unlock the chest with the chest key and search it for chemical powder.

atoms.label: Collect an unidentified liquid from the barrel
atoms.detail: Use the trowel on the closed barrel west of the tent, then use a vial on it to draw an unidentified liquid; if the vial is dropped it deals 25 non-fatal damage and breaks, requiring the barrel to be reopened for a fresh vial.

hints.value: dropping the filled vial deals 25 damage and destroys it -- re-collect from the barrel

atoms.label: Grind the charcoal
atoms.detail: Grind charcoal with a pestle and mortar (search the tray a few steps north if none is carried).

atoms.label: Mix the chemical compound
atoms.detail: Give Terry Balando the chemical powder and the unidentified liquid (right-click the liquid so it isn't emptied by mistake), mix the nitroglycerin and ammonium nitrate together, then add the ground charcoal, then the arcenia root, to produce the chemical compound.

atoms.label: Blast open the bricks down the western winch
atoms.detail: Climb down the western winch, use the chemical compound on the bricks (not the rocks), then use a tinderbox on the bricks to blow them open.

atoms.label: Enter the chamber for the stone tablet
atoms.detail: Enter the newly opened chamber and take the stone tablet; low-level players should be cautious of level-22 skeletons inside.

atoms.label: Hand the tablet to Terry Balando to finish
atoms.detail: Give the stone tablet to Terry Balando to complete the quest.

checkpoints.label: Get the sealed letter and fail the first exam
Find the ancient talisman and scout the winches
Brew the chemical compound and blast the chamber

steps.detail: Barrows — a repeatable brothers run for Barrows gear and steady mid-game money.

mapMarkers.label: Barrows entrance (six burial mounds, east of Mort'ton)

steps.phase: Toward Quest spine (existing P2P-chain load-bearing quests)
steps.detail: Combine ranarr weed + snape grass → prayer potion (4). Requires Druidic Ritual and Herblore 52. Terminal step of the prayer-pot supply chain.

hints.note: Base recipe output is Prayer potion(3) — the target stays prayer_potion_4 for chain-slug consistency, but reaching an actual 4-dose potion needs this amulet chance (or combining leftover doses). Ref: Prayer potion Creation section.

steps.phase: Toward Quest spine (existing P2P-chain load-bearing quests)
steps.detail: Must be able to beat level-68 Gorad (safespottable) and run past level-111 blue dragons. Flow: talk to Wizard in tower, get fingernails from bush below, talk to Og NW of Yanille for Toban's key, rope across to Jangerberry island (talk Grew), enter Tunnel to Toban south of Gu'Tanoth, kill Gorad for tooth, give Toban dragon bones for relic part 3, loot chest, return relics to Wizard for ogre relic. Enter Gu'Tanoth, steal rock cake from market, pay 20 coins/talk guards to reach Skavid caves, get skavid map (death rune), solve 4-cave skavid word-repeat puzzle, gold bar unlocks east gate, second nightshade in Mad Skavid cave, use nightshade on Enclave guard to trigger cutscene. Brew magic ogre potion (guam unf + jangerberries + ground bat bones, in that order) with Wizard. Return to Enclave, potion 6 ogre shamans for crystal 3, mine Rock of Dalgroth for crystal 4, return all 4 crystals to correct pillar colors (NE magenta/SE grey/SW yellow/NW cyan), pull lever. Key spine value: unlocks Ogre Enclave blue dragons + Watchtower teleport infrastructure.

atoms.label: Reach the top floor of the Watchtower
atoms.detail: Get to the top floor via another player's Watchtower portal (World 330 house party), the Nightmare Zone minigame teleport, or fairy ring CIQ then the trellis and ladder.

atoms.label: Talk to the Watchtower Wizard
atoms.detail: Ask the wizard what the matter is.

atoms.label: Search the far north-west bush for fingernails
atoms.detail: Climb down two ladders and search the bush in the far north-west corner.

atoms.label: Optional: kill a giant bat in Yanille dungeon for bat bones
atoms.detail: Only needed if not already carrying bat bones for the potion brewed later.

hints.value: optional -- skip if bat bones are already held

atoms.label: Talk to the Watchtower Wizard again
atoms.detail: Report back with the fingernails.

atoms.label: Talk to Og, north-west of Yanille, for Toban's key
atoms.detail: Ask Og for entrance to the city of ogres; reach him via fairy ring CIQ west, or a ring of dueling to Castle Wars then south and north-east.

atoms.label: Rope across to Jangerberry island
atoms.detail: Use a rope on the branch (not the trunk) of the long-branched tree west of the island.

atoms.label: Talk to Grew on Jangerberry island
atoms.detail: Convince Grew not to eat you and to help instead.

atoms.label: Enter the Tunnel to Toban, south of Gu'Tanoth
atoms.detail: Reach it via Feldip Hills teleport running north, fairy ring AKS, or ring of dueling to Castle Wars then south past Jiggig; a death rune lies near the hole if still needed.

atoms.label: Kill Gorad and take his tooth
atoms.detail: Defeat the level 68 Gorad; keep an inventory slot free or the tooth is lost.

atoms.label: Talk to Toban
atoms.detail: Offer to help Toban in exchange for entrance.

atoms.label: Give Toban dragon bones for relic part 3
atoms.detail: Talk to Toban again with dragon bones in your inventory.

atoms.label: Search the chest for Toban's stolen gold
atoms.detail: Search the chest and take a spare rope too if a second one is needed.

atoms.label: Talk to Grew again, take jangerberries if needed
atoms.detail: Return to Jangerberry island and collect jangerberries for the potion brewed later.

atoms.label: Go back and talk to Og
atoms.detail: Report back to Og with the relic pieces.

atoms.label: Talk to the Wizard to assemble the ogre relic
atoms.detail: Hand over all three relic pieces; the wizard combines them into the ogre relic, take a lit candle too if a light source is still needed.

atoms.label: Enter Gu'Tanoth via the north-east path
atoms.detail: Head west to the gate and show the ogre relic to the Ogre Guard for entry.

atoms.label: Buy a pestle and mortar and a vial from the Ogre merchant
atoms.detail: Buy both before stealing the rock cake below (27 coins combined).

atoms.label: Steal a rock cake from the market counter
atoms.detail: Steal from the counter on the south side of the central Gu'Tanoth market.

atoms.label: Talk to the guard at the battlement
atoms.detail: Climb around south to the battlement and speak to the guard there.

atoms.label: Talk to the guard again with the rock cake
atoms.detail: Show the guard the stolen rock cake.

atoms.label: Pay 20 coins to cross the bridge
atoms.detail: Try to jump the bridge north-east, then agree to pay the guards 20 coins instead.

atoms.label: Talk to a City guard about the skavid caves
atoms.detail: Ask a City guard for passage into the skavid caves.

atoms.label: Talk to a City guard again with a death rune
atoms.detail: Show a death rune to receive the skavid map.

atoms.label: Head to the Skavid caves north of the second gate
atoms.detail: Return through the north-west gate, walk east then turn south to the second city gate.

atoms.label: Talk to the scared skavid
atoms.detail: Reassure the scared skavid you mean no harm.

atoms.label: Answer the word-repeat puzzle in each of the 4 skavid caves
atoms.detail: Speak to the regular skavid in the caves east, north-east, north, and north-west of Gu'Tanoth (near the Yanille gate), answering Nod/Cur/Ar/Ig to their four prompts; the north-west cave also has a cave nightshade to grab.

atoms.label: Give the gold bar to the guard at the Eastern City gate
atoms.detail: Click the gate and hand over the gold bar for access.

atoms.label: Answer the Mad Skavid's 8-part word-repeat puzzle
atoms.detail: Cross the bridge into the cave and respond Gor/Cur/Tanath/Bidith/Cur/Nod/Ig/Ar to the Mad Skavid's paired prompts, in order.

atoms.label: Take a second cave nightshade
atoms.detail: Grab another nightshade in the same cave; world-hop if it has not respawned. Two total are needed.

atoms.label: Return to the Gu'Tanoth market
atoms.detail: Leave the way you entered, not down the hole.

atoms.label: Use nightshade on an Enclave guard
atoms.detail: Complete the dialogue fully, then enter the cave and watch the cutscene before teleporting or running out.

atoms.label: Talk to the Watchtower Wizard about the potion
atoms.detail: Fill a vial with water at the fountain outside the tower first if one is still needed.

atoms.label: Add guam leaf to the water vial
atoms.detail: Make a guam potion (unf) as the first ingredient.

atoms.label: Add jangerberries to the potion second
atoms.detail: Use (not eat) the jangerberries on the unfinished potion.

atoms.label: Add ground bat bones to the potion last
atoms.detail: Grind the bat bones with a pestle and mortar first, then use (not bury) them last, or the water evaporates.

atoms.label: Give the Wizard the finished potion
atoms.detail: Hand over the completed unfinished potion to receive the magic ogre potion.

atoms.label: Equip an anti-dragon shield before returning
atoms.detail: The Ogre Enclave has hostile ogres and a blue dragon.

atoms.label: Return to the Gu'Tanoth market square
atoms.detail: Head back to the market square to re-enter the Enclave.

atoms.label: Use nightshade on an Enclave guard to re-enter
atoms.detail: Show a nightshade to an Enclave guard again to access the cave.

atoms.label: Potion all 6 ogre shamans for the 3rd crystal
atoms.detail: Activate protect from melee before pouring, since the potion's pouring animation stalls you against nearby dragons and demons.

atoms.label: Mine the Rock of Dalgroth for the 4th crystal
atoms.detail: Right-click mine the rock in the centre of the Ogre Enclave.

atoms.label: Return all 4 crystals to the pillars
atoms.detail: Place NE magenta, SE grey, SW yellow, NW cyan; leave and re-enter the room if any crystal is still sitting on a pillar.

atoms.label: Pull the lever to the west to finish
atoms.detail: Pull the lever to complete Watchtower.

steps.instruction: Buy best available scimitar (Zeke, Al Kharid)
steps.detail: Al Kharid gate toll 10 coins (free after Prince Ali Rescue). Buy the best scimitar your Attack level allows from Zeke's shop (stock tiers ?? — verify top tier). Re-visit at each Attack breakpoint.

mapMarkers.label: Zeke (Al Kharid) -- confirmed via Zeke's own {{NPC map|x=3288|y=3190|r=3}} pin, matches the existing step marker exactly.

hints.note: 10-coin toll; Prince Ali Rescue removes it permanently if already done.

Zeke's Stock table (StoreTableHead sellmultiplier=1000 buymultiplier=550 delta=20): Bronze stock 5/restock 100s, Iron stock 3/restock 200s, Steel stock 2/restock 600s, Mithril stock 1/restock 4000s (~66.7min). Exact coin price unresolved -- base item value x buymultiplier is the shop-price formula but the wiki does not spell out the post-delta price per unit, staying '??'.

steps.phase: Toward Quest spine (existing P2P-chain load-bearing quests)
steps.detail: Plant guam seeds in herb patches; harvest guam weed. Provides early herblore training materials before ranarr is available. Loop every ~80 minutes.

hints.value: min 3 harvest lives, +1/compost tier, max 6 w/ ultracompost
hints.note: Guam_seed s2: 'Guam has a minimum of 3 harvest lives, increasing by 1 for each tier of compost used (for a maximum of 6 when using ultracompost)'; plus a per-harvest chance to not consume a life scaling 10.2% (lvl 1) to 31.6% (lvl 99) Farming, interpolated linearly.

RECURRING, ahead-of-time per the step's own timing field. XREF: bg:bootstrap-gather-guam_weed-prayer-pot-supply for the one-time pre-loop gather that seeds this cycle before the first guam patch is planted.
